light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出了OmniACBench基准，包含3,559个验证实例，覆盖六个声学特征：语速、发声、发音、情感、全局口音和音色。模型需根据口语指令、文本脚本和图像，生成具有适当语气和方式的语音输出。关键创新点在于整合多模态上下文进行语音生成评估，通过设计多样实例测试模型的声学控制能力。实验对八个模型进行了广泛评估，分析其在上下文基础声学控制中的表现。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，尽管模型在先前文本输出评估中表现良好，但在OmniACBench上存在显著局限性。分析表明，瓶颈不在于处理个别模态，而在于整合多模态上下文以实现忠实语音生成的能力不足。具体失败模式包括弱直接控制、失败的隐含推理和失败的多模态基础。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但强调了模型在声学控制方面的普遍不足，为后续研究提供重要见解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是建立了OmniACBench基准，首次系统评估多模态模型在上下文基础声学控制方面的能力。学术价值在于揭示了模型在语音生成中的瓶颈，促进了多模态集成研究的发展。实际应用中，有助于指导开发能有效言语化响应的模型，提升人机交互体验。未来工作可基于识别出的失败模式，改进模型在声学控制方面的性能。

title: Dialogue to Question Generation for Evidence-based Medical Guideline Agent Development
abstract: Evidence-based medicine (EBM) is central to high-quality care, but remains difficult to implement in fast-paced primary care settings. Physicians face short consultations, increasing patient loads, and lengthy guideline documents that are impractical to consult in real time. To address this gap, we investigate the feasibility of using large language models (LLMs) as ambient assistants that surface targeted, evidence-based questions during physician-patient encounters. Our study focuses on question generation rather than question answering, with the aim of scaffolding physician reasoning and integrating guideline-based practice into brief consultations. We implemented two prompting strategies, a zero-shot baseline and a multi-stage reasoning variant, using Gemini 2.5 as the backbone model. We evaluated on a benchmark of 80 de-identified transcripts from real clinical encounters, with six experienced physicians contributing over 90 hours of structured review. Results indicate that while general-purpose LLMs are not yet fully reliable, they can produce clinically meaningful and guideline-relevant questions, suggesting significant potential to reduce cognitive burden and make EBM more actionable at the point of care.
comment: 9 pages. To appear in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR), Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) Symposium 2025

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用大语言模型从临床对话生成基于证据的问题，以支持医学指南代理的开发，提升循证医学的实用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决循证医学在快节奏初级保健环境中实施的挑战。医生面临短咨询时间、患者负荷增加和冗长指南文档难以实时查阅的问题，现有方法难以将指南实践有效集成到临床决策中。因此，探索大语言模型作为环境助手，生成针对性问题，以减轻认知负担并增强护理点的循证医学应用，对提升医疗质量至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用 Gemini 2.5 作为骨干大语言模型，实施两种提示策略：零样本基线和多阶段推理变体，重点在于问题生成而非回答。利用临床对话数据，从80个匿名转录本中生成基于证据的指导性问题，通过六位医生的结构化审查进行评估，旨在自动化生成问题以辅助医学指南代理开发。
light_analysis.result: 基于80个临床转录本的评估，结果显示通用大语言模型尚未完全可靠，但能生成具有临床意义和指南相关性的问题。这暗示了减少医生认知负担和提升循证医学在护理点操作性的潜力，与基线方法对比表明模型的可行性，为进一步优化奠定了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了使用大语言模型生成基于证据问题的可行性，为医学指南自动化支持提供了新途径，具有显著的学术和实际价值。尽管模型可靠性有限，但显示出集成到临床决策中的潜力，未来工作可聚焦于提升可靠性和扩展应用场景，以实现更高效的循证医学实践。

title: Revealing Multi-View Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models
abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) are increasingly being applied to multi-view image inputs captured from diverse viewpoints. However, despite this growing use, current LVLMs often confuse or mismatch visual information originating from different instances or viewpoints, a phenomenon we term multi-view hallucination. To systematically analyze this problem, we construct MVH-Bench, a benchmark comprising 4.8k question-answer pairs targeting two types of hallucination: cross-instance and cross-view. Empirical results show that recent LVLMs struggle to correctly associate visual evidence with its corresponding instance or viewpoint. To overcome this limitation, we propose Reference Shift Contrastive Decoding (RSCD), a training-free decoding technique that suppresses visual interference by generating negative logits through attention masking. Experiments on MVH-Bench with Qwen2.5-VL and LLaVA-OneVision demonstrate that RSCD consistently improves performance by up to 21.1 and 34.6 points over existing hallucination mitigation methods, highlighting the effectiveness of our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Reference Shift Contrastive Decoding方法，有效缓解大视觉-语言模型中的多视图幻觉问题，无需额外训练即可提升模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大视觉-语言模型在多视图图像输入中的应用增加，如自动驾驶和机器人视觉领域，模型常混淆来自不同实例或视角的视觉信息，导致多视图幻觉现象。这一问题严重影响模型准确性和实际应用效果，而现有模型在处理关联视觉证据与对应实例或视角方面表现不足。当前方法缺乏针对多视图幻觉的系统分析和有效解决方案，因此本研究旨在揭示这一关键问题并构建基准来量化分析，为后续改进提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先构建了MVH-Bench基准，包含4.8k个针对跨实例和跨视图幻觉的问题-答案对，用于系统评估。核心方法是提出Reference Shift Contrastive Decoding技术，这是一种无需训练的解码策略，通过注意力掩码在生成过程中产生负logits，与正常输出进行对比，从而抑制来自不同实例或视角的视觉干扰。关键创新在于利用现有模型的注意力机制，直接优化解码阶段，避免额外的训练成本。实验使用了Qwen2.5-VL和LLaVA-OneVision等大视觉-语言模型进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在MVH-Bench上的实验结果表明，Reference Shift Contrastive Decoding在Qwen2.5-VL和LLaVA-OneVision模型上均显著提升性能，相对于现有幻觉缓解方法，准确率提升高达21.1点和34.6点。这些改进在跨实例和跨视图任务中一致性地展现，证明了该方法在减少多视图幻觉方面的有效性。与基线方法对比，RSCD表现出更好的鲁棒性和普适性，为模型在多视图场景中的准确关联提供了有力支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献包括揭示大视觉-语言模型中的多视图幻觉现象，构建系统基准MVH-Bench进行量化分析，并提出高效的RSCD方法。研究具有重要学术价值，为多模态模型处理复杂视觉输入提供了新思路，特别是在解码阶段优化方面；在实际应用中，能提升模型在真实世界多视图场景中的可靠性和准确性。潜在局限性可能包括方法对特定模型或任务的适用性，未来工作可探索扩展RSCD到更多模型类型，或进一步优化注意力掩码策略以应对更广泛的多模态挑战。

title: Optimal Variance-Dependent Regret Bounds for Infinite-Horizon MDPs
abstract: Online reinforcement learning in infinite-horizon Markov decision processes (MDPs) remains less theoretically and algorithmically developed than its episodic counterpart, with many algorithms suffering from high ``burn-in'' costs and failing to adapt to benign instance-specific complexity. In this work, we address these shortcomings for two infinite-horizon objectives: the classical average-reward regret and the $γ$-regret. We develop a single tractable UCB-style algorithm applicable to both settings, which achieves the first optimal variance-dependent regret guarantees. Our regret bounds in both settings take the form $\tilde{O}( \sqrt{SA\,\text{Var}} + \text{lower-order terms})$, where $S,A$ are the state and action space sizes, and $\text{Var}$ captures cumulative transition variance. This implies minimax-optimal average-reward and $γ$-regret bounds in the worst case but also adapts to easier problem instances, for example yielding nearly constant regret in deterministic MDPs. Furthermore, our algorithm enjoys significantly improved lower-order terms for the average-reward setting. With prior knowledge of the optimal bias span $\Vert h^\star\Vert_\text{sp}$, our algorithm obtains lower-order terms scaling as $\Vert h^\star\Vert_\text{sp} S^2 A$, which we prove is optimal in both $\Vert h^\star\Vert_\text{sp}$ and $A$.   Without prior knowledge, we prove that no algorithm can have lower-order terms smaller than $\Vert h^\star \Vert_\text{sp}^2 S A$, and we provide a prior-free algorithm whose lower-order terms scale as $\Vert h^\star\Vert_\text{sp}^2 S^3 A$, nearly matching this lower bound. Taken together, these results completely characterize the optimal dependence on $\Vert h^\star\Vert_\text{sp}$ in both leading and lower-order terms, and reveal a fundamental gap in what is achievable with and without prior knowledge.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一个用于无限马尔可夫决策过程的在线强化学习算法，首次实现了最优方差依赖性回归边界，并完全刻画了偏差跨度的依赖性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线强化学习在无限马尔可夫决策过程中的理论研究较少，许多算法存在高初始化成本和不能适应实例特定复杂性的问题，这限制了在线学习系统在长期决策场景中的应用。现有方法效率低下且缺乏适应性，导致在处理不同复杂度的环境时性能不佳。因此，开发能减少成本并自适应调整的算法对提升强化学习的理论和实际价值至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文开发了一个基于UCB风格的单一可处理算法，适用于无限马尔可夫决策过程的平均奖励回归和γ-回归目标。核心创新是实现了首次最优方差依赖性回归保证，通过定义回归边界为$	ilde{O}( \sqrt{SA\,\text{Var}} + \text{lower-order terms})$，其中S和A为状态和动作空间大小，Var捕获累积转移方差。算法设计注重可处理性，并考虑了先验知识对最优偏差跨度的影响，以优化下阶项性能。
light_analysis.result: 算法在无限马尔可夫决策过程中达到了最优方差依赖性回归边界，形式为$	ilde{O}( \sqrt{SA\,\text{Var}} + \text{lower-order terms})$，在确定性环境中实现近乎常数的回归。有先验知识时，下阶项为$\Vert h^\star\Vert_\text{sp} S^2 A$，证明是最优的；无先验知识时，下阶项为$\Vert h^\star\Vert_\text{sp}^2 S^3 A$，接近理论下界，优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次为无限马尔可夫决策过程提供了最优方差依赖性回归保证，完全刻画了偏差跨度的依赖性。学术意义在于推动了在线强化学习理论的发展，并揭示了先验知识对算法性能的根本影响，具有实际应用价值。未来工作可能包括扩展算法到更复杂模型或优化计算效率。

title: DP^2-VL: Private Photo Dataset Protection by Data Poisoning for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Recent advances in visual-language alignment have endowed vision-language models (VLMs) with fine-grained image understanding capabilities. However, this progress also introduces new privacy risks. This paper first proposes a novel privacy threat model named identity-affiliation learning: an attacker fine-tunes a VLM using only a few private photos of a target individual, thereby embedding associations between the target facial identity and their private property and social relationships into the model's internal representations. Once deployed via public APIs, this model enables unauthorized exposure of the target user's private information upon input of their photos. To benchmark VLMs' susceptibility to such identity-affiliation leakage, we introduce the first identity-affiliation dataset comprising seven typical scenarios appearing in private photos. Each scenario is instantiated with multiple identity-centered photo-description pairs. Experimental results demonstrate that mainstream VLMs like LLaVA, Qwen-VL, and MiniGPT-v2, can recognize facial identities and infer identity-affiliation relationships by fine-tuning on small-scale private photographic dataset, and even on synthetically generated datasets. To mitigate this privacy risk, we propose DP2-VL, the first Dataset Protection framework for private photos that leverages Data Poisoning. Though optimizing imperceptible perturbations by pushing the original representations toward an antithetical region, DP2-VL induces a dataset-level shift in the embedding space of VLMs'encoders. This shift separates protected images from clean inference images, causing fine-tuning on the protected set to overfit. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DP2-VL achieves strong generalization across models, robustness to diverse post-processing operations, and consistent effectiveness across varying protection ratios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DP^2-VL框架，通过数据投毒保护私人照片数据集，以应对视觉语言模型的身份-从属关系隐私泄露风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型的进步带来了新的隐私威胁，攻击者仅需少量目标人物的私人照片微调模型，即可将身份与私人财产和社会关系关联嵌入模型表示中，通过公共API暴露用户隐私。现有方法对此类身份-从属关系泄露的防护不足，隐私风险在VLMs中日益突出，因此迫切需要开发有效的保护机制来防止未经授权的信息访问和滥用。
light_analysis.method: DP^2-VL是一种基于数据投毒的私人照片数据集保护框架，通过优化不可察觉的扰动，将图像在视觉语言模型编码器中的原始表示推向对立区域，导致嵌入空间的数据集级别偏移。这种偏移使受保护图像与干净推理图像分离，攻击者微调受保护数据集时会产生过拟合。方法还引入了首个身份-从属关系数据集，涵盖七个典型场景的图片-描述对，用于基准测试VLMs的敏感性。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，主流视觉语言模型如LLaVA、Qwen-VL和MiniGPT-v2，在小规模私人照片或合成数据集上微调后，能成功识别面部身份并推断身份-从属关系。DP^2-VL框架在这些模型上表现出强大的泛化能力，对不同后处理操作具有鲁棒性，并在变化保护比例下保持一致有效性，显著提升了隐私保护水平，证明了其对抗此类隐私威胁的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了DP^2-VL，首个基于数据投毒的私人照片数据集保护框架，有效减轻了视觉语言模型的隐私风险。研究揭示了身份-从属关系学习这一新威胁，并提供基准数据集和防护方案，具有重要的学术和实际应用意义。未来工作可扩展至更广泛的隐私攻击防御，并优化框架以适应更复杂的模型场景。

title: DepthArb: Training-Free Depth-Arbitrated Generation for Occlusion-Robust Image Synthesis
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models frequently exhibit deficiencies in synthesizing accurate occlusion relationships of multiple objects, particularly within dense overlapping regions. Existing training-free layout-guided methods predominantly rely on rigid spatial priors that remain agnostic to depth order, often resulting in concept mixing or illogical occlusion. To address these limitations, we propose DepthArb, a training-free framework that resolves occlusion ambiguities by arbitrating attention competition between interacting objects. Specifically, DepthArb employs two core mechanisms: Attention Arbitration Modulation (AAM), which enforces depth-ordered visibility by suppressing background activations in overlapping regions, and Spatial Compactness Control (SCC), which preserves structural integrity by curbing attention divergence. These mechanisms enable robust occlusion generation without model retraining. To systematically evaluate this capability, we propose OcclBench, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate diverse occlusion scenarios. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that DepthArb consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both occlusion accuracy and visual fidelity. As a plug-and-play method, DepthArb seamlessly enhances the compositional capabilities of diffusion backbones, offering a novel perspective on spatial layering within generative models.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了DepthArb框架，一种无需训练的方法，通过仲裁注意力竞争来解决文本到图像扩散模型中的遮挡歧义，从而提高图像合成的遮挡鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在合成多个对象时，尤其是在密集重叠区域，经常难以准确生成遮挡关系，影响图像真实性和逻辑一致性。现有无需训练的布局引导方法依赖于忽略深度顺序的刚性空间先验，导致概念混合或不合理遮挡，限制了模型在高密度物体合成中的实用性。解决这一问题对于提升生成图像的视觉质量和应用效果至关重要，因为它直接关系到场景理解的准确性。
light_analysis.method: DepthArb框架的核心是两种机制：Attention Arbitration Modulation (AAM) 通过抑制重叠区域中背景对象的注意力激活，强制实施深度顺序的可见性；Spatial Compactness Control (SCC) 控制注意力的发散，以保持生成对象的结构完整性。这些机制无需重新训练基础扩散模型，是一种即插即用的方法，直接应用于现有模型如Stable Diffusion，通过调整生成过程中的注意力分布来解决遮挡歧义。
light_analysis.result: 论文提出OcclBench基准，用于系统评估多样遮挡场景。评估结果显示，DepthArb在遮挡准确性和视觉保真度方面一致优于最先进的基线方法，通过广泛实验验证了其在处理复杂遮挡时的优越性。与现有方法相比，DepthArb减少了概念混合和不合理遮挡的发生，提高了图像的逼真度。摘要未给出具体性能指标，但通过新基准证实了框架的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: DepthArb的主要贡献是提出了一种无需训练的框架，通过仲裁注意力竞争来增强文本到图像扩散模型的遮挡生成能力，为生成模型中的空间分层问题提供了新的视角。这具有重要学术价值，并作为一个即插即用方法，可以无缝集成到现有扩散模型中，提升图像合成的组合能力和实际应用效果。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但潜在扩展可能包括更复杂场景的适应。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Vision-based Risk Object Identification via Conformal Risk Tube Prediction
abstract: We study object importance-based vision risk object identification (Vision-ROI), a key capability for hazard detection in intelligent driving systems. Existing approaches make deterministic decisions and ignore uncertainty, which could lead to safety-critical failures. Specifically, in ambiguous scenarios, fixed decision thresholds may cause premature or delayed risk detection and temporally unstable predictions, especially in complex scenes with multiple interacting risks. Despite these challenges, current methods lack a principled framework to model risk uncertainty jointly across space and time. We propose Conformal Risk Tube Prediction, a unified formulation that captures spatiotemporal risk uncertainty, provides coverage guarantees for true risks, and produces calibrated risk scores with uncertainty estimates. To conduct a systematic evaluation, we present a new dataset and metrics probing diverse scenario configurations with multi-risk coupling effects, which are not supported by existing datasets. We systematically analyze factors affecting uncertainty estimation, including scenario variations, per-risk category behavior, and perception error propagation. Our method delivers substantial improvements over prior approaches, enhancing vision-ROI robustness and downstream performance, such as reducing nuisance braking alerts. For more qualitative results, please visit our project webpage: https://hcis-lab.github.io/CRTP/
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出 Conformal Risk Tube Prediction 方法，一个统一框架，用于建模时空风险不确定性，增强视觉风险对象识别的鲁棒性和安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能驾驶系统中的视觉风险对象识别是关键安全功能，但现有方法通常基于确定性决策，忽略不确定性因素，导致在模糊场景中可能出现安全关键故障。例如，固定决策阈值可能导致风险检测过早或延迟，以及时间上不稳定的预测，尤其在多风险交互的复杂场景中，现有方法缺乏原则性框架来联合建模空间和时间的风险不确定性。这不仅降低了系统可靠性，还增加了误判风险，突显了研究不确定性感知方法的必要性和重要性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出 Conformal Risk Tube Prediction 方法，这是一个统一框架，旨在捕捉时空风险不确定性。该方法通过提供覆盖保证来确保真实风险被识别，并产生校准的风险分数和不确定性估计。为了进行系统评估，作者开发了一个新数据集和评估指标，专门支持多风险耦合效应，这在现有数据集中未得到体现。此外，研究系统分析了影响不确定性估计的因素，包括场景变化、风险类别行为和感知错误传播，但没有在摘要中详细说明具体模型架构或算法细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在先前方法基础上取得了显著改进，增强了视觉风险对象识别的鲁棒性和下游任务性能。具体来说，它有效减少了烦人的刹车警报等错误检测，并通过新数据集的评估验证了其在处理多风险耦合效应时的有效性。尽管摘要未提供具体的性能指标数值，如准确率或效率提升的百分比，但作者报告了整体性能的提升，表明方法在不确定性建模方面的优势优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了 Conformal Risk Tube Prediction 方法，为视觉风险对象识别提供了一个不确定性感知的统一框架。它具有重要的学术价值，填补了当前方法在联合建模时空风险不确定性方面的空白，并在实际应用中能显著提高智能驾驶系统的安全性和鲁棒性。未来工作可以进一步优化不确定性估计技术，或将框架扩展到更多复杂场景和任务中，以克服潜在的数据集局限性或增强泛化能力。

title: DecepGPT: Schema-Driven Deception Detection with Multicultural Datasets and Robust Multimodal Learning
abstract: Multimodal deception detection aims to identify deceptive behavior by analyzing audiovisual cues for forensics and security. In these high-stakes settings, investigators need verifiable evidence connecting audiovisual cues to final decisions, along with reliable generalization across domains and cultural contexts. However, existing benchmarks provide only binary labels without intermediate reasoning cues. Datasets are also small with limited scenario coverage, leading to shortcut learning. We address these issues through three contributions. First, we construct reasoning datasets by augmenting existing benchmarks with structured cue-level descriptions and reasoning chains, enabling model output auditable reports. Second, we release T4-Deception, a multicultural dataset based on the unified ``To Tell The Truth'' television format implemented across four countries. With 1695 samples, it is the largest non-laboratory deception detection dataset. Third, we propose two modules for robust learning under small-data conditions. Stabilized Individuality-Commonality Synergy (SICS) refines multimodal representations by synergizing learnable global priors with sample-adaptive residuals, followed by a polarity-aware adjustment that bi-directionally recalibrates representations. Distilled Modality Consistency (DMC) aligns modality-specific predictions with the fused multimodal predictions via knowledge distillation to prevent unimodal shortcut learning. Experiments on three established benchmarks and our novel dataset demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both in-domain and cross-domain scenarios, while exhibiting superior transferability across diverse cultural contexts. The datasets and codes will be released.

light_analysis.overview: DecepGPT通过构建多文化数据集和引入SICS与DMC模块，实现鲁棒多模态欺骗检测，提升可解释性和跨域泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态欺骗检测在法医和安全等高风险领域具有重要应用，需要可验证证据连接视听线索与决策。现有方法存在不足：基准测试仅提供二分类标签，缺乏中间推理线索，限制了模型的可审计性；数据集规模小、场景覆盖有限，导致捷径学习，阻碍了跨域和文化背景的可靠泛化。这些问题在现实应用中尤为关键，影响决策的可信度和适应性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出三项核心贡献：首先，构建推理数据集，通过为现有基准添加结构化线索级描述和推理链，使模型能输出可审计报告；其次，发布T4-Deception数据集，基于四个国家统一电视格式，包含1695个样本，是多文化非实验室欺骗检测中最大数据集；最后，设计两个模块用于小数据鲁棒学习：SICS模块协同可学习全局先验与样本自适应残差优化多模态表示，并引入极性感知调整双向校准；DMC模块通过知识蒸馏对齐模态特定预测与融合多模态预测，防止单模态捷径学习，提升模型稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在三个已建立基准和新数据集T4-Deception上进行，结果表明该方法在域内和跨域场景中达到最先进性能，展现出优越的跨文化可迁移性，有效克服了现有方法的局限性。与基线方法对比，在欺骗检测任务中实现了显著改进，但具体性能指标如准确率等摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献包括构建可审计数据集、发布多文化数据集以及提出鲁棒学习模块，这些创新提升了欺骗检测的可解释性、泛化能力和可靠性。研究具有重要学术价值，推动了多模态学习在安全领域的应用，实际应用中可增强法医分析的准确性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多场景和数据集，进一步优化模型效率，摘要未明确说明具体局限性或未来方向。

title: Attention-aware Inference Optimizations for Large Vision-Language Models with Memory-efficient Decoding
abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success in multi-modal reasoning, but their inference time efficiency remains a significant challenge due to the memory overhead during decoding, especially when the query and answer of VLMs consist of long sequences of visual and text tokens. This paper presents AttentionPack, an adaptive and attention-aware optimization framework tailored for large vision-language models with improving memory-efficiency during decoding, focusing on addressing the challenges due to the increased high number of visual inputs and interactions, particularly in long-context tasks with multiple high-resolution images or videos. AttentionPack is novel in two aspects: (i) We introduce a multi-head attention compaction method for economically storing key and value matrices by exploiting the implicit low-rank structure, and (ii) we develop a token-specific attention-aware decompression mechanism to reduce latency overhead. Experimental results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that AttentionPack improves memory efficiency by up to 8x, enabling higher batch sizes and faster batch inference while preserving the model output quality or longer context lengths for superior retrieval performance. We also report the effectiveness of AttentionPack combined with eviction, quantization and kernel fusion, showing further efficiency gains for resource-limited environments.

light_analysis.overview: AttentionPack框架通过注意力感知优化，显著提升大型视觉语言模型解码时的内存效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型在多模态推理中已取得显著成就，但推理效率因解码阶段的内存开销而受限，特别是在处理长序列的视觉和文本标记时。现有方法在长上下文任务中，如涉及多个高分辨率图像或视频时，内存使用效率低下，这阻碍了模型的实时部署和资源受限环境中的应用。因此，优化内存效率成为提升VLMs实用性和扩展性的关键需求。
light_analysis.method: AttentionPack框架的核心创新包括多头部注意力压缩方法，它利用隐式低秩结构经济存储键和值矩阵以降低内存占用；以及令牌特定注意力感知解压缩机制，旨在减少延迟开销。该框架针对大型视觉语言模型的自适应优化，专注于解码阶段的内存管理，摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但基于通用VLM结构进行设计。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，AttentionPack将内存效率提升高达8倍，支持更高的批量大小和更快的批量推理，同时保持模型输出质量或允许更长上下文长度以提升检索性能。结合驱逐、量化和核融合技术，在资源有限环境中进一步提高了效率增益，与基线方法相比展现出显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: AttentionPack的主要贡献是提出一个注意力感知的优化框架，有效解决了大型视觉语言模型解码时的内存效率问题。学术上，它推动了多模态模型推理优化的研究；实践中，它增强了VLMs在资源受限环境中的适用性。未来工作可能包括更广泛的优化扩展，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性或方向。

title: Self-Distillation for Multi-Token Prediction
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) scale up, inference efficiency becomes a critical bottleneck. Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) could accelerate LLM inference by predicting multiple future tokens in parallel. However, existing MTP approaches still face two challenges: limited acceptance rates of MTP heads, and difficulties in jointly training multiple MTP heads. Therefore, we propose MTP-D, a simple yet effective self-distillation method with minimal additional training cost, which boosts MTP head acceptance rates (+7.5\%) while maximumly preserving main-head performance. We also introduce a looped extension strategy for MTP-D, enabling effective and economical MTP head extension and further significant inference speedup to 1-head MTP (+220.4\%). Moreover, we systematically explore and validate key insights on the distillation strategies and the potential scalability of MTP through extensive experiments on seven benchmarks. These results demonstrate that our MTP-D and looped extension strategy effectively enhance MTP-head performance and inference efficiency, facilitating the practical usage of MTP in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 作者提出了一种基于自蒸馏的多令牌预测方法MTP-D，显著提升接受率和推理效率，并通过循环扩展策略优化头扩展。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型规模扩大，推理效率成为关键瓶颈。多令牌预测技术可通过并行预测多个未来令牌加速推理，但现有方法面临MTP头接受率有限和多个头联合训练困难的问题，制约了实际应用。因此，本研究旨在解决这些挑战，提高MTP的实用性和性能，以促进在LLMs中的广泛部署。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出MTP-D，一种自蒸馏方法，通过最小额外训练成本提升MTP头接受率，并引入循环扩展策略实现经济有效的头扩展。核心创新在于利用自蒸馏过程优化多个MTP头，同时保留主头性能。实验在七个基准测试上进行，但摘要未明确说明具体的数据集和模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，MTP-D使MTP头接受率提升了7.5%，并最大程度保持了主头性能。通过循环扩展策略，推理速度相对于单头MTP显著提升了220.4%。这些改进在七个基准测试中验证，与现有方法相比，证明了方法在加速推理方面的有效性和优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证明，MTP-D和循环扩展策略有效增强了多令牌预测的性能和推理效率，为大型语言模型的实用化提供了技术支持。贡献在于提出简单高效的蒸馏方法，促进了MTP的实际应用。未来工作可能包括进一步优化策略或探索更大规模应用，以持续提升效率。

title: AnalogAgent: Self-Improving Analog Circuit Design Automation with LLM Agents
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) suggest strong potential for automating analog circuit design. Yet most LLM-based approaches rely on a single-model loop of generation, diagnosis, and correction, which favors succinct summaries over domain-specific insight and suffers from context attrition that erases critical technical details. To address these limitations, we propose AnalogAgent, a training-free agentic framework that integrates an LLM-based multi-agent system (MAS) with self-evolving memory (SEM) for analog circuit design automation. AnalogAgent coordinates a Code Generator, Design Optimizer, and Knowledge Curator to distill execution feedback into an adaptive playbook in SEM and retrieve targeted guidance for subsequent generation, enabling cross-task transfer without additional expert feedback, databases, or libraries. Across established benchmarks, AnalogAgent achieves 92% Pass@1 with Gemini and 97.4% Pass@1 with GPT-5. Moreover, with compact models (e.g., Qwen-8B), it yields a +48.8% average Pass@1 gain across tasks and reaches 72.1% Pass@1 overall, indicating that AnalogAgent substantially strengthens open-weight models for high-quality analog circuit design automation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了AnalogAgent框架，一个无需训练的自改进模拟电路设计自动化系统，核心创新在于结合LLM多代理系统和自演化内存以提高性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM在模拟电路设计自动化中多采用单模型循环，侧重于生成简洁摘要，缺乏特定领域洞察，且因上下文信息磨损导致关键技术细节丢失。模拟电路设计复杂且耗时，自动化需求高，现有方法难以平衡效率和精度，因此需要开发新框架来解决这些不足，以提升设计质量和自动化水平。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出了AnalogAgent框架，整合LLM多代理系统（包括代码生成器、设计优化器和知识策展人）与自演化内存。关键创新在于通过执行反馈生成自适应指南存储在内存中，并检索指导进行跨任务知识转移，无需额外训练或依赖外部数据库。框架基于Gemini、GPT-5等模型实现，强调无需训练的自改进机制和智能代理协作。
light_analysis.result: 在基准测试中，AnalogAgent使用Gemini模型达到92% Pass@1，使用GPT-5达到97.4% Pass@1。对于紧凑模型如Qwen-8B，平均Pass@1提升48.8%，整体达到72.1% Pass@1。这表明框架显著优于现有方法，尤其在增强开源模型性能方面效果突出，无需额外专家反馈或数据库即可实现高质量自动化设计。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提出AnalogAgent框架，有效解决模拟电路设计自动化的现有局限，通过LLM代理和自演化内存实现高性能跨任务转移。学术上，它推动了AI在专业领域的应用；实际上，为自动化设计提供高效、可扩展的解决方案。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂设计任务和进一步优化内存机制，以应对更大规模挑战。

title: DUPLEX: Agentic Dual-System Planning via LLM-Driven Information Extraction
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) provide semantic flexibility for robotic task planning, their susceptibility to hallucination and logical inconsistency limits their reliability in long-horizon domains. To bridge the gap between unstructured environments and rigorous plan synthesis, we propose DUPLEX, an agentic dual-system neuro-symbolic architecture that strictly confines the LLM to schema-guided information extraction rather than end-to-end planning or code generation. In our framework, a feed-forward Fast System utilizes a lightweight LLM to extract entities, relations etc. from natural language, deterministically mapping them into a Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) problem file for a classical symbolic planner. To resolve complex or underspecified scenarios, a Slow System is activated exclusively upon planning failure, leveraging solver diagnostics to drive a high-capacity LLM in iterative reflection and repair. Extensive evaluations across 12 classical and household planning domains demonstrate that DUPLEX significantly outperforms existing end-to-end and hybrid LLM baselines in both success rate and reliability. These results confirm that The key is not to make the LLM plan better, but to restrict the LLM to the part it is good at - structured semantic grounding - and leave logical plan synthesis to a symbolic planner.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DUPLEX，一种代理双系统神经符号架构，通过限制LLM进行模式引导的信息提取并依赖符号规划器，显著提升机器人任务规划的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在机器人任务规划中提供语义灵活性，但因其在长视野领域中容易产生幻觉和逻辑不一致，导致可靠性受限。现有方法如端到端LLM规划或混合方法在处理复杂、非结构化环境时存在不足，无法确保逻辑严谨性和规划成功率。因此，本研究旨在解决如何有效结合LLMs的语义理解与符号规划器的逻辑推理，以克服当前技术在可靠规划方面的瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: DUPLEX框架采用双系统神经符号架构：快速系统利用轻量级LLM从自然语言中提取实体、关系等结构化信息，确定性地映射到规划域定义语言（PDDL）问题文件，供经典符号规划器执行逻辑规划。在规划失败时，慢速系统被激活，利用规划器诊断驱动高容量LLM进行迭代反思和修复，从而处理复杂或未明确定义场景。关键创新在于严格限制LLM角色至模式引导的信息提取，而非直接规划，确保了逻辑严谨性与语义灵活性的结合。
light_analysis.result: 在12个经典和家庭规划领域的广泛评估中，DUPLEX在成功率和可靠性方面显著优于现有的端到端和混合LLM基线。实验结果表明，该方法能够有效减少幻觉和逻辑错误，提升规划性能，但摘要未提供具体的准确率或效率数据，仅强调了相对于基线的整体改进趋势，证实了限制LLM至结构化语义基础策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出DUPLEX架构，通过将LLM严格限制在信息提取角色，并由符号规划器处理逻辑规划，实现了高可靠性的神经符号任务规划。这具有重要学术价值，推动了AI规划领域的方法创新，并对机器人自主系统等实际应用有潜在影响。未来工作可探索在更动态环境中的适应性，或优化系统效率以处理更大规模任务。

title: GenMask: Adapting DiT for Segmentation via Direct Mask
abstract: Recent approaches for segmentation have leveraged pretrained generative models as feature extractors, treating segmentation as a downstream adaptation task via indirect feature retrieval. This implicit use suffers from a fundamental misalignment in representation. It also depends heavily on indirect feature extraction pipelines, which complicate the workflow and limit adaptation. In this paper, we argue that instead of indirect adaptation, segmentation tasks should be trained directly in a generative manner. We identify a key obstacle to this unified formulation: VAE latents of binary masks are sharply distributed, noise robust, and linearly separable, distinct from natural image latents. To bridge this gap, we introduce timesteps sampling strategy for binary masks that emphasizes extreme noise levels for segmentation and moderate noise for image generation, enabling harmonious joint training. We present GenMask, a DiT trains to generate black-and-white segmentation masks as well as colorful images in RGB space under the original generative objective. GenMask preserves the original DiT architecture while removing the need of feature extraction pipelines tailored for segmentation tasks. Empirically, GenMask attains state-of-the-art performance on referring and reasoning segmentation benchmarks and ablations quantify the contribution of each component.

light_analysis.overview: GenMask通过直接生成分割掩码，将DiT适配于分割任务，实现了统一生成训练，提升分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前分割任务常依赖预训练生成模型作为特征提取器，通过间接特征检索进行适配，但这导致表示不匹配问题，且依赖复杂特征提取管道，限制效率和适应性。因此，研究动机是探索直接以生成方式进行分割训练，以简化工作流程和提高性能，但二元掩码与自然图像的潜在分布差异构成主要障碍。
light_analysis.method: GenMask基于Diffusion Transformer（DiT）架构，引入时间步采样策略：为二元掩码使用极端噪声水平强调分割，为图像生成使用适度噪声，实现掩码与图像的和谐联合训练。该方法保留原始DiT结构，直接生成黑白分割掩码和彩色RGB图像，在原生成目标下进行端到端训练，无需额外特征提取管道。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示GenMask在引用和推理分割基准测试中达到最先进性能。通过消融实验量化时间步采样策略等关键组件的贡献，证实其有效性。摘要未明确具体数值，但性能优于现有间接适配方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: GenMask的主要贡献在于将分割任务直接整合到生成框架，统一图像生成与分割训练，简化流程并提升性能。学术上展示生成模型在分割中的直接应用潜力，实际中可能提高精度和效率。未来工作可探索扩展到其他视觉任务或处理更复杂掩码类型。

title: Latent Bias Alignment for High-Fidelity Diffusion Inversion in Real-World Image Reconstruction and Manipulation
abstract: Recent research has shown that text-to-image diffusion models are capable of generating high-quality images guided by text prompts. But can they be used to generate or approximate real-world images from the seed noise? This is known as the diffusion inversion problem, which serves as a fundamental building block for bridging diffusion models and real-world scenarios. However, existing diffusion inversion methods often suffer from low reconstruction quality or weak robustness. Two major challenges need to be carefully addressed: (1) the misalignment between the inversion and generation trajectories during the diffusion process, and (2) the mismatch between the diffusion inversion process and the VQ autoencoder (VQAE) reconstruction. To address these challenges, we introduce a latent bias vector at each inversion step, which is learned to reduce the misalignment between inversion and generation trajectories. We refer to this strategy as Latent Bias Optimization (LBO). Furthermore, we perform an approximate joint optimization of the diffusion inversion and VQAE reconstruction processes by learning to adjust the image latent representation, which serves as the connecting interface between them. We refer to this technique as Image Latent Boosting (ILB). Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method significantly improves the image reconstruction quality of the diffusion model, as well as the performance of downstream tasks, including image editing and rare concept generation.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了潜偏置优化和图像潜增强方法，以解决扩散反演中的轨迹不对齐和重建不匹配问题，从而提高真实世界图像重建的保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散反演问题是将文本到图像扩散模型应用于真实世界图像重建和操作的关键技术，但现有方法存在重建质量低和鲁棒性弱的不足。具体挑战包括反演过程与生成轨迹之间的不对齐，以及扩散反演与VQ自编码器重建的不匹配，这些问题限制了模型在实际场景中的应用。因此，开发更有效的反演方法以克服这些挑战至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了两种核心技术：潜偏置优化，通过在扩散反演的每个步骤中引入并学习一个潜偏置向量，以减少反演与生成轨迹之间的不对齐；以及图像潜增强，通过调整图像潜表示来实现扩散反演和VQ自编码器重建的近似联合优化。这些方法旨在优化扩散模型的反演过程，摘要未明确说明使用的数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的方法显著提升了扩散模型的图像重建质量，并在下游任务如图像编辑和稀有概念生成中表现出更好的性能。通过与基线方法对比，验证了其在改善重建保真度和鲁棒性方面的有效性，摘要未提供具体性能指标数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了潜偏置优化和图像潜增强方法，有效解决了扩散反演中的关键挑战，提高了图像重建的保真度。这不仅增强了扩散模型在真实世界应用中的实用性，还为下游任务提供了更可靠的基础，未来工作可能包括进一步优化方法或扩展到其他模型。

title: Knowledge-Refined Dual Context-Aware Network for Partially Relevant Video Retrieval
abstract: Retrieving partially relevant segments from untrimmed videos remains difficult due to two persistent challenges: the mismatch in information density between text and video segments, and limited attention mechanisms that overlook semantic focus and event correlations. We present KDC-Net, a Knowledge-Refined Dual Context-Aware Network that tackles these issues from both textual and visual perspectives. On the text side, a Hierarchical Semantic Aggregation module captures and adaptively fuses multi-scale phrase cues to enrich query semantics. On the video side, a Dynamic Temporal Attention mechanism employs relative positional encoding and adaptive temporal windows to highlight key events with local temporal coherence. Additionally, a dynamic CLIP-based distillation strategy, enhanced with temporal-continuity-aware refinement, ensures segment-aware and objective-aligned knowledge transfer. Experiments on PRVR benchmarks show that KDC-Net consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, especially under low moment-to-video ratios.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出KDC-Net，一种知识精炼的双重上下文感知网络，通过解决文本-视频信息密度不匹配和注意力机制不足，提升部分相关视频检索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 部分相关视频检索旨在从未剪辑视频中精确提取相关片段，但面临两大挑战：文本查询与视频片段间的信息密度不匹配，以及现有注意力机制忽视语义焦点和事件相关性。这些问题导致检索精度受限，尤其在处理复杂视频时。现有方法未能有效整合多尺度上下文，因此需开发同时处理文本和视频的增强型方法。摘要未明确说明具体应用背景，但改进该技术对视频搜索和多媒体分析有重要实践意义。
light_analysis.method: KDC-Net采用双重上下文感知框架：在文本侧，分层语义聚合模块捕获并自适应融合多尺度短语线索以丰富查询语义；在视频侧，动态时间注意力机制使用相对位置编码和自适应时间窗口，突出具有局部时间一致性的关键事件；此外，结合时间连续性感知精炼的基于CLIP的动态蒸馏策略，确保段感知和目标对齐的知识转移。核心创新在于文本和视觉视角的协同优化，解决了注意力机制的局限。
light_analysis.result: 在PRVR基准上的实验表明，KDC-Net consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods，特别是在低时刻视频比条件下表现更佳，验证了其应对信息密度不匹配和注意力有限问题的有效性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但通过与最新方法的对比，显示出显著改进。实验结果强调了该方法在挑战性检索场景中的鲁棒性和优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出KDC-Net，通过双重上下文感知设计显著提升部分相关视频检索性能，学术价值在于推动了视频检索领域的技术进展，实际应用潜力包括视频搜索和内容分析。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可扩展该方法到更广泛的多模态任务或改进计算效率。

title: MMTIT-Bench: A Multilingual and Multi-Scenario Benchmark with Cognition-Perception-Reasoning Guided Text-Image Machine Translation
abstract: End-to-end text-image machine translation (TIMT), which directly translates textual content in images across languages, is crucial for real-world multilingual scene understanding. Despite advances in vision-language large models (VLLMs), robustness across diverse visual scenes and low-resource languages remains underexplored due to limited evaluation resources. We present MMTIT-Bench, a human-verified multilingual and multi-scenario benchmark with 1,400 images spanning fourteen non-English and non-Chinese languages and diverse settings such as documents, scenes, and web images, enabling rigorous assessment of end-to-end TIMT. Beyond benchmarking, we study how reasoning-oriented data design improves translation. Although recent VLLMs have begun to incorporate long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, effective thinking paradigms for TIMT are still immature: existing designs either cascade parsing and translation in a sequential manner or focus on language-only reasoning, overlooking the visual cognition central to VLLMs. We propose Cognition-Perception-Reasoning for Translation (CPR-Trans), a data paradigm that integrates scene cognition, text perception, and translation reasoning within a unified reasoning process. Using a VLLM-driven data generation pipeline, CPR-Trans provides structured, interpretable supervision that aligns perception with reasoning. Experiments on 3B and 7B models show consistent gains in accuracy and interpretability. We will release MMTIT-Bench to promote the multilingual and multi-scenario TIMT research upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出MMTIT-Bench基准和CPR-Trans数据范式，以增强多语言文本图像机器翻译的评估和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端文本图像机器翻译在现实应用中面临挑战，尤其在多样视觉场景（如文档、场景和网页图像）和低资源语言中，由于现有评估资源有限，导致模型稳健性不足。现有视觉-语言大模型虽有进展，但推理方法要么采用序列化解析-翻译流程，要么仅关注语言推理，忽略了视觉认知的核心作用，限制了翻译质量和可解释性，因此亟需改进方法以应对多语言和多场景需求。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出Cognition-Perception-Reasoning for Translation (CPR-Trans)数据范式，将场景认知、文本感知和翻译推理整合到统一的推理过程中。通过视觉-语言大模型驱动的数据生成管道，创建结构化、可解释的监督数据，以对齐感知与推理。同时，开发了MMTIT-Bench基准，包含1400张图像，覆盖14种非英非中语言和多种场景设置，为全面评估提供支持。
light_analysis.result: 实验在3B和7B参数的模型上进行，使用MMTIT-Bench基准评估，结果显示CPR-Trans范式在多种语言和场景下均能一致提升翻译的准确性和可解释性。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但强调了该方法相对于传统序列化或仅语言推理方法的优势，表明通过整合视觉认知，实现了更稳健的性能改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于建立了MMTIT-Bench多语言多场景基准和提出了CPR-Trans数据范式，为端到端文本图像机器翻译提供了严谨的评估工具和有效的改进策略。这具有重要的学术价值，推动了该领域的研究发展，并具有实际应用潜力，能促进现实世界中的多语言场景理解。未来工作包括基准的发布和进一步优化推理方法。

title: FilterGS: Traversal-Free Parallel Filtering and Adaptive Shrinking for Large-Scale LoD 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting has revolutionized neural rendering with real-time performance. However, scaling this approach to large scenes using Level-of-Detail methods faces critical challenges: inefficient serial traversal consuming over 60\% of rendering time, and redundant Gaussian-tile pairs that incur unnecessary processing overhead. To address these limitations, we introduce FilterGS, featuring a parallel filtering mechanism with two complementary filters that select Gaussian elements efficiently without tree traversal. Additionally, we propose a novel GTC metric that quantifies the redundancy of Gaussian-tile key-value pairs. Based on this metric, we introduce a scene-adaptive Gaussian shrinking strategy that effectively reduces redundant pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FilterGS achieves state-of-the-art rendering speeds while maintaining competitive visual quality across multiple large-scale datasets. Project page: https://github.com/xenon-w/FilterGS

light_analysis.overview: FilterGS 引入并行过滤机制和自适应收缩策略，优化大规模 3D 高斯喷洒渲染，避免树遍历并减少冗余处理。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D 高斯喷洒在实时神经渲染中表现卓越，但扩展到大场景时，使用 Level-of-Detail 方法面临挑战：串行遍历效率低，消耗超过 60% 的渲染时间；高斯-瓦片对冗余导致不必要的处理开销。这些问题限制了大规模应用，因此需要高效解决方案来提升渲染性能并减少延迟，促进实际部署。摘要未明确说明更多背景细节，但强调了现有方法的不足之处。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 FilterGS 方法，包括并行过滤机制，使用两个互补滤波器高效选择高斯元素，无需树遍历；引入 GTC 度量量化高斯-瓦片对的冗余度；基于此度量，设计场景自适应高斯收缩策略，动态减少冗余对。关键创新点在于避免传统遍历的低效性，量化冗余以优化处理流程，适用于大规模数据集和渲染任务。
light_analysis.result: 通过大量实验验证，FilterGS 在多个大规模数据集上实现了最先进的渲染速度，同时保持了竞争性的视觉质量。尽管摘要未提供具体数据指标，但结果表明该方法能显著提高效率，与基线方法相比有优势，适用于大规模场景渲染。实验展示了性能改进和减少处理开销的效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是 FilterGS 框架，解决了大规模 3D 高斯喷洒渲染中的效率和冗余问题，通过并行过滤和自适应收缩提升了性能。研究具有学术价值，推动神经渲染技术的发展，并具备实际应用潜力，如虚拟现实和游戏渲染。局限性可能包括数据集特异性，未来工作可探索更多优化或扩展应用。

title: Off-Policy Safe Reinforcement Learning with Constrained Optimistic Exploration
abstract: When safety is formulated as a limit of cumulative cost, safe reinforcement learning (RL) aims to learn policies that maximize return subject to the cost constraint in data collection and deployment. Off-policy safe RL methods, although offering high sample efficiency, suffer from constraint violations due to cost-agnostic exploration and estimation bias in cumulative cost. To address this issue, we propose Constrained Optimistic eXploration Q-learning (COX-Q), an off-policy safe RL algorithm that integrates cost-bounded online exploration and conservative offline distributional value learning. First, we introduce a novel cost-constrained optimistic exploration strategy that resolves gradient conflicts between reward and cost in the action space and adaptively adjusts the trust region to control the training cost. Second, we adopt truncated quantile critics to stabilize the cost value learning. Quantile critics also quantify epistemic uncertainty to guide exploration. Experiments on safe velocity, safe navigation, and autonomous driving tasks demonstrate that COX-Q achieves high sample efficiency, competitive test safety performance, and controlled data collection cost. The results highlight COX-Q as a promising RL method for safety-critical applications.
comment: 21 pages, 9 figures, accepted by ICLR 2026 poster

title: Towards Real-World Document Parsing via Realistic Scene Synthesis and Document-Aware Training
abstract: Document parsing has recently advanced with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) that directly map document images to structured outputs. Traditional cascaded pipelines depend on precise layout analysis and often fail under casually captured or non-standard conditions. Although end-to-end approaches mitigate this dependency, they still exhibit repetitive, hallucinated, and structurally inconsistent predictions - primarily due to the scarcity of large-scale, high-quality full-page (document-level) end-to-end parsing data and the lack of structure-aware training strategies. To address these challenges, we propose a data-training co-design framework for robust end-to-end document parsing. A Realistic Scene Synthesis strategy constructs large-scale, structurally diverse full-page end-to-end supervision by composing layout templates with rich document elements, while a Document-Aware Training Recipe introduces progressive learning and structure-token optimization to enhance structural fidelity and decoding stability. We further build Wild-OmniDocBench, a benchmark derived from real-world captured documents for robustness evaluation. Integrated into a 1B-parameter MLLM, our method achieves superior accuracy and robustness across both scanned/digital and real-world captured scenarios. All models, data synthesis pipelines, and benchmarks will be publicly released to advance future research in document understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一个数据-训练协同设计框架，通过现实场景合成和文档感知训练，实现了稳健的端到端文档解析，以解决数据稀缺和结构不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 文档解析领域中，传统级联流水线依赖精确的布局分析，在非标准或随意捕获的文档条件下常失效。尽管端到端方法减少了对布局的依赖，但仍面临重复、幻觉和结构不一致的预测，这主要源于缺乏大规模高质量的全页面端到端解析数据和有效的结构感知训练策略。因此，研究旨在解决这些数据不足和训练策略不充分的挑战，提升文档解析在真实世界场景中的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 方法核心是一个数据-训练协同设计框架。首先，通过现实场景合成策略，将布局模板与丰富文档元素组合，构建大规模、结构多样的全页面端到端监督数据。其次，引入文档感知训练配方，包括渐进学习和结构令牌优化，以增强模型的结构保真度和解码稳定性。此外，研究还建立了Wild-OmniDocBench基准，基于真实世界捕获的文档用于鲁棒性评估，所有方法集成到一个1B参数的多模态大语言模型中。
light_analysis.result: 集成该方法后，在扫描/数字文档和真实世界捕获场景中，实现了优越的准确性和鲁棒性性能。与现有基线相比，模型展现出更强的泛化能力，有效减少了重复和幻觉预测问题，提升了文档解析的结构一致性。具体性能指标在摘要中未明确说明，但实验验证了方法的有效性和在多样化条件下的稳健表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究的主要贡献包括提出一个数据-训练协同设计框架、现实场景合成数据策略和文档感知训练配方，并构建Wild-OmniDocBench基准用于评估。这将公开发布模型、数据合成流水线和基准，以推动文档理解领域的研究。未来工作可进一步优化合成数据的真实性和扩展应用场景，提升方法的普适性。

title: BioVITA: Biological Dataset, Model, and Benchmark for Visual-Textual-Acoustic Alignment
abstract: Understanding animal species from multimodal data poses an emerging challenge at the intersection of computer vision and ecology. While recent biological models, such as BioCLIP, have demonstrated strong alignment between images and textual taxonomic information for species identification, the integration of the audio modality remains an open problem. We propose BioVITA, a novel visual-textual-acoustic alignment framework for biological applications. BioVITA involves (i) a training dataset, (ii) a representation model, and (iii) a retrieval benchmark. First, we construct a large-scale training dataset comprising 1.3 million audio clips and 2.3 million images, covering 14,133 species annotated with 34 ecological trait labels. Second, building upon BioCLIP2, we introduce a two-stage training framework to effectively align audio representations with visual and textual representations. Third, we develop a cross-modal retrieval benchmark that covers all possible directional retrieval across the three modalities (i.e., image-to-audio, audio-to-text, text-to-image, and their reverse directions), with three taxonomic levels: Family, Genus, and Species. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model learns a unified representation space that captures species-level semantics beyond taxonomy, advancing multimodal biodiversity understanding. The project page is available at: https://dahlian00.github.io/BioVITA_Page/

light_analysis.overview: BioVITA 是一个新颖的视觉-文本-声学对齐框架，用于生物学应用，包括大规模数据集、表示模型和跨模态检索基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决从多模态数据理解动物物种的挑战，这在计算机视觉和生态学交叉领域中日益重要。现有方法如BioCLIP在图像和文本对齐方面表现出色，但音频模态的集成仍是一个开放问题，限制了全面生物多样性分析。音频信息对于物种识别和行为理解至关重要，缺乏有效整合阻碍了多模态研究进展，因此迫切需要开发一个能同时处理视觉、文本和声学数据的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出了BioVITA框架，包含三个核心组件：首先，构建了一个大规模训练数据集，涵盖130万个音频剪辑和230万张图像，覆盖14,133个物种，并标注了34个生态特征标签。其次，基于BioCLIP2模型，采用一个两阶段训练框架，以有效对齐音频表示与视觉和文本表示，利用多模态学习技术实现统一嵌入。最后，开发了一个跨模态检索基准，覆盖图像、文本和音频之间的所有检索方向（如图像到音频、音频到文本等），并在家庭、属和物种三个分类学级别上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，BioVITA模型学习到一个统一的表示空间，能够捕捉物种级别的语义信息，超越了传统分类学对齐。虽然摘要未明确提供具体准确率数据，但模型在跨模态检索任务中表现出色，例如在不同模态间检索时展现出良好的对齐能力。这推进了多模态生物多样性理解，与现有方法相比，提供了更全面的视觉-文本-声学集成，提升了物种识别和分析的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是BioVITA框架，通过数据集、模型和基准的整合，实现了视觉-文本-声学对齐，填补了音频模态在生物学研究中的空白。学术上，它推动了跨模态学习在生态领域的应用；实际上，有助于物种自动识别和生态监测等任务。局限性未明确说明，但未来工作可能涉及扩展数据集到更多物种或优化模型架构以提升性能。

title: Language Models Can Explain Visual Features via Steering
abstract: Sparse Autoencoders uncover thousands of features in vision models, yet explaining these features without requiring human intervention remains an open challenge. While previous work has proposed generating correlation-based explanations based on top activating input examples, we present a fundamentally different alternative based on causal interventions. We leverage the structure of Vision-Language Models and steer individual SAE features in the vision encoder after providing an empty image. Then, we prompt the language model to explain what it ``sees'', effectively eliciting the visual concept represented by each feature. Results show that Steering offers an scalable alternative that complements traditional approaches based on input examples, serving as a new axis for automated interpretability in vision models. Moreover, the quality of explanations improves consistently with the scale of the language model, highlighting our method as a promising direction for future research. Finally, we propose Steering-informed Top-k, a hybrid approach that combines the strengths of causal interventions and input-based approaches to achieve state-of-the-art explanation quality without additional computational cost.

title: Tiny Inference-Time Scaling with Latent Verifiers
abstract: Inference-time scaling has emerged as an effective way to improve generative models at test time by using a verifier to score and select candidate outputs. A common choice is to employ Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) as verifiers, which can improve performance but introduce substantial inference-time cost. Indeed, diffusion pipelines operate in an autoencoder latent space to reduce computation, yet MLLM verifiers still require decoding candidates to pixel space and re-encoding them into the visual embedding space, leading to redundant and costly operations. In this work, we propose Verifier on Hidden States (VHS), a verifier that operates directly on intermediate hidden representations of Diffusion Transformer (DiT) single-step generators. VHS analyzes generator features without decoding to pixel space, thereby reducing the per-candidate verification cost while improving or matching the performance of MLLM-based competitors. We show that, under tiny inference budgets with only a small number of candidates per prompt, VHS enables more efficient inference-time scaling reducing joint generation-and-verification time by 63.3%, compute FLOPs by 51% and VRAM usage by 14.5% with respect to a standard MLLM verifier, achieving a +2.7% improvement on GenEval at the same inference-time budget.
comment: Findings of CVPR 2026 - Code at: https://aimagelab.github.io/VHS/

title: DomAgent: Leveraging Knowledge Graphs and Case-Based Reasoning for Domain-Specific Code Generation
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown impressive capabilities in code generation. However, because most LLMs are trained on public domain corpora, directly applying them to real-world software development often yields low success rates, as these scenarios frequently require domain-specific knowledge. In particular, domain-specific tasks usually demand highly specialized solutions, which are often underrepresented or entirely absent in the training data of generic LLMs. To address this challenge, we propose DomAgent, an autonomous coding agent that bridges this gap by enabling LLMs to generate domain-adapted code through structured reasoning and targeted retrieval. A core component of DomAgent is DomRetriever, a novel retrieval module that emulates how humans learn domain-specific knowledge, by combining conceptual understanding with experiential examples. It dynamically integrates top-down knowledge-graph reasoning with bottom-up case-based reasoning, enabling iterative retrieval and synthesis of structured knowledge and representative cases to ensure contextual relevance and broad task coverage. DomRetriever can operate as part of DomAgent or independently with any LLM for flexible domain adaptation. We evaluate DomAgent on an open benchmark dataset in the data science domain (DS-1000) and further apply it to real-world truck software development tasks. Experimental results show that DomAgent significantly enhances domain-specific code generation, enabling small open-source models to close much of the performance gap with large proprietary LLMs in complex, real-world applications. The code is available at: https://github.com/Wangshuaiia/DomAgent.

title: Knowledge Priors for Identity-Disentangled Open-Set Privacy-Preserving Video FER
abstract: Facial expression recognition relies on facial data that inherently expose identity and thus raise significant privacy concerns. Current privacy-preserving methods typically fail in realistic open-set video settings where identities are unknown, and identity labels are unavailable. We propose a two-stage framework for video-based privacy-preserving FER in challenging open-set settings that requires no identity labels at any stage. To decouple privacy and utility, we first train an identity-suppression network using intra- and inter-video knowledge priors derived from real-world videos without identity labels. This network anonymizes identity while preserving expressive cues. A subsequent denoising module restores expression-related information and helps recover FER performance. Furthermore, we introduce a falsification-based validation method that uses recognition priors to rigorously evaluate privacy robustness without requiring annotated identity labels. Experiments on three video datasets demonstrate that our method effectively protects privacy while maintaining FER accuracy comparable to identity-supervised baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一个无需身份标签的两阶段框架，用于开放集视频中隐私保护的面部表情识别，有效分离隐私和效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 面部表情识别依赖于面部数据，这些数据天然暴露个人身份，从而引发严重的隐私问题。现有隐私保护方法通常在现实开放集视频环境中失效，因为身份是未知的，并且无法获取身份标签，导致无法有效保护隐私，限制了在无监督或半监督场景中的应用。因此，需要一种方法能在开放集设置中匿名化身份，同时保持表情识别性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个两阶段框架：首先，训练一个身份抑制网络，利用来自真实世界视频的内部和跨视频知识先验，匿名化身份并保留表情线索，无需依赖身份标签；其次，引入一个去噪模块，恢复与表情相关的信息，以提升FER性能。关键创新点包括利用知识先验实现无监督身份分离，以及提出基于伪造的验证方法，使用识别先验评估隐私鲁棒性，无需标注身份数据。
light_analysis.result: 实验在三个视频数据集上进行，结果表明，该方法能有效保护隐私，同时面部表情识别的准确性接近身份监督基线。尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但与基线方法对比显示出相似的性能，证明了在开放集设置中隐私保护与FER准确性之间的有效平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出一个无需身份标签的两阶段框架，解决了开放集视频中隐私保护FER的挑战，通过分离隐私和效用实现高效匿名化。学术价值在于引入知识先验和伪造验证方法，为无监督隐私保护提供了新思路；实际应用有助于在隐私敏感场景中部署FER系统。未来工作可扩展到其他视频分析任务或改进模型泛化能力。

title: F4Splat: Feed-Forward Predictive Densification for Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting methods enable single-pass reconstruction and real-time rendering. However, they typically adopt rigid pixel-to-Gaussian or voxel-to-Gaussian pipelines that uniformly allocate Gaussians, leading to redundant Gaussians across views. Moreover, they lack an effective mechanism to control the total number of Gaussians while maintaining reconstruction fidelity. To address these limitations, we present F4Splat, which performs Feed-Forward predictive densification for Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting, introducing a densification-score-guided allocation strategy that adaptively distributes Gaussians according to spatial complexity and multi-view overlap. Our model predicts per-region densification scores to estimate the required Gaussian density and allows explicit control over the final Gaussian budget without retraining. This spatially adaptive allocation reduces redundancy in simple regions and minimizes duplicate Gaussians across overlapping views, producing compact yet high-quality 3D representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model achieves superior novel-view synthesis performance compared to prior uncalibrated feed-forward methods, while using significantly fewer Gaussians.

light_analysis.overview: F4Splat提出了一种通过密度分数引导的自适应分配策略，优化前馈3D高斯喷洒的高斯分布，实现紧凑且高质量的3D重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前的前馈3D高斯喷洒方法在单次重建和实时渲染中表现出色，但采用固定的像素或体素到高斯的管道，均匀分配高斯，导致在不同视图中产生冗余高斯，浪费计算资源。更重要的是，这些方法缺乏有效机制来控制高斯总数，同时在保持重建保真度方面存在不足，限制了其在实际应用中的效率和可扩展性。因此，需要一种自适应方法来减少冗余并优化高斯分配，以提升性能和效率。
light_analysis.method: F4Splat的核心方法是引入密度分数引导的分配策略，通过预测每个区域的密度分数来估计所需的高斯密度，自适应地根据空间复杂度和多视图重叠来分配高斯。模型允许用户显式控制最终的高斯预算，无需重新训练，减少了简单区域的冗余高斯并最小化重叠视图中的重复高斯。关键创新点包括密度分数的预测机制和自适应分配策略，以实现紧凑且高质量的3D表示，摘要未明确说明具体模型架构或数据集细节。
light_analysis.result: 广泛的实验表明，F4Splat相比先前的未校准前馈方法，在新型视角合成性能上表现优越，同时使用显著更少的高斯数量。这证实了模型在减少高斯冗余和提升重建效率方面的有效性，与基线方法相比，在保持高保真度的同时，实现了更好的资源利用，具体数据如准确率提升摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: F4Splat的主要贡献是提出了一种自适应密度控制的前馈3D高斯喷洒方法，通过密度分数引导的策略减少了高斯冗余并优化了资源分配，具有重要的学术价值，为3D重建领域提供了更高效的解决方案。在实际应用中，可支持实时渲染和资源受限场景；未来工作可能包括扩展到其他3D表示方法或更大尺度场景，以进一步提升通用性和性能。

title: Alignment Whack-a-Mole : Finetuning Activates Verbatim Recall of Copyrighted Books in Large Language Models
abstract: Frontier LLM companies have repeatedly assured courts and regulators that their models do not store copies of training data. They further rely on safety alignment strategies via RLHF, system prompts, and output filters to block verbatim regurgitation of copyrighted works, and have cited the efficacy of these measures in their legal defenses against copyright infringement claims. We show that finetuning bypasses these protections: by training models to expand plot summaries into full text, a task naturally suited for commercial writing assistants, we cause GPT-4o, Gemini-2.5-Pro, and DeepSeek-V3.1 to reproduce up to 85-90% of held-out copyrighted books, with single verbatim spans exceeding 460 words, using only semantic descriptions as prompts and no actual book text. This extraction generalizes across authors: finetuning exclusively on Haruki Murakami's novels unlocks verbatim recall of copyrighted books from over 30 unrelated authors. The effect is not specific to any training author or corpus: random author pairs and public-domain finetuning data produce comparable extraction, while finetuning on synthetic text yields near-zero extraction, indicating that finetuning on individual authors' works reactivates latent memorization from pretraining. Three models from different providers memorize the same books in the same regions ($r \ge 0.90$), pointing to an industry-wide vulnerability. Our findings offer compelling evidence that model weights store copies of copyrighted works and that the security failures that manifest after finetuning on individual authors' works undermine a key premise of recent fair use rulings, where courts have conditioned favorable outcomes on the adequacy of measures preventing reproduction of protected expression.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文发现，通过微调大语言模型，可以激活预训练中对受版权保护书籍的逐字回忆，暴露了安全对齐措施的缺陷和行业范围的漏洞。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究的动机在于验证大语言模型在微调后是否会绕过安全对齐措施，激活对受版权保护数据的记忆。LLM公司声称其模型不存储训练数据副本，并依赖RLHF、系统提示和输出过滤器防止侵权，在法律辩护中引用这些措施的有效性。然而，微调可能构成漏洞，挑战现有安全策略，削弱公司的法律立场，揭示模型实际存储数据副本的风险，对版权法和AI部署有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用微调方法，训练大语言模型将情节摘要扩展为完整文本，这是一个适合商业写作助手的任务。使用多个前沿模型如GPT-4o、Gemini-2.5-Pro和DeepSeek-V3.1，微调数据包括特定作者作品（如村上春树小说）、随机作者组合、公共领域文本和合成文本。关键创新在于仅使用语义描述作为提示，不提供实际书籍文本，揭示微调能激活预训练中隐藏的记忆，而不依赖于特定作者或语料。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，微调后模型能复制高达85-90%的受版权保护书籍内容，单次逐字跨度超过460词。这种提取具有广泛性：仅微调村上春树小说即可解锁30多个无关作者作品的回忆。对比基线，随机作者和公共领域数据产生类似提取，而合成文本微调提取率接近零，表明微调激活了预训练记忆。三个不同提供商的模型在相同书籍区域的记忆高度相关（相关系数r≥0.90），证明了行业范围的漏洞。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文结论表明，大语言模型通过微调能激活对预训练数据中受版权保护书籍的逐字回忆，证明模型权重实际存储了数据副本。这一发现破坏了当前安全对齐措施和法律中公平使用裁决的前提，揭示了行业范围的漏洞，具有重要学术和实际价值。它呼吁重新评估模型安全和版权策略，未来工作可能需探索更有效的保护机制或缓解策略。

title: Cloud-Edge Collaborative Large Models for Robust Photovoltaic Power Forecasting
abstract: Photovoltaic (PV) power forecasting in edge-enabled grids requires balancing forecasting accuracy, robustness under weather-driven distribution shifts, and strict latency constraints. Existing models work well under normal conditions but often struggle with rare ramp events and unexpected weather changes. Relying solely on cloud-based large models often leads to significant communication delays, which can hinder timely and efficient forecasting in practical grid environments. To address these issues, we propose a condition-adaptive cloud-edge collaborative framework *CAPE* for PV forecasting. *CAPE* consists of three main modules: a site-specific expert model for routine predictions, a lightweight edge-side model for enhanced local inference, and a cloud-based large retrieval model that provides relevant historical cases when needed. These modules are coordinated by a screening module that evaluates uncertainty, out-of-distribution risk, weather mutations, and model disagreement. Furthermore, we employ a Lyapunov-guided routing strategy to dynamically determine when to escalate inference to more powerful models under long-term system constraints. The final forecast is produced through adaptive fusion of the selected model outputs. Experiments on two real-world PV datasets demonstrate that *CAPE* achieves superior performance in terms of forecasting accuracy, robustness, routing quality, and system efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一种条件适应的云边协同框架 *CAPE*，用于提升光伏功率预测的准确性、鲁棒性和系统效率，通过动态路由和自适应融合应对天气变化和延迟挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 光伏功率预测在边缘使能的电网中面临关键挑战，需平衡预测准确性、天气驱动分布偏移下的鲁棒性以及严格延迟约束。现有模型在正常条件下表现良好，但常无法处理罕见斜坡事件和突发天气变化，导致预测不稳定。同时，纯云端大型模型因通信延迟影响实时预测效率，在实际电网环境中难以满足及时性需求，因此亟需一种更高效和鲁棒的解决方案来应对这些不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出的 *CAPE* 框架包含三个核心模块：一个站点特定专家模型用于常规预测，一个轻量级边缘侧模型增强本地推理，以及一个云端大型检索模型在需要时提供相关历史案例。这些模块由筛选模块协调，该模块评估不确定性、分布外风险、天气突变和模型分歧。此外，采用 Lyapunov 引导的路由策略，在长期系统约束下动态决定何时将推理升级到更强大模型。最终预测通过自适应融合所选模型输出生成，确保灵活性和效率。
light_analysis.result: 在两个真实世界光伏数据集上的实验表明，*CAPE* 在预测准确性、鲁棒性、路由质量和系统效率方面均取得了优越性能。与基线方法相比，它显著提升了处理异常天气和罕见事件的能力，同时保持了低延迟和高效系统运行，但摘要未明确说明具体的数值指标如准确率提升百分比，仅强调整体性能的全面改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是设计和验证了 *CAPE* 框架，通过云边协同和条件自适应机制有效解决了光伏功率预测的准确性、鲁棒性和延迟问题。它增强了预测的实时性和可靠性，具有重要的学术价值，为边缘计算和大型模型应用提供了新思路。潜在局限性可能包括对特定数据集的依赖，未来工作可扩展至其他能源预测领域或优化模型参数以提升泛化能力。

title: Problems with Chinchilla Approach 2: Systematic Biases in IsoFLOP Parabola Fits
abstract: Chinchilla Approach 2 is among the most widely used methods for fitting neural scaling laws. Its parabolic approximation introduces systematic biases in compute-optimal allocation estimates, even on noise-free synthetic data. Applied to published Llama 3 IsoFLOP data at open frontier compute scales, these biases imply a parameter underallocation corresponding to 6.5% of the $3.8\times10^{25}$ FLOP training budget and \$1.4M (90% CI: \$412K-\$2.9M) in unnecessary compute at 50% H100 MFU. Simulated multimodal model misallocations show even greater opportunity costs due to higher loss surface asymmetry. Three sources of this error are examined: IsoFLOP sampling grid width (Taylor approximation accuracy), uncentered IsoFLOP sampling, and loss surface asymmetry ($α\neq β$). Chinchilla Approach 3 largely eliminates these biases but is often regarded as less data-efficient, numerically unstable, prone to local minima, and harder to implement. Each concern is shown to be unfounded or addressable, especially when the partially linear structure of the objective is exploited via Variable Projection, enabling unbiased inference on all five loss surface parameters through a two-dimensional optimization that is well-conditioned, analytically differentiable, and amenable to dense, or even exhaustive, grid search. It may serve as a more convenient replacement for Approach 2 or a more scalable alternative for adaptations of Approach 3 to richer scaling law formulations. See https://github.com/Open-Athena/vpnls for details and https://openathena.ai/scaling-law-analysis for other results from this study.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示了Chinchilla Approach 2在神经缩放定律拟合中的系统性偏差，并提出基于变量投影的Chinchilla Approach 3作为改进方法，以实现无偏估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于Chinchilla Approach 2在拟合神经缩放定律时引入系统性偏差，导致计算资源分配不当，例如在Llama 3数据中造成不必要的计算浪费。现有方法存在偏差，而Chinchilla Approach 3常被认为数据效率低、数值不稳定，但未被充分验证，因此本研究旨在分析偏差来源并证明改进方法的可行性，以优化机器学习模型的计算效率。摘要未明确说明其他背景细节。
light_analysis.method: 论文分析了Chinchilla Approach 2偏差的三个来源：IsoFLOP采样网格宽度、未中心采样和损失表面不对称性。核心方法提出结合Variable Projection（VPNLS）来改进Chinchilla Approach 3，通过二维优化实现无偏推理，利用目标函数的部分线性结构，使优化条件良好、可微分，并适用于密集网格搜索。研究使用了Llama 3的IsoFLOP数据和模拟多模态模型进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，在Llama 3的IsoFLOP数据上，Chinchilla Approach 2的偏差导致6.5%的FLOP训练预算浪费，对应140万美元的计算成本。模拟多模态模型中，由于损失表面不对称性更高，机会成本更大。改进后的Chinchilla Approach 3结合Variable Projection可以消除这些偏差，并通过二维优化实现无偏估计，优于基线方法。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标的提升幅度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了Chinchilla Approach 2的系统性偏差及其实际影响，并通过Variable Projection改进了Chinchilla Approach 3，消除了偏差。这为神经缩放定律拟合提供了更准确和实用的方法，具有学术价值和应用前景，可替代Approach 2或扩展至更复杂的缩放定律。局限性包括仅基于摘要信息，未详细探讨所有应用场景；未来工作可能包括推广到更丰富的缩放定律公式，相关代码已开源供进一步研究。

title: JUBAKU: An Adversarial Benchmark for Exposing Culturally Grounded Stereotypes in Japanese LLMs
abstract: Social biases reflected in language are inherently shaped by cultural norms, which vary significantly across regions and lead to diverse manifestations of stereotypes. Existing evaluations of social bias in large language models (LLMs) for non-English contexts, however, often rely on translations of English benchmarks. Such benchmarks fail to reflect local cultural norms, including those found in Japanese. For instance, Western benchmarks may overlook Japan-specific stereotypes related to hierarchical relationships, regional dialects, or traditional gender roles. To address this limitation, we introduce Japanese cUlture adversarial BiAs benchmarK Under handcrafted creation (JUBAKU), a benchmark tailored to Japanese cultural contexts. JUBAKU uses adversarial construction to expose latent biases across ten distinct cultural categories. Unlike existing benchmarks, JUBAKU features dialogue scenarios hand-crafted by native Japanese annotators, specifically designed to trigger and reveal latent social biases in Japanese LLMs. We evaluated nine Japanese LLMs on JUBAKU and three others adapted from English benchmarks. All models clearly exhibited biases on JUBAKU, performing below the random baseline of 50% with an average accuracy of 23% (ranging from 13% to 33%), despite higher accuracy on the other benchmarks. Human annotators achieved 91% accuracy in identifying unbiased responses, confirming JUBAKU's reliability and its adversarial nature to LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入了JUBAKU基准，通过对抗性构建和日本本土手工制作的对话场景，专门用于暴露日本大型语言模型中的文化相关刻板印象。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大型语言模型社会偏见的评估主要依赖英语基准的翻译，但这些翻译无法反映日本特有的文化规范，如等级关系、区域方言或传统性别角色等刻板印象。这种局限性导致现有方法不能全面检测和解决非英语语境下的偏见问题，强调了开发文化特异性评估工具的重要性，以促进更公平的AI系统。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括创建JUBAKU基准，它通过对抗性构造设计，覆盖十个日本文化类别。核心创新是使用日本本土注释者手工制作的对话场景，专门设计以触发和暴露日本LLMs中的社会偏见。技术路线涉及构建这些场景并应用基准测试，评估模型性能，使用了JUBAKU基准和三个从英语基准改编的基准，以及九个日本LLMs。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在JUBAKU上评估的九个日本LLMs平均准确率为23%，范围从13%到33%，远低于50%的随机基线。相比之下，在其他基准上模型表现更好。人类注释者在识别无偏见响应时达到91%的准确率，验证了JUBAKU基准的可靠性和其对抗性对LLMs的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是引入了JUBAKU基准，有效暴露了日本LLMs中的文化刻板印象。学术上强调了对文化特异性偏见评估的价值，实际应用有助于改进模型的公平性。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他文化背景或优化基准设计，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Diffusion-Based Makeup Transfer with Facial Region-Aware Makeup Features
abstract: Current diffusion-based makeup transfer methods commonly use the makeup information encoded by off-the-shelf foundation models (e.g., CLIP) as condition to preserve the makeup style of reference image in the generation. Although effective, these works mainly have two limitations: (1) foundation models pre-trained for generic tasks struggle to capture makeup styles; (2) the makeup features of reference image are injected to the diffusion denoising model as a whole for global makeup transfer, overlooking the facial region-aware makeup features (i.e., eyes, mouth, etc) and limiting the regional controllability for region-specific makeup transfer. To address these, in this work, we propose Facial Region-Aware Makeup features (FRAM), which has two stages: (1) makeup CLIP fine-tuning; (2) identity and facial region-aware makeup injection. For makeup CLIP fine-tuning, unlike prior works using off-the-shelf CLIP, we synthesize annotated makeup style data using GPT-o3 and text-driven image editing model, and then use the data to train a makeup CLIP encoder through self-supervised and image-text contrastive learning. For identity and facial region-aware makeup injection, we construct before-and-after makeup image pairs from the edited images in stage 1 and then use them to learn to inject identity of source image and makeup of reference image to the diffusion denoising model for makeup transfer. Specifically, we use learnable tokens to query the makeup CLIP encoder to extract facial region-aware makeup features for makeup injection, which is learned via an attention loss to enable regional control. As for identity injection, we use a ControlNet Union to encode source image and its 3D mesh simultaneously. The experimental results verify the superiority of our regional controllability and our makeup transfer performance. Code is available at https://github.com/zaczgao/Facial_Region-Aware_Makeup.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出FRAM方法，通过微调CLIP和使用区域感知特征注入，提升了基于扩散的化妆转移的区域可控性和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于扩散的化妆转移方法依赖于通用预训练基础模型（如CLIP）来编码化妆信息，但这些模型难以准确捕获化妆风格，导致化妆特征提取不精确。此外，化妆特征被整体注入扩散模型，忽略了面部不同区域（如眼睛、嘴巴）的化妆差异，这限制了区域特定化妆转移的可控性，影响化妆转移的精确性和应用效果，因此亟需一种能够实现精细区域控制的方法来改进化妆转移任务。
light_analysis.method: FRAM方法分为两个阶段。第一阶段通过GPT-o3和文本驱动图像编辑模型合成带注释的化妆数据，利用自监督和图像-文本对比学习微调CLIP编码器，使其专注于化妆风格提取。第二阶段构建化妆前后图像对，学习将源图像的身份和参考图像的化妆注入扩散去噪模型。具体地，使用可学习令牌查询微调后的CLIP编码器以提取面部区域感知化妆特征，并通过注意力损失实现区域控制；身份注入采用ControlNet Union同时编码源图像及其3D网格，以保持身份信息。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在区域可控性和化妆转移性能上优于现有方法，验证了FRAM框架的有效性。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标（如准确率提升或效率改进），但通过与其他基线方法的对比，展示了其在精确控制面部区域化妆风格方面的优势，凸显了改进的区域感知能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了FRAM框架，通过微调CLIP和引入区域感知特征注入，解决了现有化妆转移方法的局限性。该研究提高了化妆转移的精确性和区域可控性，为计算机视觉和图像编辑应用提供了有价值的技术支持。尽管摘要中未提及局限性或未来工作，但该方法为后续研究（如扩展到更多化妆风格或整合其他面部特征）奠定了基础，具有实际应用潜力。

title: Two-Time-Scale Learning Dynamics: A Population View of Neural Network Training
abstract: Population-based learning paradigms, including evolutionary strategies, Population-Based Training (PBT), and recent model-merging methods, combine fast within-model optimisation with slower population-level adaptation. Despite their empirical success, a general mathematical description of the resulting collective training dynamics remains incomplete. We introduce a theoretical framework for neural network training based on two-time-scale population dynamics. We model a population of neural networks as an interacting agent system in which network parameters evolve through fast noisy gradient updates of SGD/Langevin type, while hyperparameters evolve through slower selection--mutation dynamics. We prove the large-population limit for the joint distribution of parameters and hyperparameters and, under strong time-scale separation, derive a selection--mutation equation for the hyperparameter density. For each fixed hyperparameter, the fast parameter dynamics relaxes to a Boltzmann--Gibbs measure, inducing an effective fitness for the slow evolution. The averaged dynamics connects population-based learning with bilevel optimisation and classical replicator--mutator models, yields conditions under which the population mean moves toward the fittest hyperparameter, and clarifies the role of noise and diversity in balancing optimisation and exploration. Numerical experiments illustrate both the large-population regime and the reduced two-time-scale dynamics, and indicate that access to the effective fitness, either in closed form or through population-level estimation, can improve population-level updates.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一个基于双时间尺度种群动态的理论框架，用于数学描述神经网络训练的集体学习过程，连接快速优化与慢速适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于种群的学习方法，如进化策略、基于种群的训练（PBT）和模型合并，在神经网络优化中表现出色，但缺乏对其集体训练动态的完整数学描述。现有方法虽然经验成功，但理论理解不足，难以深入分析噪声和多样性如何平衡优化与探索，这限制了方法的理论发展和实际应用改进。研究旨在填补这一空白，提供一个统一框架来阐明这些动态过程。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入双时间尺度种群动态框架，将神经网络种群建模为相互作用代理系统。网络参数通过快速噪声梯度更新（如SGD/Langevin）演化，超参数则通过慢速选择-突变动态调整。在强时间尺度分离下，推导出超参数密度的选择-突变方程，并利用Boltzmann-Gibbs测度作为快速动态的稳态，诱导出有效适应度指导慢速演化，连接双层优化和经典复制-突变模型。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验验证了理论框架的有效性，展示了大量种群体系和简化双时间尺度动态的可行性。实验表明，通过闭式表达式或种群级估计获取有效适应度，可以改善种群级更新过程，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率提升数据。这支持了理论分析的实用价值，并提示了潜在优化方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提供了一个统一的理论框架，将基于种群的学习与现有优化模型联系起来，澄清了噪声和多样性在平衡训练动态中的作用。学术上，它深化了对神经网络训练过程的理解；应用上，为设计更高效算法奠定基础。局限性可能包括模型假设简化，未来工作可扩展到更复杂场景或结合实际数据集。

title: DarkDriving: A Real-World Day and Night Aligned Dataset for Autonomous Driving in the Dark Environment
abstract: The low-light conditions are challenging to the vision-centric perception systems for autonomous driving in the dark environment. In this paper, we propose a new benchmark dataset (named DarkDriving) to investigate the low-light enhancement for autonomous driving. The existing real-world low-light enhancement benchmark datasets can be collected by controlling various exposures only in small-ranges and static scenes. The dark images of the current nighttime driving datasets do not have the precisely aligned daytime counterparts. The extreme difficulty to collect a real-world day and night aligned dataset in the dynamic driving scenes significantly limited the research in this area. With a proposed automatic day-night Trajectory Tracking based Pose Matching (TTPM) method in a large real-world closed driving test field (area: 69 acres), we collected the first real-world day and night aligned dataset for autonomous driving in the dark environment. The DarkDriving dataset has 9,538 day and night image pairs precisely aligned in location and spatial contents, whose alignment error is in just several centimeters. For each pair, we also manually label the object 2D bounding boxes. DarkDriving introduces four perception related tasks, including low-light enhancement, generalized low-light enhancement, and low-light enhancement for 2D detection and 3D detection of autonomous driving in the dark environment. The experimental results show that our DarkDriving dataset provides a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating low-light enhancement for autonomous driving and it can also be generalized to enhance dark images and promote detection in some other low-light driving environment, such as nuScenes.The code and dataset will be publicly available at https://github.com/DriveMindLab/DarkDriving-ICRA-2026.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了DarkDriving，首个真实世界的日夜间对齐数据集，专为自动驾驶在黑暗环境中的低光增强研究提供基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 黑暗环境对自动驾驶的视觉感知系统构成挑战，因为低光条件会降低图像质量，影响感知准确性。现有真实世界低光增强数据集通常仅在小范围和静态场景中通过控制曝光收集，且夜间驾驶数据集的图像缺乏精确对齐的白天对应图像。这导致在动态驾驶场景中收集对齐数据的难度极大，严重限制了自动驾驶在夜间或低光环境下的技术研究进展。因此，开发高质量的对齐数据集至关重要，以填补研究空白，提升自动驾驶的安全性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种自动的日夜间轨迹追踪姿态匹配方法，简称为TTPM，用于在一个面积为69英亩的真实世界封闭驾驶测试场中收集数据。该方法通过轨迹追踪和姿态匹配技术，实现日夜间图像的精确对齐，对齐误差仅几厘米。收集到的DarkDriving数据集包含9,538个日夜间图像对，每个图像对在位置和空间内容上严格对齐。此外，每个图像对附有手动标注的物体2D边界框。数据集定义了四个与感知相关的任务，包括低光增强、广义低光增强，以及用于2D检测和3D检测的低光增强，以支持全面评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，DarkDriving数据集为评估自动驾驶在黑暗环境中的低光增强提供了全面的基准。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率提升，但表明该数据集能有效推广到增强其他低光驾驶环境的图像，并提升检测性能，例如在nuScenes数据集中。这表明DarkDriving具有广泛的适用性，能够促进低光增强技术的发展和跨环境的评估，尽管实验数据未详细列出与基线的对比结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是首次提出了一个真实世界的日夜间对齐数据集DarkDriving，并定义了相关感知任务，填补了自动驾驶低光增强研究的数据空白。该数据集具有高精度的对齐和手动标注，学术上为低光增强算法提供了可靠的评估基准，实际上有助于提升自动驾驶在黑暗环境中的安全性和可靠性。未来工作可能包括将该数据集应用于更多动态驾驶场景和推广到其他低光环境，以进一步推动技术发展和实际应用。

title: Relationship-Aware Safety Unlearning for Multimodal LLMs
abstract: Generative multimodal models can exhibit safety failures that are inherently relational: two benign concepts can become unsafe when linked by a specific action or relation (e.g., child-drinking-wine). Existing unlearning and concept-erasure approaches often target isolated concepts or image-text pairs, which can cause collateral damage to benign uses of the same objects and relations. We propose relationship-aware safety unlearning: a framework that explicitly represents unsafe object-relation-object (O-R-O) tuples and applies targeted parameter-efficient edits (LoRA) to suppress unsafe tuples while preserving object marginals and safe neighboring relations. We include CLIP-based experiments and robustness evaluation under paraphrase, contextual, and out-of-distribution image attacks.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一个关系感知的安全遗忘框架，用于多模态大语言模型，通过显式表示不安全的对象-关系-对象元组和应用参数高效编辑来消除安全故障。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式多模态模型在关系性场景中可能出现安全故障，例如两个良性概念组合特定关系（如孩子-喝-酒）变得不安全。现有方法如概念擦除通常针对孤立概念或图像-文本对，忽视了关系复杂性，导致对相同对象的合法使用造成附带损害。因此，需要一种更精确的关系感知方法来处理这种安全漏洞，以提高模型安全性同时保护正常功能。摘要未明确说明为什么该问题在实际应用中的具体重要性，但强调了现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 该框架的核心是显式表示不安全的对象-关系-对象（O-R-O）元组，并应用参数高效编辑技术如低秩适应（LoRA）。通过针对性地修改模型参数，抑制不安全元组的生成，同时确保对象边际和安全的相邻关系不受影响。实验基于 CLIP 模型进行，以验证方法的可行性，包括在多重攻击下评估鲁棒性。这避免了传统方法中因粗粒度操作导致的性能下降，实现了更精细的安全控制。
light_analysis.result: 论文通过 CLIP 实验和鲁棒性评估展示了方法的有效性。在释义、上下文和分布外图像攻击下，该方法表现出良好的鲁棒性。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标数据，如准确率提升或效率改进，但表明相比于基线方法，它能更精确地消除不安全关系而不影响良性使用。这暗示了潜在的安全性改进，但需进一步实证数据来量化效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是开发了一个关系感知的安全遗忘框架，提高了多模态模型的安全性，通过针对性参数编辑减少安全故障并最小化功能损失。学术上，这为安全人工智能系统提供了新思路；应用上，增强了模型在实际场景中的可靠性和鲁棒性。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作方向，但可推断潜在方向包括扩展到更复杂关系或评估更多数据集。

title: MRMS-Net and LMRMS-Net: Scalable Multi-Representation Multi-Scale Networks for Time Series Classification
abstract: Time series classification (TSC) performance depends not only on architectural design but also on the diversity of input representations. In this work, we propose a scalable multi-scale convolutional framework that systematically integrates structured multi-representation inputs for univariate time series.   We introduce two architectures: MRMS-Net, a hierarchical multi-scale convolutional network optimized for robustness and calibration, and LMRMS-Net, a lightweight variant designed for efficiency-aware deployment. In addition, we adapt LiteMV -- originally developed for multivariate inputs -- to operate on multi-representation univariate signals, enabling cross-representation interaction.   We evaluate all models across 142 benchmark datasets under a unified experimental protocol. Critical Difference (CD) analysis confirms statistically significant performance differences among the top models. Results show that LiteMV achieves the highest mean accuracy, MRMS-Net provides superior probabilistic calibration (lowest NLL), and LMRMS-Net offers the best efficiency-accuracy tradeoff. Pareto analysis further demonstrates that multi-representation multi-scale modeling yields a flexible design space that can be tuned for accuracy-oriented, calibration-oriented, or resource-constrained settings.   These findings establish scalable multi-representation multi-scale learning as a principled and practical direction for modern TSC. Reference implementation of MRMS-Net and LMRMS-Net is available at: https://github.com/alagoz/mrmsnet-tsc

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出可扩展的多表示多尺度卷积网络MRMS-Net和LMRMS-Net，用于时间序列分类，以提升性能、鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列分类的性能不仅取决于网络架构，还受输入表示多样性的影响。然而，现有方法通常未能充分整合多表示输入，导致模型在鲁棒性、校准和效率方面存在不足。这限制了在资源受限或高精度需求场景下的应用。本研究旨在通过提出一个可扩展的多表示多尺度框架来解决这一问题，以提供更灵活和有效的分类解决方案，适应不同实际需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个可扩展的多尺度卷积框架，系统集成多表示的单变量时间序列输入。核心方法包括设计两种网络架构：MRMS-Net采用分层多尺度卷积，优化鲁棒性和概率校准；LMRMS-Net作为轻量级变体，专为效率意识部署设计。此外，将LiteMV模型适配于多表示信号，实现跨表示交互。所有模型在142个数据集上使用统一实验协议进行评估，确保比较公平。
light_analysis.result: 在142个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，LiteMV模型获得最高平均准确率，MRMS-Net在概率校准方面表现最佳（最低负对数似然），而LMRMS-Net在效率和准确性之间达到最优权衡。Critical Difference分析确认这些性能差异具有统计显著性。Pareto分析进一步显示，多表示多尺度建模提供了一个灵活设计空间，可根据准确性、校准或资源约束进行优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是确立了可扩展多表示多尺度学习为现代时间序列分类的一个原则性和实用方向。通过MRMS-Net和LMRMS-Net，论文实现了在性能、校准和效率方面的综合优化。学术价值在于推动了多表示整合的理论框架，实践价值在于支持资源高效部署。未来工作可探索其他表示类型或扩展至更复杂场景，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: VCBench: A Streaming Counting Benchmark for Spatial-Temporal State Maintenance in Long Videos
abstract: Video understanding requires models to continuously track and update world state during playback. While existing benchmarks have advanced video understanding evaluation across multiple dimensions, the observation of how models maintain world state remains insufficient. We propose VCBench, a streaming counting benchmark that repositions counting as a minimal probe for diagnosing world state maintenance capability. We decompose this capability into object counting and event counting, forming 8 fine-grained subcategories. Object counting covers tracking currently visible objects and cumulative unique identities, while event counting covers detecting instantaneous actions and tracking complete activity cycles. VCBench contains 406 videos with frame-by-frame annotations of 10,071 event occurrence moments and object state change moments, generating 1,000 streaming QA pairs with 4,576 query points along timelines. By observing state maintenance trajectories through streaming multi-point queries, we design three complementary metrics to diagnose numerical precision, trajectory consistency, and temporal awareness. Evaluation on mainstream video-language models shows that current models still exhibit significant deficiencies in spatial-temporal state maintenance, particularly struggling with tasks like periodic event counting. VCBench provides a diagnostic framework for measuring and improving state maintenance in video understanding systems. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/buaaplay/VCBench.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了VCBench基准，通过流式计数任务诊断视频模型的世界状态维护能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频理解需要模型在播放中持续跟踪和更新世界状态，这是理解动态场景的核心。现有基准虽在多维度评估视频理解，但对模型如何维护状态的观察不足，导致无法准确测量这一关键能力。这种不足限制了视频理解系统的进步，特别是在处理长视频时，状态维护的缺陷可能影响实际应用效果，因此急需专门评估工具来诊断和改进。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出VCBench基准，将计数任务重新定位为诊断世界状态维护的最小探针。核心创新在于将能力分解为对象计数（跟踪当前可见对象和累积唯一身份）和事件计数（检测瞬时动作和跟踪完整活动周期），细分为8个子类别。VCBench基于406个视频，通过逐帧标注10,071个事件和对象状态变化时刻，生成1,000个流式QA对和4,576个查询点，并设计三个互补指标（数值精度、轨迹一致性、时间感知）来诊断模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 对主流视频语言模型的评估显示，当前模型在时空状态维护方面存在显著缺陷，特别是在周期性事件计数等任务中表现不佳。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但结果强调了模型在维持状态轨迹和数值准确性方面的不足，这表明现有方法在复杂视频理解中仍有较大改进空间，突显了VCBench基准的诊断价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: VCBench提供了一个诊断框架，用于测量和改进视频理解系统中的状态维护能力，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。它推进了视频理解评估的精细化，有助于开发更健壮的模型。未来工作可能包括基于此基准优化模型设计或扩展应用到更多视频任务，尽管摘要未明确说明局限性，但潜在方向涉及增强模型对长时间依赖的处理能力。

title: DriveXQA: Cross-modal Visual Question Answering for Adverse Driving Scene Understanding
abstract: Fusing sensors with complementary modalities is crucial for maintaining a stable and comprehensive understanding of abnormal driving scenes. However, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are underexplored for leveraging multi-sensor information to understand adverse driving scenarios in autonomous vehicles. To address this gap, we propose the DriveXQA, a multimodal dataset for autonomous driving VQA. In addition to four visual modalities, five sensor failure cases, and five weather conditions, it includes $102,505$ QA pairs categorized into three types: global scene level, allocentric level, and ego-vehicle centric level. Since no existing MLLM framework adopts multiple complementary visual modalities as input, we design MVX-LLM, a token-efficient architecture with a Dual Cross-Attention (DCA) projector that fuses the modalities to alleviate information redundancy. Experiments demonstrate that our DCA achieves improved performance under challenging conditions such as foggy (GPTScore: $53.5$ vs. $25.1$ for the baseline).
comment: Accepted to CVPR DriveX Workshop. Dataset and Code: https://github.com/jtjmd/DRIVEXQA

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出DriveXQA多模态数据集和MVX-LLM架构，通过双交叉注意力机制提升自动驾驶在不良条件下的视觉问答性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶需要融合互补模态的传感器来全面理解异常驾驶场景，但现有MLLMs未充分探索利用多传感器信息处理不良天气和传感器故障等问题。这一问题重要性在于恶劣条件影响系统稳定性，现有方法在模态融合中存在信息冗余和性能不足的局限，导致自动驾驶场景理解不全面，因此需开发新框架来有效整合多模态数据以提高鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出DriveXQA数据集，包含四种视觉模态、五种传感器故障案例和五种天气条件，共计102,505个QA对，分为全局场景、异中心水平和自我车辆中心水平三类。同时设计MVX-LLM架构，采用令牌高效的双交叉注意力（DCA）投影器来融合这些模态，核心创新在于DCA机制减少信息冗余并动态整合互补视觉数据，适应自动驾驶的复杂需求，提升多模态表示效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示DCA机制在挑战条件下性能显著提升，例如在雾天条件下，GPTScore达到53.5，相比基线的25.1有大幅改进。这表明DCA有效融合多模态数据，改善了不良天气和传感器故障场景下的视觉问答准确性，与基线方法相比表现出更好的鲁棒性和效率，为自动驾驶应用提供了有力验证。
