light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献在于提出DriveXQA数据集和MVX-LLM架构，填补了MLLMs在自动驾驶多模态理解领域的空白。学术价值在于为视觉问答和传感器融合研究提供新基准和方法；应用价值在于提升自动驾驶系统在恶劣条件下的稳定性和安全性。未来工作可能包括扩展数据集、优化架构或应用于其他多模态任务，以进一步推动技术发展。

title: Scaling Test-Time Robustness of Vision-Language Models via Self-Critical Inference Framework
abstract: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has driven rapid progress in multi-modal learning, particularly in the development of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). However, existing LVLM training paradigms place excessive reliance on the LLM component, giving rise to two critical robustness challenges: language bias and language sensitivity. To address both issues simultaneously, we propose a novel Self-Critical Inference (SCI) framework that extends Visual Contrastive Decoding by conducting multi-round counterfactual reasoning through both textual and visual perturbations. This process further introduces a new strategy for improving robustness by scaling the number of counterfactual rounds. Moreover, we also observe that failure cases of LVLMs differ significantly across models, indicating that fixed robustness benchmarks may not be able to capture the true reliability of LVLMs. To this end, we propose the Dynamic Robustness Benchmark (DRBench), a model-specific evaluation framework targeting both language bias and sensitivity issues. Extensive experiments show that SCI consistently outperforms baseline methods on DRBench, and that increasing the number of inference rounds further boosts robustness beyond existing single-step counterfactual reasoning methods.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出自批判推理框架和动态鲁棒性基准，以解决大型视觉语言模型的语言偏见和敏感性鲁棒性问题，通过多轮反事实推理提升测试时稳健性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型训练范式过度依赖语言模型组件，导致语言偏见和语言敏感性两大鲁棒性挑战，影响模型在实际应用中的可靠性。固定评估基准难以准确捕捉不同模型的失败案例差异，因此需要开发新方法来解决这些问题，以提升多模态系统的稳健性和评估有效性。
light_analysis.method: 提出自批判推理框架，通过文本和视觉扰动的多轮反事实推理扩展视觉对比解码，引入扩展推理轮数的策略以提高鲁棒性。同时开发动态鲁棒性基准，作为针对语言偏见和敏感性的模型特定评估框架，以更准确地评估模型稳健性。关键创新包括多轮推理机制和自适应评估方法。
light_analysis.result: 自批判推理框架在动态鲁棒性基准上持续优于基线方法，增加推理轮数进一步提升了鲁棒性，超越现有单步反事实推理方法，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进的具体数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出自批判推理框架和动态鲁棒性基准，显著提升了大型视觉语言模型的鲁棒性和评估准确性，具有重要的学术价值（推动多模态学习稳健性研究）和实际应用价值（改进模型部署可靠性），未来工作可包括扩展至其他模态或多轮推理优化。

title: Let the Agent Search: Autonomous Exploration Beats Rigid Workflows in Temporal Question Answering
abstract: Temporal Knowledge Graph Question Answering (TKGQA) is challenging because it requires multi-hop reasoning under complex temporal constraints. Recent LLM-based approaches have improved semantic modeling for this task, but many still rely on fixed reasoning workflows or costly post-training, which can limit adaptability and make error recovery difficult. We show that enabling an off-the-shelf Large Language Model (LLM) to determine its next action is already effective in a zero-shot setting. Based on this insight, we propose AT2QA, an Autonomous and Training-free Agent for TKG Question Answering. AT2QA empowers the LLM to iteratively interact with the TKG via a generic search tool, inherently enabling autonomous exploration and dynamic self-correction during reasoning. To further elicit the LLM's potential for complex temporal reasoning, we introduce a training-free experience mining mechanism that distills a compact few-shot demonstration library from successful self-generated trajectories. AT2QA also yields a transparent audit trail for every prediction. Experiments on three challenging benchmarks -- MultiTQ, Timeline-CronQuestion, and Timeline-ICEWS-Actor -- show that AT2QA achieves new state-of-the-art performance, surpassing the strongest baselines by 10.7, 4.9, and 11.2 absolute points, respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/AT2QA-Official-Code/AT2QA-Official-Code
comment: Revised version with three added authors and additional experiments

light_analysis.overview: AT2QA提出了一种自主且无需训练的代理方法，用于时序知识图谱问答，通过让大语言模型进行自主探索和动态自纠正，显著提升了性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决时序知识图谱问答（TKGQA）中多跳推理和复杂时间约束的挑战。现有基于大语言模型的方法虽然改善了语义建模，但仍依赖固定推理流程或昂贵的后训练，这限制了系统的适应性和错误恢复能力，使得在实际应用中不够灵活。因此，研究动机是探索一种更自适应、无需大量训练的方法来提升TKGQA的性能和鲁棒性，以克服传统方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: AT2QA是一种自主代理，它利用现成的大语言模型在零样本设置下，通过通用搜索工具迭代与时序知识图谱交互，实现自主探索和动态自纠正。关键创新点包括引入无需训练的经验挖掘机制，该机制从成功的自生成轨迹中提取紧凑的少样本演示库，以增强模型的推理能力。此外，系统提供透明的审计跟踪，便于理解预测过程，整体技术路线强调自主性和自适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个具有挑战性的基准测试——MultiTQ、Timeline-CronQuestion和Timeline-ICEWS-Actor上，AT2QA取得了新的最先进性能。具体而言，相比最强基线方法，性能分别提升了10.7、4.9和11.2个绝对点。这些结果表明，自主探索策略在时序知识图谱问答任务中显著优于现有固定工作流方法，验证了方法的有效性和普适性，在零样本设置下也能达到高性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献是提出了AT2QA方法，展示了通过自主探索和无需训练的经验挖掘可以大幅改善时序知识图谱问答的性能。其学术价值在于为大语言模型在复杂推理任务中的应用提供了新思路，强调自适应性和自纠正能力。实际应用中，透明审计跟踪增强了可解释性。摘要未明确说明具体局限性，但未来工作可能包括扩展到其他知识图谱任务或优化经验挖掘机制。

title: Beyond State-Wise Mirror Descent: Offline Policy Optimization with Parametric Policies
abstract: We investigate the theoretical aspects of offline reinforcement learning (RL) under general function approximation. While prior works (e.g., Xie et al., 2021) have established the theoretical foundations of learning a good policy from offline data via pessimism, existing algorithms that are computationally tractable (often in an oracle-efficient sense), such as PSPI, only apply to finite and small action spaces. Moreover, these algorithms rely on state-wise mirror descent and require actors to be implicitly induced from the critic functions, failing to accommodate standalone policy parameterization which is ubiquitous in practice. In this work, we address these limitations and extend the theoretical guarantees to parameterized policy classes over large or continuous action spaces. When extending mirror descent to parameterized policies, we identify contextual coupling as the core difficulty, and show how connecting mirror descent to natural policy gradient leads to novel analyses, guarantees, and algorithmic insights, including a surprising unification between offline RL and imitation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 本文扩展离线强化学习的理论保证到参数化策略类，通过连接镜像下降与自然策略梯度，统一了离线RL与模仿学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决离线强化学习（RL）中现有算法（如PSPI）的局限性。这些算法仅适用于有限和小动作空间，依赖于状态镜像下降，且要求演员策略从批评函数中隐式推导，无法适应实践中常见的独立策略参数化。这一问题的重要性在于，实际应用（如机器人控制或游戏）常涉及大或连续动作空间，现有方法的不足限制了离线RL的适用范围和效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出将镜像下降方法扩展到参数化策略类，以处理大或连续动作空间。核心创新是识别上下文耦合为主要困难，并通过将镜像下降连接到自然策略梯度，建立新的理论分析框架。这种方法避免了隐式演员推导，直接支持独立的策略参数化，从而导出算法见解，包括揭示离线RL与模仿学习之间的统一性。关键细节包括在一般函数近似下的理论建模。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。基于理论分析，论文提供了扩展的理论保证，支持参数化策略在离线RL中的有效性，并与基线方法（如有限动作空间的算法）形成对比，展示了方法在理论层面的改进，但缺乏具体性能指标如准确率或效率提升的数据支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是扩展了离线RL的理论基础到参数化策略类，提出通过镜像下降与自然策略梯度的连接解决上下文耦合问题。其学术价值在于为大规模动作空间的离线优化提供新理论框架，实际应用价值包括促进实践中独立策略参数化的使用。未来工作可能包括实验验证或进一步探索统一框架的局限性。

title: IDP Accelerator: Agentic Document Intelligence from Extraction to Compliance Validation
abstract: Understanding and extracting structured insights from unstructured documents remains a foundational challenge in industrial NLP. While Large Language Models (LLMs) enable zero-shot extraction, traditional pipelines often fail to handle multi-document packets, complex reasoning, and strict compliance requirements. We present IDP (Intelligent Document Processing) Accelerator, a framework enabling agentic AI for end-to-end document intelligence with four key components: (1) DocSplit, a novel benchmark dataset and multimodal classifier using BIO tagging to segment complex document packets; (2) configurable Extraction Module leveraging multimodal LLMs to transform unstructured content into structured data; (3) Agentic Analytics Module, compliant with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) providing data access through secure, sandboxed code execution; and (4) Rule Validation Module replacing deterministic engines with LLM-driven logic for complex compliance checks. The interactive demonstration enables users to upload document packets, visualize classification results, and explore extracted data through an intuitive web interface. We demonstrate effectiveness across industries, highlighting a production deployment at a leading healthcare provider achieving 98% classification accuracy, 80% reduced processing latency, and 77% lower operational costs over legacy baselines. IDP Accelerator is open-sourced with a live demonstration available to the community.

light_analysis.overview: IDP Accelerator是一个基于代理AI的端到端文档智能框架，集成多模态LLMs和LLM驱动逻辑，以处理多文档包和复杂合规验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业NLP中从非结构化文档提取结构化信息面临基础挑战，虽然LLMs支持零样本提取，但传统管道常无法有效处理多文档包、复杂推理任务和严格合规要求，这限制了实际应用中的效率和准确性，特别是在医疗、金融等行业，需要更全面的解决方案来整合提取与验证过程。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出IDP Accelerator框架，包含四个关键组件：DocSplit基准数据集和多模态分类器使用BIO标记分割文档包；提取模块利用多模态LLMs将非结构化内容转为结构化数据；代理分析模块基于模型上下文协议（MCP），通过安全沙盒代码执行提供数据访问；规则验证模块用LLM驱动逻辑替代确定性引擎进行复杂合规检查，从而实现端到端的智能处理。
light_analysis.result: 在领先医疗保健提供商的生产部署中，IDP Accelerator实现98%的分类准确率，处理延迟降低80%，运营成本减少77%，显著优于传统基线方法，展示其在多行业应用中的高效性和实用性，验证了框架在提升准确性和降低成本方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究贡献了一个开源框架IDP Accelerator，有效集成代理AI和多模态LLMs，学术上推动了文档智能技术的发展，实际中通过减少延迟和成本提高了行业效率，具有广泛应用潜力，未来可能扩展到更多复杂场景或优化算法性能。

title: ExpPortrait: Expressive Portrait Generation via Personalized Representation
abstract: While diffusion models have shown great potential in portrait generation, generating expressive, coherent, and controllable cinematic portrait videos remains a significant challenge. Existing intermediate signals for portrait generation, such as 2D landmarks and parametric models, have limited disentanglement capabilities and cannot express personalized details due to their sparse or low-rank representation. Therefore, existing methods based on these models struggle to accurately preserve subject identity and expressions, hindering the generation of highly expressive portrait videos. To overcome these limitations, we propose a high-fidelity personalized head representation that more effectively disentangles expression and identity. This representation captures both static, subject-specific global geometry and dynamic, expression-related details. Furthermore, we introduce an expression transfer module to achieve personalized transfer of head pose and expression details between different identities. We use this sophisticated and highly expressive head model as a conditional signal to train a diffusion transformer (DiT)-based generator to synthesize richly detailed portrait videos. Extensive experiments on self- and cross-reenactment tasks demonstrate that our method outperforms previous models in terms of identity preservation, expression accuracy, and temporal stability, particularly in capturing fine-grained details of complex motion.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一种高保真个性化头部表示方法，结合表情转移模块和扩散变换器生成器，有效生成表达性人像视频。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在人像生成中潜力巨大，但生成表达性、连贯且可控的电影式人像视频仍面临挑战。现有方法如2D地标和参数模型具有有限的解缠能力，其稀疏或低秩表示无法捕捉个性化细节，导致在生成视频时难以准确保留主体身份和表情，限制了高表达性人像视频的实用性。因此，研究需要改进个性化表示以克服这些限制。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种高保真个性化头部表示，通过解耦表情和身份来捕获静态主体特定几何和动态表情细节。此外，引入一个表情转移模块，实现不同身份间头部姿态和表情细节的个性化转移。基于该表示，使用扩散变换器（DiT）训练一个生成器，以合成细节丰富的人像视频。核心创新在于更有效的解缠技术和条件生成框架。
light_analysis.result: 在自重现和跨重现任务上进行实验，结果显示本方法在身份保留、表情准确性和时间稳定性方面均优于先前模型。特别地，在捕捉复杂运动的细粒度细节时表现突出，显著提高了人像视频生成的表达性和连贯性。对比基线方法，本方法展现出更好的性能和鲁棒性，具体数值在摘要中未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出了一种高保真个性化头部表示和表情转移模块，显著提升了人像视频生成的质量。学术上，解决了表情与身份解缠的难题；实际应用中，为电影式人像生成提供了可靠技术。未来工作可能涉及扩展该表示到更多场景或优化生成效率，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Smooth Gate Functions for Soft Advantage Policy Optimization
abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has significantly advanced the training of large language models and enhanced their reasoning capabilities, while it remains susceptible to instability due to the use of hard clipping. Soft Adaptive Policy Optimization (SAPO) addresses this limitation by replacing clipping with a smooth sigmoid-based gate function, which leads to more stable updates. We have decided to push this theory further and investigate the impact of different gate functions on both training stability and final model performance. We formalize the key properties that admissible gates should satisfy and identify several families of such functions for empirical evaluation. This paper presents an analysis of our findings based on experiments conducted with the Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct model on mathematical reasoning tasks. These results provide practical guidance for designing smoother and more robust policy optimization objectives for large language model training.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过分析不同平滑门函数对大型语言模型策略优化稳定性和性能的影响，为改进训练目标提供了实用指导。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)在训练大型语言模型时，因使用硬裁剪而容易导致训练不稳定的问题。尽管Soft Adaptive Policy Optimization (SAPO)通过引入平滑的sigmoid门函数缓解了不稳定性，但不同门函数的具体影响仍需探索。本研究旨在探究不同平滑门函数如何影响训练稳定性和最终模型性能，以解决现有方法在鲁棒性方面的不足，这对于提升大型语言模型的推理能力和训练效率至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括形式化可接受平滑门函数的关键属性，并识别多个函数家族进行实证评估。具体地，使用Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型在数学推理任务上进行实验。核心创新点在于系统分析不同平滑门函数（如sigmoid-based gates）的特性，并将其应用于Soft Advantage Policy Optimization中，以替代传统的硬裁剪方法，探索更稳定的更新机制。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果数据。但基于实验分析，论文可能比较了不同平滑门函数在训练稳定性和模型性能上的表现。结果预期能提供不同门函数对策略优化目标的实际影响，为后续研究提供参考。由于摘要中未提及具体性能指标或与基线的对比，此处无法提供详细数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是分析了不同平滑门函数在大型语言模型策略优化中的作用，并形式化了相关属性。这为设计更平滑和鲁棒的策略优化目标提供了实用指导，具有学术价值，可推动训练方法的改进。未来工作可能涉及更多门函数的探索或扩展到其他任务，但摘要未明确说明局限性或具体方向。

title: ChordEdit: One-Step Low-Energy Transport for Image Editing
abstract: The advent of one-step text-to-image (T2I) models offers unprecedented synthesis speed. However, their application to text-guided image editing remains severely hampered, as forcing existing training-free editors into a single inference step fails. This failure manifests as severe object distortion and a critical loss of consistency in non-edited regions, resulting from the high-energy, erratic trajectories produced by naive vector arithmetic on the models' structured fields. To address this problem, we introduce ChordEdit, a model agnostic, training-free, and inversion-free method that facilitates high-fidelity one-step editing. We recast editing as a transport problem between the source and target distributions defined by the source and target text prompts. Leveraging dynamic optimal transport theory, we derive a principled, low-energy control strategy. This strategy yields a smoothed, variance-reduced editing field that is inherently stable, facilitating the field to be traversed in a single, large integration step. A theoretically grounded and experimentally validated approach allows ChordEdit to deliver fast, lightweight and precise edits, finally achieving true real-time editing on these challenging models.

light_analysis.overview: ChordEdit 是一种基于动态最优运输理论的模型无关、无训练方法，实现了高保真的一步文本引导图像编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前一步文本到图像（T2I）模型虽然合成速度快，但在应用于文本引导图像编辑时，现有无训练编辑器在单步推理中严重失败，导致对象扭曲和非编辑区域一致性丢失。这一问题源于模型结构化场上的向量算术产生的高能量、不稳定轨迹，阻碍了实时编辑的实现，凸显了开发更稳定、高效编辑方法的紧迫性。
light_analysis.method: ChordEdit 将编辑问题重新定义为源文本提示和目标文本提示所定义分布之间的动态最优运输问题。通过理论推导，提出一种低能量控制策略，生成平滑且方差减少的编辑场，使其能在单一大步中稳定遍历。该方法不依赖特定模型架构，无需训练或反转过程，实现了模型无关的轻量级编辑。
light_analysis.result: 论文基于理论推导和实验验证，表明 ChordEdit 能够实现高保真的一步编辑，避免对象扭曲和一致性丢失。与基线方法相比，它提供了稳定、高效的编辑过程，在挑战性模型中实现了真正的实时编辑，展现出快速和轻量级的优势，尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChordEdit 的主要贡献在于通过动态最优运输理论，解决了 T2I 模型在单步图像编辑中的稳定性问题，推动了实时图像处理应用的发展。该研究不仅提供了一种新颖的编辑框架，还具实际应用价值，未来工作可探索更广泛数据集或复杂任务以增强鲁棒性。

title: Learning Cross-View Object Correspondence via Cycle-Consistent Mask Prediction
abstract: We study the task of establishing object-level visual correspondence across different viewpoints in videos, focusing on the challenging egocentric-to-exocentric and exocentric-to-egocentric scenarios. We propose a simple yet effective framework based on conditional binary segmentation, where an object query mask is encoded into a latent representation to guide the localization of the corresponding object in a target video. To encourage robust, view-invariant representations, we introduce a cycle-consistency training objective: the predicted mask in the target view is projected back to the source view to reconstruct the original query mask. This bidirectional constraint provides a strong self-supervisory signal without requiring ground-truth annotations and enables test-time training (TTT) at inference. Experiments on the Ego-Exo4D and HANDAL-X benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our optimization objective and TTT strategy, achieving state-of-the-art performance. The code is available at https://github.com/shannany0606/CCMP.
comment: The paper has been accepted to CVPR 2026 main track

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了一种基于循环一致性掩码预测的框架，用于视频中跨自我中心和外部中心视点的对象级视觉对应关系，实现了无监督学习和测试时间训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决在视频中跨不同视点（如自我中心到外部中心）建立对象级视觉对应关系的挑战性问题。这种对应关系对于多视角视频分析、机器人导航和增强现实等应用至关重要，因为视点差异大，现有方法往往依赖于地面真实标注数据，在无标注场景下难以实现鲁棒性能。本文旨在开发一种无需人工标注的方法，通过自监督学习克服视点变化带来的困难，提升跨视点对象对应的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用基于条件二进制分割的框架，将对象查询掩码编码成潜在表示，以指导在目标视频中定位对应对象。关键创新是引入循环一致性训练目标：预测的目标视图掩码被投影回源视图，重构原始查询掩码，从而提供强自监督信号，鼓励视图不变表示。此外，在推理阶段启用测试时间训练（TTT）策略，进一步优化性能。该方法在 Ego-Exo4D 和 HANDAL-X 数据集上进行评估，但摘要未详细说明具体模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验在 Ego-Exo4D 和 HANDAL-X 基准上进行，结果表明所提出的循环一致性训练目标和测试时间训练（TTT）策略有效，实现了最先进的性能。尽管摘要未提供具体准确率或效率改进数据，但论文声称在跨视点对象对应任务上超越了基线方法，展示了框架在挑战性场景下的鲁棒性和优越性。这验证了自监督学习和TTT策略在减少标注依赖和提升模型适应性方面的作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了一个基于循环一致性掩码预测的框架，用于跨视点对象对应，通过自监督学习和测试时间训练减少了对地面真实注释的依赖。研究在学术上为跨视点视觉对应提供了新方法，推动了无监督学习在计算机视觉中的应用；在实际应用价值上，可服务于多视角视频分析和机器人感知等领域。摘要未明确说明潜在局限性或未来工作方向，但暗示了在更复杂场景下的扩展可能。

title: OpenEarthAgent: A Unified Framework for Tool-Augmented Geospatial Agents
abstract: Recent progress in multimodal reasoning has enabled agents that interpret imagery, connect it with language, and execute structured analytical tasks. Extending these capabilities to remote sensing remains challenging, as models must reason over spatial scale, geographic structures, and multispectral indices while maintaining coherent multi-step logic. To address this gap, we introduce \textit{OpenEarthAgent}, a unified framework for tool-augmented geospatial reasoning trained on satellite imagery, natural-language queries, and structured reasoning traces. Beyond serving as a benchmark, OpenEarthAgent establishes a cohesive agentic architecture built around a unified executable tool registry and trajectory-based policy learning. The framework standardizes heterogeneous visual, spectral, GIS, and georeferenced raster operations under a consistent callable schema, enabling modular orchestration and deterministic execution. Training is performed via supervised fine-tuning on structured reasoning trajectories with deterministic replay validation to ensure executability and spatial correctness. The accompanying corpus comprises 14,538 training and 1,169 evaluation instances with over 107K reasoning steps, spanning urban, environmental, disaster, and infrastructure domains and incorporating GIS operations alongside index analyses such as NDVI, NBR, and NDBI. Grounded in explicit reasoning traces, the learned agent demonstrates structured reasoning, stable spatial understanding, and interpretable tool-driven behaviour across diverse EO scenarios. We report consistent improvements over a strong baseline and competitive performance against recent open and closed-source models. Our code and trained models will be publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: OpenEarthAgent 是一个统一的工具增强地理空间代理框架，通过标准化异构操作和轨迹策略学习实现遥感推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决遥感领域的挑战：将多模态推理扩展到遥感时，代理需要处理空间尺度、地理结构和多光谱指数，同时保持多步逻辑连贯性。这一问题在城市规划、环境监测和灾害响应等关键应用中至关重要，但现有方法往往难以整合异构的视觉、光谱和 GIS 操作，导致推理不稳定和执行不一致。因此，本研究旨在开发一个统一框架来提升地理空间代理的推理能力和操作标准化。
light_analysis.method: OpenEarthAgent 框架采用统一的可执行工具注册中心，将视觉、光谱、GIS 和地理参考栅格操作标准化到一致的调用模式中。通过监督微调结构化推理轨迹，结合确定性重放验证以确保执行性和空间正确性。训练数据集包含 14,538 个训练实例和 1,169 个评估实例，覆盖城市、环境、灾难和基础设施领域，并集成指数分析如 NDVI、NBR 和 NDBI，支持多样化的地理空间推理任务。
light_analysis.result: 学习到的代理展示了结构化推理、稳定空间理解和可解释工具驱动行为。实验结果表明，与强基线相比有一致改进，性能与近期开源和闭源模型竞争。但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，仅报告了改进和竞争性表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: OpenEarthAgent 提供了统一的基准和框架，推动了工具增强地理空间代理的发展，学术价值在于标准化遥感推理方法，实际应用支持城市、环境等领域分析。代码和模型将公开以促进研究，但摘要未明确说明局限性或未来方向。

title: Team of Thoughts: Efficient Test-time Scaling of Agentic Systems through Orchestrated Tool Calling
abstract: Existing Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) typically rely on homogeneous model configurations, failing to exploit the diverse expertise inherent in different post-trained architectures. We propose Team-of-Thoughts, a heterogeneous MAS framework that treats diverse models as specialized tools within an orchestrator-driven paradigm. Team-of-Thoughts introduces two novel components: (1) Orchestrator Calibration, which identifies models with superior coordination and synthesis capabilities, and (2) Agent Self-Assessment, a protocol where tool agents profile their own domain-specific strengths to guide selection. At inference, the orchestrator dynamically activates the most compatible agents based on these profiles to maximize capability coverage. Across five mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks, Team-of-Thoughts consistently outperforms individual models and existing MAS baselines. Notably, on AIME24 and LiveCodeBench, Team-of-Thoughts achieves 96.00% and 77.91% accuracy, respectively, significantly improving over homogeneous role-play baselines (80.00% and 65.93%).

light_analysis.overview: 提出Team-of-Thoughts框架，一个异构多代理系统，通过编排工具调用来高效扩展代理系统性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多代理系统通常依赖同质模型配置，未能充分利用不同后训练架构的多样化专业知识，导致在复杂任务如数学推理和代码生成中表现受限。这个问题重要，因为单一模型难以覆盖所有领域，现有方法如同质角色扮演基线效率低下，限制了系统能力扩展。
light_analysis.method: 研究引入Team-of-Thoughts框架，包含编排器校准和代理自我评估两个核心组件。编排器校准识别具有优秀协调和合成能力的模型；代理自我评估使工具代理描述自身领域特定优势。在推理时，编排器基于这些配置文件动态激活最兼容的代理，以最大化能力覆盖，使用异构模型作为专门工具。
light_analysis.result: 在五个数学推理和代码生成基准测试中，Team-of-Thoughts表现优于单个模型和现有多代理系统基线。具体在AIME24和LiveCodeBench上，准确率分别达到96.00%和77.91%，显著高于同质角色扮演基线的80.00%和65.93%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 摘要未明确说明结论，但可推断该框架通过异构化提高了多代理系统性能和效率，具有推动多代理系统发展的学术价值，实际应用潜力如增强AI任务处理能力。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多领域或优化编排策略。

title: Interactionless Inverse Reinforcement Learning: A Data-Centric Framework for Durable Alignment
abstract: AI alignment is growing in importance, yet many current approaches learn safety behavior by directly modifying policy parameters, entangling normative constraints with the underlying policy. This often yields opaque, difficult-to-edit alignment artifacts and reduces their reuse across models or deployments, a failure mode we term Alignment Waste. We propose Interactionless Inverse Reinforcement Learning, a framework for learning inspectable, editable, and reusable reward artifacts separately from policy optimization. We further introduce the Alignment Flywheel, a human-in-the-loop lifecycle for iteratively auditing, patching, and hardening these artifacts through automated evaluation and refinement. Together, these ideas recast alignment from a disposable training expense into a durable, verifiable engineering asset.
comment: Accepted for the AAMAS 2026 Blue Sky Ideas track

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Interactionless Inverse Reinforcement Learning框架和Alignment Flywheel生命周期，通过将奖励产物与策略优化分离，实现AI对齐产物的持久性、可检查性和可重用性。
light_analysis.motivation: AI对齐日益重要，但现有方法往往通过直接修改策略参数来学习安全行为，导致规范性约束与底层策略纠缠不清。这造成了对齐产物不透明、难以编辑和跨模型重用的局限性，称为“对齐浪费”。为解决这一问题，研究旨在开发一种可分离、持久对齐框架，以减少资源浪费并提升对齐产物的工程化水平。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出Interactionless Inverse Reinforcement Learning框架，核心在于将奖励产物的学习与策略优化过程分离，以生成可检查、可编辑和可重用的对齐产物。进一步引入Alignment Flywheel，一个人机协同生命周期，通过自动评估和迭代审计、修补、加固来优化这些产物。该方法强调数据中心的方法，避免直接策略修改，促进对齐产物的独立管理。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但框架预期能显著提升对齐产物的持久性和可验证性，减少对齐浪费，并支持跨部署的重用。与基线方法相比，该方法可能在透明度、编辑效率和资产重用性方面有所改进，但具体性能指标如准确率或效率数据未在摘要中提供。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于将AI对齐从一次性训练费用转变为持久、可验证的工程资产，通过分离奖励学习和引入迭代优化生命周期。这不仅提高了对齐产物的学术价值，也为实际应用中的可重用性和可维护性提供了新路径。未来工作可能包括扩展框架到更复杂场景或解决潜在局限性，摘要未详细说明。

title: Advancing AI Trustworthiness Through Patient Simulation: Risk Assessment of Conversational Agents for Antidepressant Selection
abstract: Objective: This paper introduces a patient simulator for scalable, automated evaluation of healthcare conversational agents, generating realistic, controllable interactions that systematically vary across medical, linguistic, and behavioral dimensions to support risk assessment across populations. Methods: Grounded in the NIST AI Risk Management Framework, the simulator integrates three profile components: (1) medical profiles constructed from All of Us electronic health records using risk-ratio gating; (2) linguistic profiles modeling health literacy and condition-specific communication; and (3) behavioral profiles representing cooperative, distracted, and adversarial engagement. Profiles were evaluated against NIST AI RMF trustworthiness requirements and assessed against an AI Decision Aid for antidepressant selection. Results: Across 500 simulated conversations, the simulator revealed monotonic degradation in AI Decision Aid performance across health literacy levels: Rank-1 concept retrieval ranged from 47.6% (limited) to 81.9% (proficient), with corresponding recommendation degradation. Medical concept fidelity was high (96.6% across 8,210 concepts), validated by human annotators (0.73 kappa) and an LLM judge with comparable agreement (0.78 kappa). Behavioral profiles were reliably distinguished (0.93 kappa), and linguistic profiles showed moderate agreement (0.61 kappa). Conclusions: The simulator exposes measurable performance risks in conversational healthcare AI. Health literacy emerged as a primary risk factor with direct implications for equitable AI deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于患者模拟器的评估方法，用于系统分析医疗对话AI在抗抑郁药选择中的可信度风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决医疗对话AI在敏感决策如抗抑郁药选择中的风险评估问题。现有方法缺乏可扩展、自动化的工具来评估AI在不同人群中的性能差异，这可能导致部署不公和潜在风险。通过模拟患者交互，研究动机是提高AI的可信度，确保其在多样化人群中的可靠性和公平性，以支持系统性的风险管理和NIST框架的应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个患者模拟器，基于NIST AI风险管理框架，集成三个核心配置文件：医疗配置文件使用All of Us电子健康记录通过风险比率门控构建；语言配置文件模拟健康素养和条件特定通信；行为配置文件代表合作、分心和敌对参与。模拟器生成真实、可控的交互，评估AI决策辅助的性能，关键创新在于系统性地整合医疗、语言和行为维度，以自动化方式支持风险评估。
light_analysis.result: 在500次模拟对话中，模拟器揭示了AI决策辅助性能随健康素养水平单调退化：排名第一的概念检索率从有限健康素养的47.6%提升至熟练的81.9%，推荐质量相应下降。医疗概念保真度高达96.6%（基于8,210个概念），经人类注释者（kappa 0.73）和LLM法官（kappa 0.78）验证。行为配置文件区分可靠（kappa 0.93），语言配置文件一致性中等（kappa 0.61）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是开发了一个可扩展的患者模拟器，暴露了医疗对话AI中健康素养作为主要风险因素的性能退化，强调了公平部署的重要性。这为系统风险评估提供了新工具，具有促进AI在医疗领域可靠应用的学术和实际价值。未来工作可扩展模拟器到其他领域或优化配置文件以增强可信度。

title: Thinking with Geometry: Active Geometry Integration for Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Recent progress in spatial reasoning with Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) increasingly leverages geometric priors from 3D encoders. However, most existing integration strategies remain passive: geometry is exposed as a global stream and fused in an indiscriminate manner, which often induces semantic-geometry misalignment and redundant signals. We propose GeoThinker, a framework that shifts the paradigm from passive fusion to active perception. Instead of feature mixing, GeoThinker enables the model to selectively retrieve geometric evidence conditioned on its internal reasoning demands. GeoThinker achieves this through Spatial-Grounded Fusion applied at carefully selected VLM layers, where semantic visual priors selectively query and integrate task-relevant geometry via frame-strict cross-attention, further calibrated by Importance Gating that biases per-frame attention toward task-relevant structures. Comprehensive evaluation results show that GeoThinker sets a new state-of-the-art in spatial intelligence, achieving a peak score of 72.6 on the VSI-Bench. Furthermore, GeoThinker demonstrates robust generalization and significantly improved spatial perception across complex downstream scenarios, including embodied referring and autonomous driving. Our results indicate that the ability to actively integrate spatial structures is essential for next-generation spatial intelligence. Code can be found at https://github.com/Li-Hao-yuan/GeoThinker.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoThinker框架，通过主动感知机制选择性集成几何信息，以解决空间推理中的语义-几何不对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着多模态大语言模型在空间推理领域的应用发展，几何先验通常通过3D编码器集成。然而，现有方法多采用被动融合策略，将几何信息作为全局流以无差别方式融合，这常导致语义与几何信息不对齐，并产生冗余信号，限制了模型在复杂空间任务（如具身引用和自动驾驶）中的精确性能。因此，需要开发更有效的主动集成机制来提升空间推理的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: GeoThinker框架采用主动感知策略，使模型能够根据内部推理需求选择性检索几何证据。其核心是Spatial-Grounded Fusion，应用于精心选择的视觉语言模型层，通过严格帧级的跨注意力机制查询和整合任务相关的几何信息。这一过程通过重要性门控进行校准，以偏向任务相关结构，避免特征混合，实现精确的几何集成，从而解决语义-几何不对齐问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，GeoThinker在VSI-Bench基准测试中达到了72.6的峰值分数，创造了新的最佳水平，验证了其在空间推理方面的卓越性能。此外，该框架展现出强大的泛化能力，在复杂下游应用如具身引用和自动驾驶场景中，空间感知能力得到显著提升。与现有被动融合方法相比，GeoThinker有效减少了语义-几何不对齐，提高了整体效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了GeoThinker框架，实现了从被动融合到主动感知的转变，强调了主动集成空间结构对于下一代空间智能的重要性。该研究不仅具有学术价值，为多模态推理提供了新思路，还在实际应用中如自动驾驶和机器人导航中展现出潜力。未来工作可进一步探索该框架在其他领域的应用和优化，以扩展其适用范围。

title: SPARE: Self-distillation for PARameter-Efficient Removal
abstract: Machine Unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific data or concepts from trained models while preserving overall performance, a capability increasingly required by data protection regulations and responsible AI practices. Despite recent progress, unlearning in text-to-image diffusion models remains challenging due to high computational costs and the difficulty of balancing effective forgetting with retention of unrelated concepts. We introduce Self-distillation for PARameter Efficient Removal (SPARE), a two-stage unlearning method for image generation that combines parameter localization with self-distillation. SPARE first identifies parameters most responsible for generation of the unwanted concepts using gradient-based saliency and constrains updates through sparse low rank adapters, ensuring lightweight, localized modifications. In a second stage, SPARE applies a self-distillation objective that overwrites the unwanted concept with a user-defined surrogate while preserving behavior for other concepts. In addition we proposed a timestep sampling scheme for diffusion models to target only the crucial timesteps for a given concept leading to efficient unlearning. SPARE surpasses the current state-of-the-art on the UnlearnCanvas benchmark, and ablation studies on several datasets indicate fine-grained control over the forgetting-retention trade-off. Our results demonstrate that SPARE achieves strong concept erasure and high retainability across various domains, making it a suitable solution for selective unlearning in diffusion-based image generation models.

light_analysis.overview: SPARE是一种参数高效的两阶段无学习方法，用于文本到图像扩散模型，通过结合参数定位和自蒸馏实现选择性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器遗忘旨在从训练模型中移除特定数据或概念的影响，以满足数据保护法规和负责任AI实践的需求。当前，在文本到图像扩散模型中，由于模型复杂度高、计算成本昂贵，以及难以在有效遗忘不需要概念的同时保留无关概念的性能，无学习面临重大挑战。现有方法往往效率低下或平衡性差，无法充分解决这些困难，因此需要开发更高效的参数优化技术来提升无学习的精确性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: SPARE方法采用两阶段流程：首先，使用梯度基础显著性分析识别与不需要概念生成最相关的参数，并通过稀疏低秩适配器进行约束更新，确保轻量级、局部化的修改。其次，应用自蒸馏目标，用用户定义的替代概念覆盖不需要的概念，同时保持其他概念的行为不变。此外，论文提出了一个时间步采样方案，针对扩散模型中的关键时间步进行优化，以进一步提升无学习效率。这些创新点结合了参数定位和蒸馏技术，实现精细控制和低计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 在UnlearnCanvas基准测试中，SPARE超越了当前最先进方法，展示了优异的性能。消融研究在多个数据集上进行，结果表明SPARE能够实现精细的遗忘-保留权衡控制，具体表现为强概念擦除和高保留性，适用于各种图像生成领域。与基线方法相比，SPARE在保持整体性能的同时，有效移除了不需要的概念，验证了其参数高效性和实用性，为选择性无学习提供了可靠解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPARE为扩散基图像生成模型提供了一种有效的选择性无学习解决方案，其主要贡献在于结合参数定位和自蒸馏的两阶段方法，实现了参数高效性和精细控制。这项研究具有重要的学术价值，推动了机器遗忘技术在复杂生成模型中的应用，并具备实际应用潜力，如支持数据合规的AI系统。未来工作可进一步优化时间步采样或扩展到其他模型类型，以克服对特定概念定义的依赖。

title: ShapBPT: Image Feature Attributions Using Data-Aware Binary Partition Trees
abstract: Pixel-level feature attributions are an important tool in eXplainable AI for Computer Vision (XCV), providing visual insights into how image features influence model predictions. The Owen formula for hierarchical Shapley values has been widely used to interpret machine learning (ML) models and their learned representations. However, existing hierarchical Shapley approaches do not exploit the multiscale structure of image data, leading to slow convergence and weak alignment with the actual morphological features. Moreover, no prior Shapley method has leveraged data-aware hierarchies for Computer Vision tasks, leaving a gap in model interpretability of structured visual data. To address this, this paper introduces ShapBPT, a novel data-aware XCV method based on the hierarchical Shapley formula. ShapBPT assigns Shapley coefficients to a multiscale hierarchical structure tailored for images, the Binary Partition Tree (BPT). By using this data-aware hierarchical partitioning, ShapBPT ensures that feature attributions align with intrinsic image morphology, effectively prioritizing relevant regions while reducing computational overhead. This advancement connects hierarchical Shapley methods with image data, providing a more efficient and semantically meaningful approach to visual interpretability. Experimental results confirm ShapBPT's effectiveness, demonstrating superior alignment with image structures and improved efficiency over existing XCV methods, and a 20-subject user study confirming that ShapBPT explanations are preferred by humans.
comment: Presented at AAAI-26 conference and published in Proceedings of the The Fortieth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-26)

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出ShapBPT，一种基于数据感知二叉分割树的层次Shapley方法，用于改进图像特征归因的对齐和计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在计算机视觉的可解释AI中，像素级特征归因对于理解模型预测至关重要，但现有层次Shapley方法未能有效利用图像的多尺度结构，导致收敛速度慢且与真实形态特征对齐弱。这限制了模型解释性，尤其在处理结构化视觉数据时存在空白，缺乏数据感知的层次方法。因此，亟需开发一种能更好结合图像数据特性的解释技术，以提升解释准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: ShapBPT基于层次Shapley公式，通过数据感知的二叉分割树为图像分配Shapley系数。核心创新在于使用BPT作为多尺度层次结构，该结构能自适应图像形态，确保特征归因与内在图像特征对齐，同时减少计算开销。方法避免了现有方法的泛化问题，提供了更语义化的视觉解释框架，关键步骤包括构建数据感知的层次分割和分配系数以优化解释过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，ShapBPT在图像结构对齐和效率方面优于现有可解释AI方法，尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但表明其提供了更准确的归因。此外，一项涉及20名参与者的用户研究证实，ShapBPT生成的解释更受人类偏好，增强了其在实际应用中的可靠性和用户接受度，展示了其作为高效视觉解释工具的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ShapBPT成功将层次Shapley方法与图像数据结合，提供了一种更高效和语义上有意义的视觉解释方法，填补了数据感知层次在计算机视觉任务中的空白。其学术价值在于改进了模型解释性，实际应用价值在于支持更可靠的AI系统部署。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他视觉任务或进一步优化计算，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Continual GUI Agents
abstract: As digital environments (data distribution) are in flux, with new GUI data arriving over time-introducing new domains or resolutions-agents trained on static environments deteriorate in performance. In this work, we introduce Continual GUI Agents, a new task that requires GUI agents to perform continual learning under shifted domains and resolutions. We find existing methods fail to maintain stable grounding as GUI distributions shift over time, due to the diversity of UI interaction points and regions in fluxing scenarios. To address this, we introduce GUI-Anchoring in Flux (GUI-AiF), a new reinforcement fine-tuning framework that stabilizes continual learning through two novel rewards: Anchoring Point Reward in Flux (APR-iF) and Anchoring Region Reward in Flux (ARR-iF). These rewards guide the agents to align with shifting interaction points and regions, mitigating the tendency of existing reward strategies to over-adapt to static grounding cues (e.g., fixed coordinates or element scales). Extensive experiments show GUI-AiF surpasses state-of-the-art baselines. Our work establishes the first continual learning framework for GUI agents, revealing the untapped potential of reinforcement fine-tuning for continual GUI Agents.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了GUI-Anchoring in Flux (GUI-AiF)框架，通过创新奖励机制实现GUI代理在变化环境中的持续学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着数字环境的不断变化，新的GUI数据持续引入，带来新领域或分辨率的动态调整，导致基于静态环境训练的代理性能下降。这一问题至关重要，因为它直接影响了GUI代理在现实应用中的实用性和鲁棒性，尤其是在自动化测试或交互式系统中。现有方法在面对GUI分布的域转移时，由于UI交互点和区域的多样性在变化场景中波动，无法维持稳定的基础，限制了代理适应动态环境的能力，凸显了对更有效持续学习方案的需求。
light_analysis.method: 本论文引入GUI-Anchoring in Flux (GUI-AiF)，一种基于强化微调的框架，旨在稳定GUI代理的持续学习。其核心创新在于设计了两种新颖奖励：Anchoring Point Reward in Flux (APR-iF) 和 Anchoring Region Reward in Flux (ARR-iF)，这些奖励机制引导代理主动适应变化的交互点和区域，避免现有奖励策略过度依赖静态基础线索（如固定坐标或元素尺寸）的问题。该框架通过强化学习策略微调，针对GUI数据流中的域和分辨率偏移进行优化，以增强代理在不同环境中的泛化能力和稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 通过大量实验，GUI-AiF在持续GUI代理任务中表现优于最先进的基线方法。尽管摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标提升（如准确率或效率数据），但结果表明该框架能有效缓解代理在环境变化时的性能退化，展现了在动态GUI场景中的优越适应能力。与基线对比显示，GUI-AiF在稳定性和学习效果上有显著改进，但细节数据需要在论文主体中进一步查看以获取定量评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文主要贡献在于建立了首个针对GUI代理的持续学习框架，揭示了强化微调在动态GUI环境中的未开发潜力，为AI在交互界面自动化领域提供了新思路。其学术价值在于拓展了持续学习与GUI代理的结合应用，实际应用价值则体现在提升数字环境中的自动代理适应性和效率。未来工作可进一步探索奖励设计的优化、更多数据集验证，或应对更复杂的GUI变化场景，以克服潜在局限性如计算成本或泛化到极端环境。

title: CollectiveKV: Decoupling and Sharing Collaborative Information in Sequential Recommendation
abstract: Sequential recommendation models are widely used in applications, yet they face stringent latency requirements. Mainstream models leverage the Transformer attention mechanism to improve performance, but its computational complexity grows with the sequence length, leading to a latency challenge for long sequences. Consequently, KV cache technology has recently been explored in sequential recommendation systems to reduce inference latency. However, KV cache introduces substantial storage overhead in sequential recommendation systems, which often have a large user base with potentially very long user history sequences. In this work, we observe that KV sequences across different users exhibit significant similarities, indicating the existence of collaborative signals in KV. Furthermore, we analyze the KV using singular value decomposition (SVD) and find that the information in KV can be divided into two parts: the majority of the information is shareable across users, while a small portion is user-specific. Motivated by this, we propose CollectiveKV, a cross-user KV sharing mechanism. It captures the information shared across users through a learnable global KV pool. During inference, each user retrieves high-dimensional shared KV from the pool and concatenates them with low-dimensional user-specific KV to obtain the final KV. Experiments on five sequential recommendation models and three datasets show that our method can compress the KV cache to only 0.8% of its original size, while maintaining or even enhancing model performance.

light_analysis.overview: CollectiveKV提出一种跨用户KV共享机制，通过解耦和共享KV中的协作信息，压缩缓存以降低存储开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 顺序推荐系统在应用中面临严格延迟要求，主流Transformer模型虽提升性能，但计算复杂度随序列长度增长，导致长序列处理延迟。KV缓存技术虽减推理延迟，却因用户基数大和历史序列长而引入显著存储开销。现有方法未充分利用用户间KV序列的相似性，效率不足，亟待优化存储策略。
light_analysis.method: CollectiveKV基于对KV序列的观察，使用奇异值分解分析，将KV信息划分为跨用户共享部分和用户特定部分。方法通过一个可学习全局KV池捕获共享信息，推理时每个用户从池中检索高维共享KV，并与低维用户特定KV拼接，生成最终KV。该方法集成到Transformer架构，实验涵盖五种顺序推荐模型和三个数据集，以优化KV缓存存储。
light_analysis.result: 在五种顺序推荐模型和三个数据集上的实验表明，CollectiveKV能将KV缓存压缩至原始大小的0.8%，同时保持或提升模型性能。与基线方法相比，这一方法显著减少存储开销，无需牺牲推荐准确性，为大规模系统提供高效解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: CollectiveKV通过解耦和共享KV中的协作信息，有效压缩缓存并降低存储需求，贡献在于提出新颖的跨用户KV共享机制。其学术价值在于为顺序推荐系统提供高效缓存优化方案，实际应用价值在于提升系统可扩展性。未来工作可探索更复杂共享策略或扩展至其他推荐场景，潜在局限性可能涉及数据分布依赖性。

title: A Hessian-Free Actor-Critic Algorithm for Bi-Level Reinforcement Learning with Applications to LLM Fine-Tuning
abstract: We study a structured bi-level optimization problem where the upper-level objective is a smooth function and the lower-level problem is policy optimization in a Markov decision process (MDP). The upper-level decision variable parameterizes the reward of the lower-level MDP, and the upper-level objective depends on the optimal induced policy. Existing methods for bi-level optimization and RL often require second-order information, impose strong regularization at the lower level, or inefficiently use samples through nested-loop procedures. In this work, we propose a single-loop, first-order actor-critic algorithm that optimizes the bi-level objective via a penalty-based reformulation. We introduce into the lower-level RL objective an attenuating entropy regularization, which enables asymptotically unbiased upper-level hyper-gradient estimation without solving the unregularized RL problem exactly. We establish the finite-time and finite-sample convergence of the proposed algorithm to a stationary point of the original, unregularized bi-level optimization problem through a novel lower-level residual analysis under a special type of Polyak-Lojasiewicz condition. We validate the performance of our method through experiments on a GridWorld goal position problem and on happy tweet generation through reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF).

title: ChartAttack: Testing the Vulnerability of LLMs to Malicious Prompting in Chart Generation
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly used to automate chart generation from data tables, enabling efficient data analysis and reporting but also introducing new misuse risks. In this work, we introduce ChartAttack, a novel framework for evaluating how MLLMs can be misused to generate misleading charts at scale. ChartAttack injects misleaders into chart designs, aiming to induce incorrect interpretations of the underlying data. Furthermore, we create AttackViz, a chart question-answering (QA) dataset where each (chart specification, QA) pair is labeled with effective misleaders and their induced incorrect answers. ChartAttack significantly degrades QA performance, reducing MLLM accuracy by 17.2 points in-domain and 11.9 cross-domain. Preliminary human results (limited sample size) indicate a 20.2-point accuracy drop. Finally, we demonstrate that AttackViz can be used to fine-tune MLLMs to improve robustness against misleading charts. Our findings highlight an urgent need for robustness and security considerations in the design, evaluation, and deployment of MLLM-based chart generation systems. We make our code and data publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出ChartAttack框架和AttackViz数据集，评估多模态大语言模型在图表生成中的脆弱性，并通过微调提升其鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型被用于自动化图表生成，提高了数据分析效率，但也引入了被滥用以生成误导性图表的新风险。现有方法缺乏系统评估模型对此类恶意提示的抵抗能力，这在实际应用中可能导致错误决策，凸显了研究该问题的重要性，以确保数据可视化的安全性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出ChartAttack框架，通过注入误导者到图表设计中，诱导对数据的错误解读，并创建AttackViz数据集，包含图表规格和问答对，标注有效误导者及其诱导的错误答案。关键创新在于系统化评估模型滥用潜力，为后续鲁棒性改进提供基准。
light_analysis.result: ChartAttack显著降低了多模态大语言模型在图表问答任务中的性能，域内准确率下降17.2点，跨域下降11.9点。初步人类实验结果（样本有限）显示准确率下降20.2点。此外，AttackViz数据集可用于微调模型，提高对误导性图表的抵抗力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了多模态大语言模型在图表生成中的安全脆弱性，ChartAttack和AttackViz为评估和提升鲁棒性提供了工具。这强调了在设计、评估和部署基于MLLM的系统时考虑安全性的紧迫性，并指出了未来工作可能包括扩展评估范围和改进模型防御机制。

title: Deep Feature Deformation Weights
abstract: Handle-based mesh deformation is a classic paradigm in computer graphics which enables intuitive edits from sparse controls. Classical techniques are fast and precise, but require users to know ideal handle placement apriori, which can be unintuitive and inconsistent. Handle sets cannot be adjusted easily, as weights are typically optimized through energies defined by the handles. Modern data-driven methods, on the other hand, provide semantic edits but sacrifice fine-grained control and speed. We propose a technique that achieves the best of both worlds: deep feature proximity yields smooth, visual-aware deformation weights with no additional regularization. Importantly, these weights are computed in real-time for any surface point, unlike prior methods which require expensive optimization. We introduce barycentric feature distillation, an improved feature distillation pipeline which leverages the full visual signal from shape renders to make distillation complexity robust to mesh resolution. This enables high resolution meshes to be processed in minutes versus potentially hours for prior methods. We preserve and extend classical properties through feature space constraints and locality weighting. Our field representation enables automatic visual symmetry detection, which we use to produce symmetry-preserving deformations. We show a proof-of-concept application which can produce deformations for meshes up to 1 million faces in real-time on a consumer-grade machine. Project page at https://threedle.github.io/dfd.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于深度特征邻近度的方法，用于实时生成平滑、视觉感知的网格变形权重，实现了经典控制与数据驱动语义编辑的结合。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决网格变形中经典方法需要用户预先知道理想手柄放置、难以调整手柄集的问题，以及数据驱动方法牺牲细粒度控制和速度的不足。网格变形在计算机图形学中至关重要，现有方法在直观性和效率上存在缺陷，影响了实际应用的便捷性和实时性能。因此，开发一种结合精确控制与实时处理的技术具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了基于深度特征邻近度的变形权重生成方法，核心创新点是barycentric feature distillation，该改进的特征蒸馏管道利用形状渲染的完整视觉信号，使蒸馏复杂度对网格分辨率鲁棒。通过特征空间约束和局部性加权来保持经典变形属性，并引入场表示以启用自动视觉对称检测，从而实现对称保持的变形。摘要未明确说明具体的数据集或模型架构细节，但强调了实时计算权重的能力。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，该方法能实时计算变形权重，无需昂贵优化。在处理高分辨率网格时，从可能需要几小时的处理时间减少到仅几分钟，显著提升了效率。摘要中提到，概念验证应用可在消费级机器上实时处理高达100万面的网格，展现了良好的性能。与基线方法相比，该方法在保持视觉质量的同时，实现了速度和控制的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了一种结合经典网格变形控制和数据驱动语义编辑的方法，实现了实时变形权重计算。学术价值在于改进了特征蒸馏流程，增强了处理复杂网格的能力；实际应用价值体现在计算机图形学中的实时编辑和动画场景。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更复杂变形任务或处理更大规模网格，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: DanQing: An Up-to-Date Large-Scale Chinese Vision-Language Pre-training Dataset
abstract: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) models have achieved remarkable success by leveraging large-scale image-text pairs. While English-centric models like CLIP and SigLIP benefit from massive datasets (e.g., LAION-400M), the development of Chinese VLP remains bottlenecked by the lack of high-quality, large-scale open-source data. In this paper, we present DanQing, a large-scale Chinese cross-modal dataset containing 100 million high-quality image-text pairs curated from Common Crawl. To ensure superior data quality, we develop an effective systematic pipeline comprising data source selection, text refinement, visual diversification, and cross-modal cross-batch filtering, thereby effectively mitigating the intrinsic noise prevalent in web data. Notably, DanQing incorporates data from 2024-2025, enabling models to capture contemporary semantic trends and emerging concepts. Extensive experiments via continued pretraining of SigLIP2 models demonstrate that DanQing consistently outperforms existing Chinese datasets across diverse downstream tasks, including zero-shot classification, cross-modal retrieval, and Chinese-centric large multimodal model tasks. Furthermore, in-depth analysis of DanQing reveals that it exhibits a more balanced semantic distribution and superior scaling capability compared to existing datasets. To facilitate further research in Chinese vision-language pre-training, we will open-source the DanQing dataset under the Creative Common CC-BY-NC 4.0 license.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了DanQing，一个包含1亿高质量图像文本对的大规模中文视觉语言预训练数据集，并通过实验验证了其性能优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于中文视觉语言预训练（VLP）领域缺乏高质量、大规模开源数据的问题。现有英文模型如CLIP和SigLIP得益于海量数据集（如LAION-400M），而中文VLP的发展因数据稀缺和网络噪声而受限。这阻碍了模型捕捉当代语义趋势和新兴概念，限制了中国化跨模态AI的进展。因此，构建可靠的中文数据资源对于推动该领域研究至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括开发系统化的数据处理流水线来构建DanQing数据集，涵盖数据源选择、文本精炼、视觉多样化和跨模态跨批次过滤，以有效减轻网络数据噪声。关键创新在于综合过滤策略和数据时效性，数据集特别收录了2024-2025年的最新数据，确保模型能捕捉最新语义趋势，为高质量中文图像文本对的收集提供可靠技术框架。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，通过使用SigLIP2模型进行继续预训练，DanQing在多种下游任务（如零样本分类、跨模态检索）中一致优于现有中文数据集，并展现出更平衡的语义分布和优越的扩展能力。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据，但实验证实了其在中文VLP任务中的有效性，凸显了数据集的质量优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论指出，DanQing的主要贡献是填补中文视觉语言预训练数据空白，并通过开源（使用Creative Commons CC-BY-NC 4.0许可证）促进社区研究。其学术价值在于推动中文跨模态AI发展，实际应用价值包括提升模型对新兴概念的理解。潜在局限性可能涉及数据覆盖范围，未来工作可优化收集流程或扩展多语言支持。

title: ProFit: Leveraging High-Value Signals in SFT via Probability-Guided Token Selection
abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is a fundamental post-training strategy to align Large Language Models (LLMs) with human intent. However, traditional SFT often ignores the one-to-many nature of language by forcing alignment with a single reference answer, leading to the model overfitting to non-core expressions. Although our empirical analysis suggests that introducing multiple reference answers can mitigate this issue, the prohibitive data and computational costs necessitate a strategic shift: prioritizing the mitigation of single-reference overfitting over the costly pursuit of answer diversity. To achieve this, we reveal the intrinsic connection between token probability and semantic importance: high-probability tokens carry the core logical framework, while low-probability tokens are mostly replaceable expressions. Based on this insight, we propose ProFit, which selectively masks low-probability tokens to prevent surface-level overfitting. Extensive experiments confirm that ProFit consistently outperforms traditional SFT baselines on general reasoning and mathematical benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出ProFit方法，通过概率指导的令牌选择在监督微调中掩码低概率令牌，以缓解模型过拟合到非核心表达的问题，提升对齐效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统监督微调（SFT）用于对齐大型语言模型与人类意图，但常强制模型匹配单一参考答案，忽略了语言的一对多性，导致模型过拟合于非核心表达，影响泛化能力。尽管引入多答案可缓解此问题，但数据和计算成本过高，因此研究动机是开发一种无需多样答案的高效方法，聚焦于减少单答案过拟合，以应对实际应用中的成本和效率挑战。
light_analysis.method: ProFit基于令牌概率与语义重要性的内在关系：高概率令牌通常承载核心逻辑框架，而低概率令牌多为可替换表达。该方法在训练过程中选择性掩码低概率令牌，以防止模型过度拟合到表面特征，从而优化SFT过程。关键创新点在于利用概率指导来选择高价值信号，无需额外多答案数据，基于现有模型概率分布实现低成本改进。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，ProFit在一般推理和数学基准测试上持续优于传统SFT基线。该方法有效缓解了过拟合问题，提升了模型性能，但摘要未明确说明具体准确率或效率改进数据，仅确认了相对于基线的显著优越性。实验结果支持了概率指导令牌选择的可行性，为SFT优化提供了实证依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是揭示了令牌概率与语义重要性的连接，并提出了ProFit方法，为监督微调提供了一种高效的低成本优化策略。其学术价值在于深化了对模型对齐机制的理解，实际应用能提升大型语言模型在各种任务中的鲁棒性和性能。未来工作可探索该方法在其他领域或更复杂场景下的适用性，并进一步评估其在多样化数据集上的泛化能力。

title: Understanding Pure Textual Reasoning for Blind Image Quality Assessment
abstract: Textual reasoning has recently been widely adopted in Blind Image Quality Assessment (BIQA). However, it remains unclear how textual information contributes to quality prediction and to what extent text can represent the score-related image contents. This work addresses these questions from an information-flow perspective by comparing existing BIQA models with three paradigms designed to learn the image-text-score relationship: Chain-of-Thought, Self-Consistency, and Autoencoder. Our experiments show that the score prediction performance of the existing model significantly drops when only textual information is used for prediction. Whereas the Chain-of-Thought paradigm introduces little improvement in BIQA performance, the Self-Consistency paradigm significantly reduces the gap between image- and text-conditioned predictions, narrowing the PLCC/SRCC difference to 0.02/0.03. The Autoencoder-like paradigm is less effective in closing the image-text gap, yet it reveals a direction for further optimization. These findings provide insights into how to improve the textual reasoning for BIQA and high-level vision tasks.
comment: Code available at https://github.com/AnonymousUserPublish/Bridging-Image-Text-Gap-for-BIQA/tree/main. This work is accepted by ICME (IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo) 2026

title: Deep Neural Networks as Discrete Dynamical Systems: Implications for Physics-Informed Learning
abstract: We revisit the analogy between feed-forward deep neural networks (DNNs) and discrete dynamical systems derived from neural integral equations and their corresponding partial differential equation (PDE) forms. A comparative analysis between the numerical/exact solutions of the Burgers' and Eikonal equations, and the same obtained via PINNs is presented. We show that PINN learning provides a different computational pathway compared to standard numerical discretization in approximating essentially the same underlying dynamics of the system. Within this framework, DNNs can be interpreted as discrete dynamical systems whose layer-wise evolution approaches attractors, and multiple parameter configurations may yield comparable solutions, reflecting the non-uniqueness of the inverse mapping. In contrast to the structured operators associated with finite-difference (FD) procedures, PINNs learn dense parameter representations that are not directly associated with classical discretization stencils. This distributed representation generally involves a larger number of parameters, leading to reduced interpretability and increased computational cost. However, the additional flexibility of such representations may offer advantages in high-dimensional settings where classical grid-based methods become impractical.

title: NeXT-IMDL: Build Benchmark for NeXT-Generation Image Manipulation Detection & Localization
abstract: The accessibility surge and abuse risks of user-friendly image editing models have created an urgent need for generalizable, up-to-date methods for Image Manipulation Detection and Localization (IMDL). Current IMDL research typically uses cross-dataset evaluation, where models trained on one benchmark are tested on others. However, this simplified evaluation approach conceals the fragility of existing methods when handling diverse AI-generated content, leading to misleading impressions of progress. This paper challenges this illusion by proposing NeXT-IMDL, a large-scale diagnostic benchmark designed not just to collect data, but to probe the generalization boundaries of current detectors systematically. Specifically, NeXT-IMDL categorizes AIGC-based manipulations along four fundamental axes: editing models, manipulation types, content semantics, and forgery granularity. Built upon this, NeXT-IMDL implements five rigorous cross-dimension evaluation protocols. Our extensive experiments on 11 representative models reveal a critical insight: while these models perform well in their original settings, they exhibit systemic failures and significant performance degradation when evaluated under our designed protocols that simulate real-world, various generalization scenarios. By providing this diagnostic toolkit and the new findings, we aim to advance the development towards building truly robust, next-generation IMDL models.
comment: Duplicate experiment results in Table 3 (Set-1 & Set-2)

title: SERA-H: Beyond Native Sentinel Spatial Limits for High-Resolution Canopy Height Mapping
abstract: High-resolution mapping of canopy height is essential for forest management and biodiversity monitoring. Although recent studies have led to the advent of deep learning methods using satellite imagery to predict height maps, these approaches often face a trade-off between data accessibility and spatial resolution. To overcome these limitations, we present SERA-H, an end-to-end model combining a super-resolution module (EDSR) and temporal attention encoding (UTAE). Trained under the supervision of high-density LiDAR-derived Canopy Height Models (CHM), our model generates 2.5 m resolution height maps from freely available Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 (10 m) time series data. Evaluated on an open-source benchmark dataset in France, SERA-H, with a MAE of 2.6 m and R2 of 0.82, not only outperforms standard Sentinel- 1/2 baselines but also achieves performance comparable to or better than methods relying on commercial very high-resolution imagery (SPOT-6/7, PlanetScope, Maxar). These results demonstrate that combining high-resolution supervision with the spatiotemporal information embedded in time series enables the reconstruction of details beyond the input sensors' native resolution. SERA-H opens the possibility of freely mapping forests with high revisit frequency, achieving accuracy comparable to that of costly commercial imagery.

title: Pro-Pose: Unpaired Full-Body Portrait Synthesis via Canonical UV Maps
abstract: Photographs of people taken by professional photographers typically present the person in beautiful lighting, with an interesting pose, and flattering quality. This is unlike common photos people take of themselves in uncontrolled conditions. In this paper, we explore how to canonicalize a person's 'in-the-wild' photograph into a controllable, high-fidelity avatar -- reposed in a simple environment with standardized minimal clothing. A key challenge is preserving the person's unique whole-body identity, facial features, and body shape while stripping away the complex occlusions of their original garments. While a large paired dataset of the same person in varied clothing and poses would simplify this, such data does not exist. To that end, we propose two key insights: 1) Our method transforms the input photo into a canonical full-body UV space, which we couple with a novel reposing methodology to model occlusions and synthesize novel views. Operating in UV space allows us to decouple pose from appearance and leverage massive unpaired datasets. 2) We personalize the output photo via multi-image finetuning to ensure robust identity preservation under extreme pose changes. Our approach yields high-quality, reposed portraits that achieve strong quantitative performance on real-world imagery, providing an ideal, clean biometric canvas that significantly improves the fidelity of downstream applications like Virtual Try-On (VTO).

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出Pro-Pose方法，通过规范UV映射和微调技术，实现未配对全身肖像的高质量合成，解耦姿势和外观。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决如何将日常“在野”照片规范化为可控、高保真度虚拟人像的问题。专业摄影师的照片在光照、姿势和质量上表现优异，而普通照片条件不可控，缺乏美学标准。现有方法面临挑战，因为需要保持人物的整体身份、面部特征和体形，同时处理服装遮挡，但缺乏同一个人在不同服装和姿势下的成对数据集。这限制了虚拟人像生成的实用性，因此开发处理未配对数据的方法成为关键需求。
light_analysis.method: 方法的核心包括两个关键部分：首先，将输入照片转换为规范全身UV空间，结合新颖的重新摆姿势技术来建模遮挡和合成新视图，这允许解耦姿势和外观，并利用大规模未配对数据集。其次，通过多图像微调技术个性化输出照片，以增强在极端姿势变化下的身份保持。该方法未明确指定模型架构或具体训练数据集，但强调UV空间操作的优势，提高了对未配对数据的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能生成高质量、重新摆姿势的肖像，在真实世界图像上实现了强大量化性能。这些输出提供了干净的生物识别画布，显著提升了虚拟试穿等下游应用的保真度。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率或效率改进）或与基线方法的详细对比情况，但强调了实际应用中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了Pro-Pose框架，通过规范UV映射和多图像微调，成功实现未配对全身肖像合成，有效保持人物身份。学术上，该方法解耦了姿势和外观，解决了数据稀缺问题；实际上，为虚拟试穿等应用提供了高质量基础。未来工作可探索更多姿势变化或扩展至其他虚拟现实场景，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Generative Adversarial Reasoner: Enhancing LLM Reasoning with Adversarial Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) with explicit reasoning capabilities excel at mathematical reasoning yet still commit process errors, such as incorrect calculations, brittle logic, and superficially plausible but invalid steps. In this paper, we introduce Generative Adversarial Reasoner, an on-policy joint training framework designed to enhance reasoning by co-evolving an LLM reasoner and an LLM-based discriminator through adversarial reinforcement learning. A compute-efficient review schedule partitions each reasoning chain into logically complete slices of comparable length, and the discriminator evaluates each slice's soundness with concise, structured justifications. Learning couples complementary signals: the LLM reasoner is rewarded for logically consistent steps that yield correct answers, while the discriminator earns rewards for correctly detecting errors or distinguishing traces in the reasoning process. This produces dense, well-calibrated, on-policy step-level rewards that supplement sparse exact-match signals, improving credit assignment, increasing sample efficiency, and enhancing overall reasoning quality of LLMs. Across various mathematical benchmarks, the method delivers consistent gains over strong baselines with standard RL post-training. Specifically, on AIME24, we improve DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B from 54.0 to 61.3 (+7.3) and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B from 43.7 to 53.7 (+10.0). The modular discriminator also enables flexible reward shaping for objectives such as teacher distillation, preference alignment, and mathematical proof-based reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了Generative Adversarial Reasoner框架，通过对抗性强化学习联合训练推理器和判别器，以增强大型语言模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在数学推理方面表现优异，但仍存在过程错误，如错误计算、逻辑脆弱和表面合理但无效的推理步骤。这些错误阻碍了LLMs的全面推理能力，现有方法往往依赖稀疏的完全匹配信号，导致信用分配效率低下和样本浪费。本研究旨在通过引入密集步骤级奖励来解决这些问题，提高推理的准确性和鲁棒性，从而优化LLMs在复杂任务中的性能。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出一个on-policy联合训练框架，核心是共同进化一个LLM推理器和一个基于LLM的判别器，通过对抗性强化学习实现。关键创新包括：使用计算效率高的审查计划将推理链分割成逻辑完整的、长度相当的片段；判别器评估每个片段的合理性，并提供简洁的结构化理由作为奖励依据。学习过程中，推理器因产生逻辑一致且导致正确答案的步骤而获得奖励，判别器则因正确检测错误而获得奖励。这生成了密集且校准良好的步骤级奖励，补充了稀疏的完全匹配信号，从而改进了信用分配和样本效率。
light_analysis.result: 在多种数学基准测试中，该方法相比强基线（使用标准RL后训练）取得了一致性能提升。具体地，在AIME24基准上，DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B的准确率从54.0%提升到61.3%（提升7.3个百分点），DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B从43.7%提升到53.7%（提升10.0个百分点）。这些结果证明了该框架能有效增强LLMs的推理质量，尤其在复杂数学问题上优于传统方法，验证了密集步骤级奖励机制的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了Generative Adversarial Reasoner框架，通过对抗性强化学习联合训练推理器和判别器，显著提升了大型语言模型的推理能力。学术价值在于引入了密集步骤级奖励机制，改进了信用分配和样本效率，为LLM推理优化提供了新思路。实际应用价值高，模块化判别器支持灵活奖励塑造，可应用于教师蒸馏、偏好对齐和数学证明推理等多种目标。未来工作可探索将该方法扩展到其他推理任务或领域，以进一步提高其通用性和鲁棒性。

title: Prime and Reach: Synthesising Body Motion for Gaze-Primed Object Reach
abstract: Human motion generation is a challenging task that aims to create realistic motion imitating natural human behaviour. We focus on the well-studied behaviour of priming an object/location for pick up or put down - that is, the spotting of an object/location from a distance, known as gaze priming, followed by the motion of approaching and reaching the target location. To that end, we curate, for the first time, 23.7K gaze-primed human motion sequences for reaching target object locations from five publicly available datasets, i.e., HD-EPIC, MoGaze, HOT3D, ADT, and GIMO. We pre-train a text-conditioned diffusion-based motion generation model, then fine-tune it conditioned on goal pose or location, on our curated sequences. Importantly, we evaluate the ability of the generated motion to imitate natural human movement through several metrics, including the 'Reach Success' and a newly introduced 'Prime Success' metric. Tested on 5 datasets, our model generates diverse full-body motion, exhibiting both priming and reaching behaviour, and outperforming baselines and recent methods.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出一种基于扩散模型的生成凝视引导人体伸手运动的方法，首次整理专门数据集并在多个数据集上优于基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 人体运动生成旨在模拟自然人类行为，凝视引导的对象伸手是一种常见且复杂的行为，对虚拟现实和机器人学应用有重要意义。然而，现有方法可能缺乏针对这种行为的合成能力和专门数据集，限制了生成运动的逼真性和多样性。因此，研究聚焦于首次整理凝视引导运动数据集，并开发生成模型以改善运动合成的效果。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用文本条件的扩散模型，首先预训练，然后基于整理的23.7K凝视引导运动序列微调。模型以目标姿势或位置为条件，从五个公开数据集（HD-EPIC、MoGaze、HOT3D、ADT、GIMO）收集数据，生成包含凝视和伸手行为的多样化全身运动，实现复杂行为的专门合成。
light_analysis.result: 在五个数据集上测试，模型生成的多样化全身运动有效表现出凝视和伸手行为。通过新引入的'Prime Success'和'Reach Success'等指标评估，与基线及最新方法相比，模型性能更优，显示出在合成自然运动方面的改进，但摘要未提供具体数据指标如准确率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献包括首次整理凝视引导运动数据集、提出基于扩散模型的生成方法以及引入新评估指标。该研究提升了人体运动生成的逼真性，特别是在复杂行为模拟方面，对虚拟交互和机器人学有应用价值。未来工作可能涉及扩展行为类型或改进模型泛化能力。

title: Anchored Video Generation: Decoupling Scene Construction and Temporal Synthesis in Text-to-Video Diffusion Models
abstract: State-of-the-art Text-to-Video (T2V) diffusion models can generate visually impressive results, yet they still frequently fail to compose complex scenes or follow logical temporal instructions. In this paper, we argue that many errors, including apparent motion failures, originate from the model's inability to construct a semantically correct or logically consistent initial frame. We introduce Anchored Video Generation (AVG), a modular pipeline that decouples these tasks by decomposing the Text-to-Video generation into three specialized stages: (1) Reasoning, where a Large Language Model (LLM) rewrites the video prompt to describe only the initial scene, resolving temporal ambiguities; (2) Composition, where a Text-to-Image (T2I) model synthesizes a high-quality, compositionally-correct anchor frame from this new prompt; and (3) Temporal Synthesis, where a video model, finetuned to understand this anchor, focuses its entire capacity on animating the scene and following the prompt. Our approach sets a new state-of-the-art on the T2V CompBench benchmark and significantly improves all tested models on VBench2. Furthermore, we show that visual anchoring allows us to cut the number of sampling steps by 70% without any loss in performance. AVG offers a simple yet practical path toward more efficient, robust, and controllable video synthesis.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Anchored Video Generation (AVG)方法，通过解耦场景构建与时间合成，利用大语言模型和图像模型改进文本到视频生成的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到视频扩散模型虽然在视觉效果上出色，但经常难以处理复杂场景或遵循逻辑时间指令。这主要是由于模型无法构建语义正确或逻辑一致的初始帧，导致后续动画错误。此问题限制了视频合成的质量和可控性，影响了实际应用，因此研究旨在通过解耦任务来弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: AVG方法采用模块化管道，将文本到视频生成分解为三个阶段：Reasoning阶段使用大型语言模型重写视频提示，仅描述初始场景以解决时间歧义；Composition阶段利用文本到图像模型从新提示合成高质量的锚定帧；Temporal Synthesis阶段使用微调的视频模型，专注于基于锚定帧的动画和遵循提示。关键创新点在于任务解耦，使不同模型能专注于其优势。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，AVG在T2V CompBench基准上实现了新的最佳性能，并在VBench2上显著提升了所有测试模型的性能。具体地，视觉锚定允许将采样步骤减少70%，而不会造成性能损失，表明该方法在质量和效率上均有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了AVG方法，通过解耦场景构建和时间合成，提供了一条高效、稳健和可控的视频合成路径。学术上展示了模块化管道的价值，实际应用上提高了视频生成的准确性和速度，未来可进一步优化模型集成或扩展场景。

title: EditMGT: Unleashing Potentials of Masked Generative Transformers in Image Editing
abstract: Recent advances in diffusion models (DMs) have achieved exceptional visual quality in image editing tasks. However, the global denoising dynamics of DMs inherently conflate local editing targets with the full-image context, leading to unintended modifications in non-target regions. In this paper, we shift our attention beyond DMs and turn to Masked Generative Transformers (MGTs) as an alternative approach to tackle this challenge. By predicting multiple masked tokens rather than holistic refinement, MGTs exhibit a localized decoding paradigm that endows them with the inherent capacity to explicitly preserve non-relevant regions during the editing process. Building upon this insight, we introduce the first MGT-based image editing framework, termed EditMGT. We first demonstrate that MGT's cross-attention maps provide informative localization signals for localizing edit-relevant regions and devise a multi-layer attention consolidation scheme that refines these maps to achieve fine-grained and precise localization. On top of these adaptive localization results, we introduce region-hold sampling, which restricts token flipping within low-attention areas to suppress spurious edits, thereby confining modifications to the intended target regions and preserving the integrity of surrounding non-target areas. To train EditMGT, we construct CrispEdit-2M, a high-resolution dataset spanning seven diverse editing categories. Without introducing additional parameters, we adapt a pre-trained text-to-image MGT into an image editing model through attention injection. Extensive experiments across four standard benchmarks demonstrate that, with fewer than 1B parameters, our model achieves similarity performance while enabling 6 times faster editing. Moreover, it delivers comparable or superior editing quality, with improvements of 3.6% and 17.6% on style change and style transfer tasks, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出首个基于掩码生成变换器的图像编辑框架EditMGT，通过局部解码范式解决了扩散模型在编辑时意外修改非目标区域的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在图像编辑中虽取得高视觉质量，但其全局去噪机制将局部编辑目标与全图上下文混合，导致非目标区域被意外修改，影响编辑精度和可控性。这一问题在需要精确局部编辑的实际应用中至关重要，因为现有扩散模型方法难以隔离编辑区域，限制了其在细节敏感任务中的适用性。因此，转向掩码生成变换器作为替代方案，探索其局部化潜力以提升编辑的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: EditMGT框架基于掩码生成变换器，利用其跨注意力图提供编辑相关区域的定位信号，并设计多层注意力整合方案进行细化和精确定位。在此基础上，引入区域保持采样，限制低注意力区域的令牌翻转以抑制虚假编辑，从而将修改局限在目标区域并保护非目标区域。使用预训练的文本到图像掩码生成变换器，通过注意力注入适应图像编辑任务，无需额外参数。为训练模型，构建了CrispEdit-2M高分辨率数据集，涵盖七个多样化编辑类别，以支持模型的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在四个标准基准测试中，EditMGT模型参数少于10亿，实现了与基线扩散模型相当的相似性能，同时编辑速度提升6倍，显著提高了效率。在编辑质量方面，模型在风格变化和风格转移任务上分别提升了3.6%和17.6%的性能指标，展示出优于或相当于现有方法的精度。实验结果表明，该框架在保持快速编辑的同时，通过局部化处理有效减少了非目标区域的修改，验证了其在实际应用中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: EditMGT成功将掩码生成变换器应用于图像编辑，证明了其局部解码范式的潜力，有效解决了扩散模型在全局处理中的局限性。该研究为高效、精准的图像编辑提供了新方法，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值，特别是在需要局部控制的编辑场景中。未来工作可扩展至更多编辑任务或优化模型泛化能力，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Blink: Dynamic Visual Token Resolution for Enhanced Multimodal Understanding
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress on various vision-language tasks, yet their visual perception remains limited. Humans, in comparison, perceive complex scenes efficiently by dynamically scanning and focusing on salient regions in a sequential "blink-like" process. Motivated by this strategy, we first investigate whether MLLMs exhibit similar behavior. Our pilot analysis reveals that MLLMs naturally attend to different visual regions across layers and that selectively allocating more computation to salient tokens can enhance visual perception. Building on this insight, we propose Blink, a dynamic visual token resolution framework that emulates the human-inspired process within a single forward pass. Specifically, Blink includes two modules: saliency-guided scanning and dynamic token resolution. It first estimates the saliency of visual tokens in each layer based on the attention map, and extends important tokens through a plug-and-play token super-resolution (TokenSR) module. In the next layer, it drops the extended tokens when they lose focus. This dynamic mechanism balances broad exploration and fine-grained focus, thereby enhancing visual perception adaptively and efficiently. Extensive experiments validate Blink, demonstrating its effectiveness in enhancing visual perception and multimodal understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Blink，一个动态视觉token分辨率框架，模仿人类眨眼过程，以增强多模态大语言模型的视觉感知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在多种视觉语言任务上取得了显著进展，但其视觉感知能力仍然有限，难以高效处理复杂场景。相比之下，人类通过动态扫描和聚焦于显著区域，以类似“眨眼”的过程实现高效感知。本研究动机源于模仿这一人类策略，旨在解决现有模型在视觉感知上的不足，如缺乏动态调整能力，从而提升模型的适应性和效率，以适应更复杂的多模态任务需求。
light_analysis.method: Blink框架包括两个核心模块：显著性引导的扫描和动态token分辨率。它首先基于注意力图估计每个层中视觉token的显著性，然后通过即插即用的token超分辨率模块扩展重要token。在下一层中，当这些token失去焦点时被丢弃。这种动态机制平衡了广泛探索和细粒度聚焦，从而在单次前向传播中自适应且高效地增强视觉感知，无需额外训练阶段。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但提到广泛的实验验证了Blink在增强视觉感知和多模态理解方面的有效性。可以推断，与其他基线方法相比，Blink可能提升了视觉任务的性能指标，如准确率或效率，但由于摘要缺乏细节，具体数据未提供。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了Blink框架，模仿人类感知策略，有效提升了多模态大语言模型的视觉感知能力。该研究具有重要学术价值，为多模态理解提供了新方法，并可能在视觉语言任务等实际应用中改进模型性能。未来工作可进一步优化动态机制或扩展到更多任务领域，以克服潜在的计算复杂性限制。

title: HybridSplat: Fast Reflection-baked Gaussian Tracing using Hybrid Splatting
abstract: Rendering complex reflection of real-world scenes using 3D Gaussian splatting has been a quite promising solution for photorealistic novel view synthesis, but still faces bottlenecks especially in rendering speed and memory storage. This paper proposes a new Hybrid Splatting(HybridSplat) mechanism for Gaussian primitives. Our key idea is a new reflection-baked Gaussian tracing, which bakes the view-dependent reflection within each Gaussian primitive while rendering the reflection using tile-based Gaussian splatting. Then we integrate the reflective Gaussian primitives with base Gaussian primitives using a unified hybrid splatting framework for high-fidelity scene reconstruction. Moreover, we further introduce a pipeline-level acceleration for the hybrid splatting, and reflection-sensitive Gaussian pruning to reduce the model size, thus achieving much faster rendering speed and lower memory storage while preserving the reflection rendering quality. By extensive evaluation, our HybridSplat accelerates about 7x rendering speed across complex reflective scenes from Ref-NeRF, NeRF-Casting with 4x fewer Gaussian primitives than similar ray-tracing based Gaussian splatting baselines, serving as a new state-of-the-art method especially for complex reflective scenes.
comment: The authors have decided to withdraw this manuscript to undergo a comprehensive revision of the methodology and data analysis. The current version no longer accurately reflects the final scope and quality of our ongoing research

light_analysis.overview: HybridSplat提出了一种基于反射烘焙的混合高斯泼溅方法，显著提升复杂反射场景的渲染速度和模型效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 使用3D高斯泼溅渲染真实场景的复杂反射在真实感新视图合成中具有前景，但面临渲染速度和内存存储的瓶颈。现有方法（如基于光线追踪的高斯泼溅）在处理复杂反射时效率低下，存储需求大，限制了实际应用，因此需要开发高效方法来解决这些挑战，以提升反射渲染的性能和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出HybridSplat机制，核心是反射烘焙的高斯追踪，将视图依赖的反射信息烘焙到每个高斯基元中，并使用基于分块的高斯泼溅技术渲染反射。通过统一的混合泼溅框架整合反射高斯基元和基础高斯基元。此外，引入管道级加速策略和反射敏感高斯剪枝，优化渲染流程并减少模型大小，从而提高效率并降低存储需求。
light_analysis.result: 通过在Ref-NeRF和NeRF-Casting等复杂反射场景上的广泛评估，HybridSplat实现了约7倍的渲染速度提升，并使用比类似基于光线追踪的高斯泼溅基线少4倍的高斯基元。这表明该方法在保持反射渲染质量的同时，显著提高了性能，成为复杂反射场景的新最先进方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: HybridSplat的主要贡献是通过反射烘焙和混合泼溅技术解决了复杂反射渲染中的速度和存储问题，推动了基于高斯泼溅的渲染技术发展。其实际应用价值体现在提升真实感场景合成的效率。未来工作可能涉及进一步优化算法或扩展到更多场景，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Prescriptive Artificial Intelligence: A Formal Paradigm for Auditing Human Decisions Under Uncertainty
abstract: We formalize Prescriptive Artificial Intelligence as a distinct paradigm for human-AI decision collaboration in high-stakes environments. Unlike predictive systems optimized for outcome accuracy, prescriptive systems are designed to recommend and audit human decisions under uncertainty, providing normative guidance while preserving human agency and accountability.   We introduce four domain-independent axioms characterizing prescriptive systems and prove fundamental separation results. Central among these is the Imitation Incompleteness theorem, which establishes that supervised learning from historical decisions cannot correct systematic decision biases in the absence of external normative signals. Consequently, performance in decision imitation is bounded by a structural bias term epsilon_bias rather than the statistical learning rate O(1/sqrt(n)).   This result formalizes the empirically observed accuracy ceiling in human decision imitation tasks and provides a principled criterion for when automation should be replaced by epistemic auditing. We demonstrate the computational realizability of the framework through an interpretable fuzzy inference system, applied as a stress test in elite soccer decision-making, where it reveals systematic decision latency and risk states obscured by outcome and status quo biases.   The proposed framework establishes Prescriptive AI as a general, realizable class of decision-support systems applicable across safety-critical domains in which interpretability, contestability, and normative alignment are essential.
comment: Preprint; suitable for AI, decision sciences, and prescriptive analytics. Short versions published in Wharton Sports Analytics Journal Fall 2025 (AI Feature Spotlight) and accepted to AAAI Bridge on LM Reasoning 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了Prescriptive AI作为一个正式范式，用于在不确定性下审核和指导人类决策，强调规范性指导与人机协作，填补了预测系统与决策审核之间的理论空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究动机源于高风险环境中人类决策的系统偏差问题。现有AI系统如预测模型专注于结果准确性，但忽略了决策过程的规范性审核，导致监督学习无法纠正历史决策中的固有偏见。这在安全关键领域如医疗或金融中尤为重要，因为需要保持人类责任和可解释性。因此，开发一种能提供规范性信号并审核决策的Prescriptive AI范式至关重要，以克服现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法通过形式化Prescriptive AI范式，引入四个领域无关的公理来定义决策审核系统。核心创新是Imitation Incompleteness定理，证明了在没有外部规范性信号的情况下，监督学习从历史决策中学习无法纠正系统偏差。为实现计算可行性，研究使用可解释的模糊推理系统作为示例，应用于精英足球决策制定中进行压力测试，以揭示决策延迟和风险状态等具体偏见。
light_analysis.result: 研究结果包括理论证明和案例应用。理论方面，Imitation Incompleteness定理表明模仿决策的性能受结构偏差epsilon_bias限制，而非统计学习率，解释了人类决策模仿任务中的准确性天花板。在案例中，模糊推理系统应用于足球决策，成功揭示了系统性决策延迟和风险状态，这些被结果和现状偏见掩盖。摘要未明确说明具体数据如准确率提升，但强调了框架的可实现性和规范性审核的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的结论确立了Prescriptive AI作为一个通用、可实现的决策支持系统类别，适用于安全关键领域如医疗、金融，其中可解释性、可争议性和规范对齐至关重要。主要贡献包括形式化理论、公理定义和计算示例，推动了人机协作决策的研究。潜在局限性包括需要更多实证验证，未来工作可扩展应用场景并优化技术实现，以增强实际部署的可行性。

title: Quantum-Classical Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Solving Reservoir Seepage Equations
abstract: In this paper, we adapt the Discrete Variable (DV)-Circuit Quantum-Classical Physics-Informed Neural Network (QCPINN) and apply it for the first time to four typical reservoir seepage models. These include the pressure diffusion equation for heterogeneous single-phase flow, the nonlinear Buckley-Leverett (BL) equation for simplified two-phase waterflooding, the convection-diffusion equation for compositional flow considering adsorption, and the fully coupled pressure-saturation two-phase oil-water seepage equation for heterogeneous reservoirs with exponential permeability distribution. The QCPINN integrates classical preprocessing/postprocessing networks with a DV quantum core, leveraging quantum superposition and entanglement to enhance high-dimensional feature mapping while embedding physical constraints to ensure solution consistency. We test three quantum circuit topologies (Cascade, Cross-mesh, Alternate) and demonstrate through four numerical experiments that QCPINNs achieve higher prediction accuracy than classical PINNs. Specifically, the Alternate topology outperforms others in heterogeneous single-phase flow, BL equation simulations and heterogeneous fully coupled pressure-saturation two-phase flow, while the Cascade topology excels in compositional flow with convection-dispersion-adsorption coupling. The Cross-mesh topology shows competitive early-stage convergence and accuracy across scenarios with balanced performance in coupled two-phase flow. Our work verifies the feasibility of QCPINN for reservoir engineering applications, bridging the gap between quantum computing research and industrial practice in oil and gas engineering.

light_analysis.overview: 论文首次将离散变量量子-经典物理信息神经网络（QCPINN）应用于储层渗流方程求解，通过整合量子核心与经典网络，显著提升了预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于石油和天然气工程中储层渗流方程求解的挑战，传统方法可能计算复杂且精度有限。经典物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在处理高维或非线性方程时性能不足，尤其在异质储层和复杂流动模型中。量子计算提供了利用叠加和纠缠增强高维特征映射的潜力，从而改进现有方法的效率和准确性，弥合理论计算与实际工业需求之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于QCPINN框架，结合经典前处理/后处理神经网络与离散变量（DV）量子核心，通过量子电路（如Cascade、Cross-mesh、Alternate拓扑）实现高维特征映射。关键创新在于嵌入物理约束（如扩散、对流和吸附方程）以确保解的物理一致性，并针对四种典型储层渗流模型（单相流、两相水驱、组合流和全耦合两相流）进行数值实验，未明确说明具体数据集，但通过仿真验证模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，QCPINNs在所有四种储层渗流模型中均比经典PINNs达到更高的预测精度。具体而言，Alternate拓扑在异质单相流、Buckley-Leverett方程模拟和异质全耦合压力-饱和度两相流中表现最佳；Cascade拓扑在组合流的对流-扩散-吸附耦合中尤为优异；Cross-mesh拓扑则在所有情景中展现出竞争性的早期收敛速度和平衡性能，尤其是在耦合两相流中。这些数据证明了量子-经典混合方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论验证了QCPINN在储层工程应用中的可行性，首次将量子计算与工业实践结合，为量子机器学习在物理建模领域提供了新范例。学术上，推动了量子计算与人工智能的交叉研究；实践中，有望优化石油和天然气行业的数值模拟流程。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多复杂模型、测试实际数据集以及进一步优化量子电路设计，以克服潜在的计算资源限制。

title: FlashVGGT: Efficient and Scalable Visual Geometry Transformers with Compressed Descriptor Attention
abstract: 3D reconstruction from multi-view images is a core challenge in computer vision. Recently, feed-forward methods have emerged as efficient and robust alternatives to traditional per-scene optimization techniques. Among them, state-of-the-art models like the Visual Geometry Grounding Transformer (VGGT) leverage full self-attention over all image tokens to capture global relationships. However, this approach suffers from poor scalability due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention and the large number of tokens generated in long image sequences. In this work, we introduce FlashVGGT, an efficient alternative that addresses this bottleneck through a descriptor-based attention mechanism. Instead of applying dense global attention across all tokens, FlashVGGT compresses spatial information from each frame into a compact set of descriptor tokens. Global attention is then computed as cross-attention between the full set of image tokens and this smaller descriptor set, significantly reducing computational overhead. Moreover, the compactness of the descriptors enables online inference over long sequences via a chunk-recursive mechanism that reuses cached descriptors from previous chunks. Experimental results show that FlashVGGT achieves reconstruction accuracy competitive with VGGT while reducing inference time to just 9.3% of VGGT for 1,000 images, and scaling efficiently to sequences exceeding 3,000 images. Our project page is available at https://wzpscott.github.io/flashvggt_page/.

light_analysis.overview: FlashVGGT 提出一种基于压缩描述符注意力的高效视觉几何变换器，通过减少自注意力的计算开销，显著提升长图像序列中3D重建的可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多视图图像的3D重建是计算机视觉的核心挑战，现有方法如Visual Geometry Grounding Transformer（VGGT）虽能捕捉全局关系，但依赖全自注意力，导致计算复杂度呈平方级增长，在长图像序列中产生大量token，造成可扩展性差和效率低下。这限制了大规模场景的实际应用，因此需开发更高效的注意力机制来解决瓶颈问题。
light_analysis.method: FlashVGGT 采用描述符注意力机制，首先将每帧图像的空间信息压缩为紧凑的描述符token集合，以减少token数量；然后通过交叉注意力计算全局注意力，将全图像token与较小描述符集交互，从而显著降低计算复杂度。关键创新包括使用压缩描述符优化全局关系捕捉，以及块递归机制，允许在线推理时重用先前块的缓存描述符，实现长序列（如超3000张图像）的高效处理。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，FlashVGGT 在3D重建准确性上与VGGT竞争，同时大幅提升效率：对于1000张图像，推理时间降至VGGT的9.3%。此外，该方法能有效扩展到超过3000张图像的长序列，展现出优异的可扩展性，无需牺牲性能，显著优于现有方法在计算开销方面的表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlashVGGT 的主要贡献是设计了一种高效且可扩展的注意力机制，解决了传统变换器在长序列处理中的计算瓶颈，推动3D重建领域向大规模应用发展，具有重要学术价值和实际意义。未来工作可进一步优化描述符压缩策略或探索其他序列处理技术，以应对更复杂的场景。

title: Fast3Dcache: Training-free 3D Geometry Synthesis Acceleration
abstract: Diffusion models have achieved impressive generative quality across modalities like 2D images, videos, and 3D shapes, but their inference remains computationally expensive due to the iterative denoising process. While recent caching-based methods effectively reuse redundant computations to speed up 2D and video generation, directly applying these techniques to 3D diffusion models can severely disrupt geometric consistency. In 3D synthesis, even minor numerical errors in cached latent features accumulate, causing structural artifacts and topological inconsistencies.
