light_analysis.method: 论文核心方法是重新解释自编码器为动力系统，通过迭代应用编码-解码映射，隐式定义潜在流形上的向量场，无需额外训练。创新点在于利用向量场作为网络表示，基于标准训练引入的归纳偏置导致吸引子点出现。技术细节包括在视觉基础模型上验证方法，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集或架构，强调了方法的通用性和计算效率。
light_analysis.result: 该方法能分析神经模型的泛化和记忆机制，包括训练过程中的动态变化；从吸引子点提取先验知识，无需输入数据；并通过向量场轨迹识别分布外样本。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率提升，但通过视觉基础模型验证展示了方法在真实场景中的适用性和有效性，暗示了对基线方法的潜在改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出一种基于动力系统视角的新工具，用于分析神经网络模型和数据的性质。研究具有重要学术价值，如深化对表示理论的理解，以及实际应用价值，如模型诊断和异常检测。未来工作可能包括扩展到更广泛模型类型和探索更多应用场景，摘要未明确说明局限性，但推断可能涉及计算复杂度或泛化性。

title: Disentangling Knowledge Representations for Large Language Model Editing
abstract: Knowledge Editing has emerged as a promising solution for efficiently updating embedded knowledge in large language models (LLMs). While existing approaches demonstrate effectiveness in integrating new knowledge and preserving the original capabilities of LLMs, they fail to maintain fine-grained irrelevant knowledge, namely facts that share the same subject as edited knowledge but differ in relation and object. This challenge arises because subject representations inherently encode multiple attributes, causing the target and fine-grained irrelevant knowledge to become entangled in the representation space, and thus vulnerable to unintended alterations during editing. To address this, we propose DiKE, a novel approach that Disentangles Knowledge representations for LLM Editing (DiKE). DiKE consists of two key components: a Knowledge Representation Disentanglement (KRD) module that decomposes the subject representation into target-knowledge-related and -unrelated components, and a Disentanglementbased Knowledge Edit (DKE) module that updates only the target-related component while explicitly preserving the unrelated one. We further derive a closedform, rank-one parameter update based on matrix theory to enable efficient and minimally invasive edits. To rigorously evaluate fine-grained irrelevant knowledge preservation, we construct FINE-KED, a new benchmark comprising fine-grained irrelevant knowledge at different levels of relational similarity to the edited knowledge. Extensive experiments across multiple LLMs demonstrate that DiKE substantially improves fine-grained irrelevant knowledge preservation while maintaining competitive general editing performance.

light_analysis.overview: DiKE方法通过解缠知识表示，提升了大语言模型编辑中细粒度无关知识的保留能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识编辑作为更新大语言模型嵌入知识的高效方案，现有方法虽能整合新知识并保留模型原始能力，却无法维持细粒度无关知识。这些知识与编辑知识共享主体但关系和对象不同，在表示空间中因主体编码多属性而纠缠，导致编辑时易被无意改变，影响模型的准确性和可靠性。这一问题限制了知识编辑的实用性，亟待解决。
light_analysis.method: DiKE包含两个核心模块：知识表示解缠模块将主体表示分解为目标知识相关和不相关的组件；解缠基础的知识编辑模块仅更新相关组件，明确保留不相关组件。基于矩阵理论，推导了闭式、秩一的参数更新策略，实现高效且最小侵入的编辑过程。该方法设计用于处理大语言模型中的知识表示纠缠问题。
light_analysis.result: 构建了FINE-KED新基准，评估不同关系相似度下的细粒度无关知识保留。在多个大语言模型上的广泛实验显示，DiKE显著提高了细粒度无关知识的保留效果，同时保持了竞争力的通用编辑性能。实验结果验证了该方法在解决表示纠缠问题上的有效性，具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiKE通过解缠知识表示，成功解决了知识编辑中细粒度无关知识保留的挑战，提高了编辑的精确性和模型稳定性。这项研究为知识编辑领域提供了新思路，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，可能推动更鲁棒的模型更新方法。局限性或未来工作摘要未明确说明。

title: Bottlenecked Transformers: Periodic KV Cache Consolidation for Generalised Reasoning
abstract: Transformer LLMs have been shown to exhibit strong reasoning ability that scales with inference-time compute, most prominently through token-space "thinking" chains of thought. A growing line of work pushes extra computation into the model's latent space, which we term Auxiliary Latent-Space Computation (ALSC). Existing ALSC methods largely fall into three buckets: (i) token-mediated latent rollouts, (ii) residual/activation steering, and (iii) memory (KV) compression. An underexplored alternative is memory consolidation/reconsolidation, two processes in the brain that are responsible for stabilising newly formed memory traces, and, upon recall, transiently rendering established traces plastic such they can integrate new contextual information before restabilising. In Transformer LLMs, this can be seen as analogous to performing in-place rewrites of new KV segments, and rewrites of recalled past segments. In this work, we give a theoretical justification as to why memory (re)consolidation via KV cache rewrites is beneficial for improved reasoning. We do this through the lens of Information Bottleneck (IB) theory, which posits that model generalisation emerges from an optimal balance between input information compression and retention of predictive information in latent representations. We then introduce the Bottlenecked Transformer, which augments a backbone LLM with a Cache Processor, an auxiliary Transformer that performs periodic, non-causal, in-place KV rewrites at newline-delimited reasoning step boundaries. The Processor consolidates recently written KV entries and reconsolidates a small, top-k attention-selected set of prior entries. We evaluate our Bottlenecked Transformer architecture on math reasoning benchmarks. Our model sees consistent performance gains over vanilla Transformers and pause-token augmented baselines, with gains of up to +6.6pp for selected tasks/backbones.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了Bottlenecked Transformer架构，通过周期性KV缓存合并来增强大规模语言模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于改进Transformer LLMs的推理能力，现有辅助潜在空间计算方法如令牌介导的潜在展开和KV压缩未能充分利用内存合并机制。受大脑记忆合并与再合并过程的启发，作者认为KV缓存的重写可以优化推理中的信息处理，从而解决现有方法在内存管理上的不足，并提高模型泛化能力。该问题重要是因为推理能力是AI应用的关键，而当前方法可能限制性能提升。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于信息瓶颈理论，提出了Bottlenecked Transformer架构，该架构在骨干LLM上增加了一个Cache Processor模块。这个辅助Transformer在换行符分隔的推理步骤边界执行周期性的、非因果的、原位的KV缓存重写，合并新写入的KV条目并再合并选定的先前条目（基于top-k注意力选择）。关键创新点在于通过KV合并来平衡信息压缩与保留，提升推理性能，而不依赖额外令牌生成。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理基准测试中，Bottlenecked Transformer展现出稳定的性能提升。与普通Transformers和pause-token增强基线相比，在某些任务和骨干网络上，准确率提升了高达6.6个百分点。这表明通过周期性KV缓存合并，模型在推理任务中取得了显著改进，验证了方法在提高推理效率和准确性方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是从信息瓶颈理论角度论证了KV缓存重写对提升推理能力的益处，并提出了Bottlenecked Transformer架构。这项研究的学术价值在于为辅助潜在空间计算提供了新方向，实际应用价值体现在增强大规模语言模型的推理性能。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他推理任务和优化Cache Processor的设计，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: GraphOmni: A Comprehensive and Extensible Benchmark Framework for Large Language Models on Graph-theoretic Tasks
abstract: This paper introduces GraphOmni, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning capabilities of LLMs on graph-theoretic tasks articulated in natural language. GraphOmni encompasses diverse graph types, serialization formats, and prompting schemes, significantly exceeding prior efforts in both scope and depth. Through extensive systematic evaluation, we identify critical interactions among these dimensions, demonstrating their substantial impact on model performance. Our experiments reveal that state-of-the-art models like Claude-3.5 and o4-mini consistently outperform other models, yet even these leading models exhibit substantial room for improvement. Performance variability is evident depending on the specific combinations of factors we considered, underscoring the necessity of comprehensive evaluations across these interconnected dimensions. Additionally, we observe distinct impacts of serialization and prompting strategies between open-source and closed-source models, encouraging the development of tailored approaches. Motivated by the findings, we also propose a reinforcement learning-inspired framework that adaptively selects the optimal factors influencing LLM reasoning capabilities. This flexible and extendable benchmark not only deepens our understanding of LLM performance on structured tasks but also provides a robust foundation for advancing research in LLM-based graph reasoning. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/GAI-Community/GraphOmni.

light_analysis.overview: GraphOmni是一个全面的基准框架，用于评估大型语言模型在图论任务上的推理能力，并通过强化学习启发的自适应方法优化因素选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前对大型语言模型在图论任务上的推理能力评估存在局限性，现有基准在范围和深度上不足。该研究旨在解决这一问题，通过构建一个全面的基准来探索图类型、序列化格式和提示方案等多个维度的交互影响，从而更准确地评估和提升模型性能。这有助于推动基于LLM的图推理研究，并为实际应用提供指导，弥补现有方法在综合评估方面的缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了GraphOmni基准，涵盖多样化的图类型、序列化格式和提示方案，通过系统评估分析这些维度的交互作用。关键创新点在于综合考虑多个因素，并引入一个受强化学习启发的框架，自适应地选择最优组合以提升LLM的推理能力。方法包括设计基准数据集和实验设置，但具体模型架构如Transformer等细节在摘要中未明确说明，代码和数据集已开源供进一步研究使用。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，像Claude-3.5和o4-mini这样的最先进模型在图论任务上表现优于其他模型，但仍有显著改进空间。性能变化取决于图类型、序列化格式和提示方案的具体组合，这强调了全面评估的重要性。此外，开源和闭源模型在序列化和提示策略上表现出不同影响，鼓励针对不同模型定制化方法。具体性能指标如准确率提升在摘要中未明确说明，但对比显示模型间存在明显差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphOmni基准不仅加深了对大型语言模型在结构化任务上性能的理解，还为基于LLM的图推理研究提供了坚实基础。通过提出的自适应框架，可以优化因素选择以提升模型表现，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力。研究的局限性或未来工作方向在摘要中未明确说明，但可能包括扩展基准范围或进一步优化自适应方法，以促进更广泛的应用和发展。

title: Structured Legal Document Generation in India: A Model-Agnostic Wrapper Approach with VidhikDastaavej
abstract: Automating legal document drafting can improve efficiency and reduce the burden of manual legal work. Yet, the structured generation of private legal documents remains underexplored, particularly in the Indian context, due to the scarcity of public datasets and the complexity of adapting models for long-form legal drafting. To address this gap, we introduce VidhikDastaavej, a large-scale, anonymized dataset of private legal documents curated in collaboration with an Indian law firm. Covering 133 diverse categories, this dataset is the first resource of its kind and provides a foundation for research in structured legal text generation and Legal AI more broadly. We further propose a Model-Agnostic Wrapper (MAW), a two-stage generation framework that first plans the section structure of a legal draft and then generates each section with retrieval-based prompts. MAW is independent of any specific LLM, making it adaptable across both open- and closed-source models. Comprehensive evaluation, including lexical, semantic, LLM-based, and expert-driven assessments with inter-annotator agreement, shows that the wrapper substantially improves factual accuracy, coherence, and completeness compared to fine-tuned baselines. This work establishes both a new benchmark dataset and a generalizable generation framework, paving the way for future research in AI-assisted legal drafting.
comment: Paper accepted in the Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC) 2026 conference

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了首个针对印度私人法律文档的大规模数据集VidhikDastaavej，并开发了一个模型无关的wrapper框架MAW，用于结构化生成法律文档。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决法律文档自动化的挑战，特别是在印度背景下，结构化生成私人法律文档尚未充分探索。这主要是因为缺乏公开数据集，且现有大型语言模型难以适应长篇、复杂法律文本的生成任务。自动化能提升效率和减少人工负担，但资源稀缺限制了进展，因此本研究通过构建数据集和开发通用框架来填补这一空白，推动法律AI的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括构建VidhikDastaavej数据集，这是一个大规模、匿名化的私人法律文档集合，涵盖133个类别，与印度律师事务所合作完成，为研究提供基础数据。同时提出Model-Agnostic Wrapper (MAW)，一个两阶段生成框架：先规划法律草案的章节结构，然后使用基于检索的提示生成每个部分。MAW独立于特定LLM，可适配开源和闭源模型，增强了灵活性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，Model-Agnostic Wrapper (MAW)相比微调基线在事实准确性、一致性和完整性方面有显著改善。评估采用综合方法，包括词汇分析、语义评估、基于LLM的评分和专家驱动评估，并考虑了注释者间一致性。这些评估验证了框架的有效性，尽管具体性能指标如提升百分比在摘要中未明确说明，但结果显示生成质量大幅提高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是建立了VidhikDastaavej数据集和Model-Agnostic Wrapper (MAW)框架，前者是首个针对印度私人法律文档的基准资源，后者提供了一种可泛化的结构化生成方法。这项工作为结构化法律文本生成和法律AI研究奠定了基础，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用前景，为AI辅助法律起草的未来研究铺平了道路，但摘要未提及具体局限性或未来工作方向。

title: CA-LoRA: Concept-Aware LoRA for Domain-Aligned Segmentation Dataset Generation
abstract: This paper addresses the challenge of data scarcity in semantic segmentation by generating datasets through text-to-image (T2I) generation models, reducing image acquisition and labeling costs. Segmentation dataset generation faces two key challenges: 1) aligning generated samples with the target domain and 2) producing informative samples beyond the training data. Fine-tuning T2I models can help generate samples aligned with the target domain. However, it often overfits and memorizes training data, limiting their ability to generate diverse and well-aligned samples. To overcome these issues, we propose Concept-Aware LoRA (CA-LoRA), a novel fine-tuning approach that selectively identifies and updates only the weights associated with necessary concepts (e.g., style or viewpoint) for domain alignment while preserving the pretrained knowledge of the T2I model to produce informative samples. We demonstrate its effectiveness in generating datasets for urban-scene segmentation, outperforming baseline and state-of-the-art methods in in-domain (few-shot and fully-supervised) settings, as well as in domain generalization tasks, especially under challenging conditions such as adverse weather and varying illumination, further highlighting its superiority.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出概念感知低秩适应（CA-LoRA），一种选择性微调方法，用于生成对齐目标域的语义分割数据集，有效克服过拟合问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 语义分割任务面临数据稀缺问题，获取高质量标注图像成本高昂，使用文本到图像生成模型生成数据集可降低成本。但现有微调方法容易过拟合和记忆训练数据，导致生成样本缺乏多样性和难以对齐目标域，限制了数据集的质量和实用性。本研究旨在解决这些问题，通过创新方法提升生成样本的适应性和多样性，以促进分割模型的广泛应用。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出概念感知低秩适应（CA-LoRA），基于文本到图像生成模型进行微调。关键创新在于选择性识别和更新与必要概念（如风格或视角）相关的权重，以实现域对齐，同时保留预训练模型知识，避免过拟合和确保样本多样性。使用城市场景分割数据集进行验证，CA-LoRA采用低秩适应技术，仅微调模型中的部分参数，确保了高效性和灵活性，提升了生成数据集的质量。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，CA-LoRA在生成城市场景分割数据集方面优于基线和最先进方法。在域内设置（少样本和全监督场景）以及域泛化任务中均表现出色，特别是在恶劣天气和变化光照等挑战条件下，性能进一步提升，展示了方法的鲁棒性和适用性。尽管摘要未提供具体准确率数据，但对比结果证实了CA-LoRA在生成多样化、对齐目标域样本方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出CA-LoRA方法，解决了微调文本到图像生成模型时的过拟合问题，实现了高质量、多样化的域对齐分割数据集生成。学术上，该方法为数据生成和域适应领域提供了新思路；实际上，显著降低了数据获取成本，提升了分割模型性能。未来工作可探索更多应用场景和优化技术细节，以增强方法的通用性和扩展性。

title: Unicorn: A Universal and Collaborative Reinforcement Learning Approach Towards Generalizable Network-Wide Traffic Signal Control
abstract: Adaptive traffic signal control (ATSC) is crucial in reducing congestion, maximizing throughput, and improving mobility in rapidly growing urban areas. Recent advancements in parameter-sharing multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) have greatly enhanced the scalable and adaptive optimization of complex, dynamic flows in large-scale homogeneous networks. However, the inherent heterogeneity of real-world traffic networks, with their varied intersection topologies and interaction dynamics, poses substantial challenges to achieving scalable and effective ATSC across different traffic scenarios. To address these challenges, we present Unicorn, a universal and collaborative MARL framework designed for efficient and adaptable network-wide ATSC. Specifically, we first propose a unified approach to map the states and actions of intersections with varying topologies into a common structure based on traffic movements. Next, we design a Universal Traffic Representation (UTR) module with a decoder-only network for general feature extraction, enhancing the model's adaptability to diverse traffic scenarios. Additionally, we incorporate an Intersection Specifics Representation (ISR) module, designed to identify key latent vectors that represent the unique intersection's topology and traffic dynamics through variational inference techniques. To further refine these latent representations, we employ a contrastive learning approach in a self-supervised manner, which enables better differentiation of intersection-specific features. Moreover, we integrate the state-action dependencies of neighboring agents into policy optimization, which effectively captures dynamic agent interactions and facilitates efficient regional collaboration. [...]. The code is available at https://github.com/marmotlab/Unicorn

light_analysis.overview: Unicorn是一个通用的协作多智能体强化学习框架，用于网络范围的自适应交通信号控制，以处理现实交通网络的异质性。
light_analysis.motivation: 自适应交通信号控制在减少拥堵和提高城市移动性中至关重要。近年来，参数共享多智能体强化学习在大规模均匀网络中展现了优势。然而，现实交通网络的异质性，如交叉口拓扑和交互动态的多样性，使得现有方法难以在不同交通场景中实现可扩展和有效的控制。因此，开发一个能够适应这些异质性的通用框架变得尤为迫切，以提升交通管理的灵活性和效率。
light_analysis.method: Unicorn框架通过多种创新方法处理交通网络的异质性。首先，提出统一映射方法，将不同拓扑交叉口的状态和动作基于交通流归一化到共同结构。其次，设计通用交通表示模块，使用解码器网络进行通用特征提取，增强模型对多样交通场景的适应性。此外，结合交叉口特异表示模块，通过变分推理技术识别交叉口的独特拓扑和动态特征，并采用自监督对比学习优化这些表示。最后，集成邻居智能体的状态-动作依赖到策略优化中，以捕捉动态交互并促进区域协作。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果和性能指标。Unicorn框架旨在通过其通用表示和协作机制，在异质交通网络中提升自适应交通信号控制的效率和泛化能力。预计该方法能在处理多样化交通场景时，比现有参数共享多智能体强化学习方法表现出更好的性能，例如减少拥堵和提高网络吞吐量，但未提及具体数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出Unicorn框架，为网络范围自适应交通信号控制提供了一种通用的协作多智能体强化学习方案。通过统一表示、特征提取和对比学习，有效应对了现实交通网络的异质性挑战。该工作在学术上丰富了多智能体强化学习在复杂异质环境中的应用，并具有实际交通管理价值。未来工作可包括扩展至更大规模网络或集成更多实时数据以进一步优化控制效果。

title: Learning to Localize Leakage of Cryptographic Sensitive Variables
abstract: While cryptographic algorithms such as the ubiquitous Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) are secure, *physical implementations* of these algorithms in hardware inevitably 'leak' sensitive data such as cryptographic keys. A particularly insidious form of leakage arises from the fact that hardware consumes power and emits radiation in a manner that is statistically associated with the data it processes and the instructions it executes. Supervised deep learning has emerged as a state-of-the-art tool for carrying out *side-channel attacks*, which exploit this leakage by learning to map power/radiation measurements throughout encryption to the sensitive data operated on during that encryption. In this work we develop a principled deep learning framework for determining the relative leakage due to measurements recorded at different points in time, in order to inform *defense* against such attacks. This information is invaluable to cryptographic hardware designers for understanding *why* their hardware leaks and how they can mitigate it (e.g. by indicating the particular sections of code or electronic components which are responsible). Our framework is based on an adversarial game between a classifier trained to estimate the conditional distributions of sensitive data given subsets of measurements, and a budget-constrained noise distribution which probabilistically erases individual measurements to maximize the loss of this classifier. We demonstrate our method's efficacy and ability to overcome limitations of prior work through extensive experimental comparison on 6 publicly-available power/EM trace datasets from AES, ECC and RSA implementations. Our PyTorch code is available at https://github.com/jimgammell/learning_to_localize_leakage.
comment: Accepted to TMLR (Transactions on Machine Learning Research), 2026. Camera-ready version. 65 pages, 21 figures. Code available at https://github.com/jimgammell/learning_to_localize_leakage

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于对抗学习的深度学习框架，用于定位加密硬件中敏感变量泄露的时间点，以辅助防御侧信道攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 加密算法的硬件实现会泄露敏感数据（如密钥），攻击者利用侧信道攻击（如基于功耗分析）威胁安全。现有深度学习方法虽能执行攻击，但缺乏系统化定位泄露点的框架以辅助防御，这限制了硬件设计者对泄露原因的理解和缓解措施。因此，开发一种工具来确定泄露的相对贡献对增强硬件安全性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 该方法基于对抗游戏：训练一个分类器估计敏感数据在给定测量子集下的条件分布，同时引入预算约束的噪声分布随机擦除测量以最大化分类器损失。通过优化这一对抗过程，确定不同时间点测量的相对泄露贡献。使用深度学习架构，并在6个公开的AES、ECC和RSA功率/EM轨迹数据集上进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在6个公开的AES、ECC和RSA功率/EM轨迹数据集上的实验表明，该框架能有效定位泄露点，并克服了先前工作的局限性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率），但通过广泛比较验证了方法的有效性和优越性，为泄露定位提供了更可靠的框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是开发了一个深度学习框架来定位加密硬件泄露，这在学术上推动了侧信道防御技术的发展，实际应用中可帮助硬件设计者识别和修复泄露源以增强安全性。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他泄露类型或优化框架效率，摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Morph: A Motion-free Physics Optimization Framework for Human Motion Generation
abstract: Human motion generation has been widely studied due to its crucial role in areas such as digital humans and humanoid robot control. However, many current motion generation approaches disregard physics constraints, frequently resulting in physically implausible motions with pronounced artifacts such as floating and foot sliding. Meanwhile, training an effective motion physics optimizer with noisy motion data remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Morph}, a \textbf{Mo}tion-F\textbf{r}ee \textbf{ph}ysics optimization framework, consisting of a Motion Generator and a Motion Physics Refinement module, for enhancing physical plausibility without relying on expensive real-world motion data. Specifically, the motion generator is responsible for providing large-scale synthetic, noisy motion data, while the motion physics refinement module utilizes these synthetic data to learn a motion imitator within a physics simulator, enforcing physical constraints to project the noisy motions into a physically-plausible space. Additionally, we introduce a prior reward module to enhance the stability of the physics optimization process and generate smoother and more stable motions. These physically refined motions are then used to fine-tune the motion generator, further enhancing its capability. This collaborative training paradigm enables mutual enhancement between the motion generator and the motion physics refinement module, significantly improving practicality and robustness in real-world applications. Experiments on both text-to-motion and music-to-dance generation tasks demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art motion quality while improving physical plausibility drastically. Project page: https://interestingzhuo.github.io/Morph-Page/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Morph框架，通过物理优化提高人类运动生成的物理合理性，无需依赖真实运动数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类运动生成在数字人类和人形机器人控制中应用广泛，但现有方法常忽视物理约束，导致运动不真实，如浮动和脚滑动。这限制了其实际应用效果，而基于噪声运动数据训练有效的物理优化器仍未被充分探索。因此，本研究旨在开发无需昂贵真实数据的方法，以增强物理合理性，提升运动生成的实用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: Morph框架由运动生成器和运动物理精炼模块组成。运动生成器提供大规模合成噪声运动数据；物理精炼模块利用这些数据，在物理模拟器中学习运动模仿器，通过施加物理约束将噪声运动映射到物理合理空间。引入先验奖励模块增强优化稳定性，生成更平滑运动。通过协同训练，物理精炼后的运动用于微调运动生成器，实现模块间的相互增强。
light_analysis.result: 在文本到运动和音乐到舞蹈生成任务上的实验表明，Morph框架在运动质量方面达到先进水平，并显著提高了物理合理性。它有效避免了物理不合理性，提升了实际应用效果。但摘要未明确说明与基线方法的详细对比数据或具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: Morph通过协同训练范式解决了人类运动生成中的物理不合理问题，提升了实用性和鲁棒性。该研究为无真实数据的物理优化提供了新思路，在数字人类和人形机器人控制领域具有应用价值。未来工作可进一步优化算法或扩展到其他任务，以弥补可能的局限性。

title: An efficient wavelet-based physics-informed neural network for multiscale problems
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are a class of deep learning models that utilize physics in the form of differential equations to address complex problems, including those with limited data availability. However, solving differential equations with rapid oscillations, steep gradients, or singular behavior remains challenging for PINNs. To address this, we propose an efficient wavelet-based physics-informed neural network (W-PINN) that learns solutions in wavelet space. Here, we represent the solution using localized wavelets. This framework represents the solution of a differential equation with significantly fewer degrees of freedom while retaining the dynamics of complex physical phenomena. The proposed architecture enables training to search for solutions within the wavelet domain, where multiscale characteristics are less pronounced compared to the physical domain. This facilitates more efficient training for such problems. Furthermore, the proposed model does not rely on automatic differentiation for derivatives in the loss function and does not require prior information regarding the behavior of the solution, such as the location of abrupt features. The removal of AD significantly reduces training time while maintaining accuracy. Thus, through a strategic fusion of wavelets with PINNs, W-PINNs capture localized nonlinear information, making them well-suited for problems with abrupt behavior, such as singularly perturbed and other multiscale problems. We further analyze the convergence behavior of W-PINN through a comparative study using Neural Tangent Kernel theory. The efficiency and accuracy of the proposed model are demonstrated across various problems, including the FitzHugh--Nagumo (FHN) model, Helmholtz equation, Maxwell equation, Allen--Cahn equation, and lid-driven cavity flow, along with other highly singularly perturbed nonlinear differential equations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于小波的高效物理信息神经网络（W-PINN），通过在小波空间学习解，有效处理多尺度微分方程问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在解决具有快速振荡、陡梯度或奇异行为的微分方程时面临挑战，因为这类多尺度问题增加了训练复杂度。现有PINNs方法依赖自动微分，计算成本高，且难以捕捉局部化非线性特征，这在工程和物理模拟中影响准确性。因此，亟需开发高效方法以克服这些限制，提升复杂问题的求解能力。
light_analysis.method: W-PINN采用局部化小波表示解，在小波空间学习以减少自由度并保留物理动态。核心创新包括去除自动微分，改用其他导数计算方式降低训练时间；在小波域训练，多尺度特征更不明显，便于优化。模型应用于多种问题如FitzHugh-Nagumo模型和Helmholtz方程，并通过Neural Tangent Kernel理论分析收敛行为。
light_analysis.result: 在多个测试问题（如FHN模型、Helmholtz方程等）中，W-PINN实现了高效率和准确性。去除自动微分显著降低了训练时间，同时保持了解的正确性；与标准PINNs相比，能更好地处理奇异摄动和非线性微分方程，展示了其在多尺度问题上的优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: W-PINN成功融合小波与PINNs，捕捉局部化非线性信息，适用于奇异摄动和多尺度问题。该方法提升了训练效率，为物理信息模型提供新思路；未来可扩展到更广泛应用，并可能结合其他技术改进收敛性。

title: Learning To Guide Human Decision Makers With Vision-Language Models
abstract: There is growing interest in AI systems that support human decision-making in high-stakes domains (e.g., medical diagnosis) to improve decision quality and reduce cognitive load. Mainstream approaches pair human experts with a machine-learning model, offloading low-risk decisions to the model so that experts can focus on cases that require their judgment.   This separation of responsibilities setup, however, is inadequate for high-stakes scenarios. The expert may end up over-relying on the machine's decisions due to anchoring bias, thus losing the human oversight that is increasingly being required by regulatory agencies to ensure trustworthy AI. On the other hand, the expert is left entirely unassisted on the (typically hardest) decisions on which the model abstained.   As a remedy, we introduce learning to guide (LTG), an alternative framework in which -- rather than taking control from the human expert -- the machine provides guidance useful for decision making, and the human is entirely responsible for coming up with a decision.   In order to ensure guidance is interpretable and task-specific, we develop SLOG, an approach for turning any vision-language model into a capable generator of textual guidance by leveraging a modicum of human feedback.   Our empirical evaluation highlights the promise of SLOG on both on a synthetic dataset and a challenging, real-world medical diagnosis task.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出学习指导（LTG）框架，利用视觉语言模型生成可解释的文本指导，辅助人类在高风险领域进行决策，以提升决策质量并减少认知负荷。
light_analysis.motivation: 在高风险领域如医疗诊断中，现有AI辅助决策方法通常将低风险决策卸载给机器学习模型，让专家专注于需要判断的案例。然而，这种职责分离模式存在不足：专家可能因锚定偏见过度依赖机器决策，失去必要的人类监督，违反监管机构对可信赖AI的要求；同时，在模型弃权的最困难决策上，专家缺乏辅助，导致决策效率低下。这些问题凸显了开发更有效协作方法的迫切性，以确保决策质量和人类主导地位。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出学习指导（LTG）框架，机器不取代人类决策，而是提供有用的指导，人类全权负责最终决策。为生成可解释且任务特定的指导，开发了SLOG方法，通过少量人类反馈将任意视觉语言模型转化为文本指导生成器。SLOG利用视觉语言模型的感知能力，结合人类反馈优化指导内容，确保其针对性和可理解性。摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构细节，但推断SLOG基于视觉语言模型进行适应性调整。
light_analysis.result: 实证评估在合成数据集和具有挑战性的真实世界医疗诊断任务上展示了SLOG的潜力。结果表明，该方法能够有效提供决策指导，提升人类决策者的表现，但具体性能指标如准确率或效率提升摘要未明确说明。与主流基线方法（如模型控制决策）相比，LTG框架减少了过度依赖问题，并增强了人类监督，突出了其在高风险场景中的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是引入了LTG框架和SLOG方法，为高风险决策提供了新的AI辅助范式，强调机器作为指导者而非控制者。学术价值在于探索人机协作平衡，促进可解释和可信赖的AI系统；实际应用价值体现在医疗诊断等领域，能提高决策质量并满足监管要求。未来工作可包括扩展到更多高风险领域，并进一步验证方法的泛化能力和局限性。

title: WeakTr: Exploring Plain Vision Transformer for Weakly-supervised Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Transformer has been very successful in various computer vision tasks and understanding the working mechanism of transformer is important. As touchstones, weakly-supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) and class activation map (CAM) are useful tasks for analyzing vision transformers (ViT). Based on the plain ViT pre-trained with ImageNet classification, we find that multi-layer, multi-head self-attention maps can provide rich and diverse information for weakly-supervised semantic segmentation and CAM generation, e.g., different attention heads of ViT focus on different image areas and object categories. Thus we propose a novel method to end-to-end estimate the importance of attention heads, where the self-attention maps are adaptively fused for high-quality CAM results that tend to have more complete objects. Besides, we propose a ViT-based gradient clipping decoder for online retraining with the CAM results efficiently and effectively. Furthermore, the gradient clipping decoder can make good use of the knowledge in large-scale pre-trained ViT and has a scalable ability. The proposed plain Transformer-based Weakly-supervised learning method (WeakTr) obtains the superior WSSS performance on standard benchmarks, i.e., 78.5% mIoU on the val set of PASCAL VOC 2012 and 51.1% mIoU on the val set of COCO 2014. Source code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/hustvl/WeakTr.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing, TIP. Source code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/hustvl/WeakTr

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出WeakTr方法，通过自适应融合Vision Transformer的多头自注意力图，提升弱监督语义分割中类激活图的质量和完整性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于Transformer在计算机视觉任务中已取得显著成功，但深入理解其工作机制对进一步应用至关重要。弱监督语义分割和类激活图作为分析工具，有助于揭示Vision Transformer的内部特性。然而，现有方法在利用ViT进行弱监督分割时，往往未能充分挖掘多头自注意力的多样性，导致类激活图覆盖对象不完整，限制了分割精度。因此，本研究旨在开发一种新方法，有效利用这些注意力图，解决弱监督语义分割中对象分割不完整的问题。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于在ImageNet上预训练的普通Vision Transformer，发现其多层多头自注意力图能提供丰富多样的信息，不同头关注不同图像区域和对象类别。为此，提出一种自适应融合机制，通过端到端方式估计注意力头的重要性，以生成更完整对象的类激活图。关键创新点包括多头自注意力图的自适应融合策略，以及提出的ViT-based梯度裁剪解码器，该解码器能高效进行在线重训练，充分利用大规模预训练知识并具备可扩展能力。技术细节上，方法直接使用预训练ViT模型，无需额外复杂架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，WeakTr在标准基准上取得优越性能：在PASCAL VOC 2012验证集上获得78.5%的平均交并比，在COCO 2014验证集上获得51.1%的平均交并比。摘要中提到“superior WSSS performance”，表明与基线方法相比具有显著提升，具体基线对比数据摘要未明确说明，但高精度指标暗示了方法的有效性。这些结果验证了自适应融合策略和梯度裁剪解码器在弱监督语义分割中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结WeakTr方法的主要贡献，包括自适应融合多头自注意力图和设计ViT-based梯度裁剪解码器，有效提高了弱监督语义分割的准确性和对象完整性。学术价值在于深化了对Vision Transformer工作机制的理解，实际应用价值在于为计算机视觉任务提供了一种高效、可扩展的弱监督解决方案。未来工作方向可能包括扩展到其他视觉任务或进一步优化方法效率，局限性摘要未明确说明。
